user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Miranda Volanti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEScGvG9RF2Qavhcv2a0D6tcKim2yIPavWDhnnKiw9CW_IOcALDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Plant-Based Dream in La Jolla — Truly One of a Kind

We were in San Diego for a business trip and stumbled upon Trilogy, and honestly… we ended up eating here every single day (and ordering takeout). This was the only place in the area that checked every box for us: organic, gluten-free, plant-based, no processed ingredients, and no refined sugar. That combination is almost impossible to find. There are plenty of vegan restaurants, but you never really know what’s in their food and lots of places rely on processed substitutes, seed oils, or sugary sauces. Trilogy is different.

Everything is clean, intentional, and made with real ingredients. I usually have to cook all my meals when I travel because I don’t trust restaurant food, but it was such a relief to finally relax and enjoy a meal knowing it aligned with everything I look for. It honestly felt like my body could breathe.

We tried almost the entire menu:
– Nachos
– Breakfast Burrito
– Miso Bowl
– Adora Bowl
– Plant Power Bowl
– Cosmic Quinoa Bowl
– Chili
– Avocado Bruschetta
– Mac n Cheeze
– Perfect Tacos
– Enchiladas
– “Best Burger Yet”
– Carrot Cake
– Pumpkin Pie
– Paradise Cheesecake
- Coconut Cortado
- Latte
- Matcha

Every single dish had flavor, freshness, and that homemade feel you can only get when the kitchen cares about ingredients. Nothing tasted heavy or artificial just real food prepared with love.

We need more restaurants like this. Trilogy made our trip 10x easier, and we wish every city had a place we could trust the way we trusted them. If you’re serious about clean eating, this is the spot in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLjrx55_xMVBTirg0oISIu&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Selina Oeien","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuSL3JmQdWj96veaTEHv8jhsCsbwIL-Yh-UKIZqlzMctIh3wqSAA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Trilogy is the best vegan cafe in San Diego hands down! The seared spring rolls, enticing eggplant, mac & cheez are all delicious options, but the real star of the show is their sweet treats — I pretty much order their transcendent brownie and vegan cookies every time I come! The ingredient and flavor quality is so good, although it better be for the price haha. Only other downsides are the run-down environment and often unfriendly service, but I will still be back for the best healthy, vegan meals!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZDr8YzJTNouZ3iym9zB7w&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Snehal Sonawane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8Pn3y_5Q_cILiFzQ-BszkTj1wv1zs-48B7M4AWdTx_yiU5RBLnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice place to have brunch and enjoy the view. We ordered nachos, dumplings, baked sweet potatoes, avocado toast and enchiladas. Everything was great, dumplings were a bit chewy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAk2juq9nKeV7N5PrsF7mIA&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Francis Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOwB3kEaJEs4cR9mHOa976pS0nr7Bs5re0WOKsKgunbAJwGLul=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a gem the Trilogy Sanctuary is. Easily missed, the elevator transports you to a rooftop oasis right in the middle of La Jolla. The smoothies were tasty and wholesome and left us energized for the rest of the day. Looking forward to another visit next time we're in San Diego!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMKpxm94HvUD-9YOENyyE2&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Tony M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSob7BBTPLHdXg24twW2F_YTIRZrq1JOTklQGMlASld1SF2Fjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"GREAT food!   I love how everything is plant based and focuses on Whole Foods and doesn’t promote processed foods.   The atmosphere is amazing. The view is incredible and looks amazing during the evenings.  The only complaint I have is that the staff are not the nicest and tend to have an attitude.  If you can overlook that, I recommend this for the food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7v96NwBqRs4-z7Fe9py7V&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Delilah Soliz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbYUF2PSHdMueqmxZ1vovHEcK2uveGN8C8HTGEzdhUNPG2oRfa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This vegan restaurant stands out as one of the finest places I have ever dined at. I tried three dishes and they were all a delightful experience, showcasing the vibrant flavors and textures that fresh, plant-based ingredients can offer. I wholeheartedly recommend this exceptional establishment to anyone looking for delicious, high-quality vegan cuisine. The attention to freshness and creativity in their menu truly sets this place apart!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA07uQuXKXhPQJgwYmjVhgp&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"Sindhu B M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWAHPIQMrrWfLcC6L1M4_y_J0c8YxjfJW6ZJl32RTOaSZ0fUkU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently visited this place and absolutely loved the experience. The rooftop setting was peaceful and inviting, and the vibe felt both vibrant and relaxing. Tried the Quinoarizo con Huevos and the Enchiladas, and both were flavorful, fresh, and beautifully presented. It’s the kind of place that makes you feel good about what you’re eating and where you’re eating it—definitely worth a return visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCa5xN6nvkvA03ENnDtpD13&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-8-13"},{"Name":"Maiyah Sims","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu4kfTR6-Jf9FXnbNDrJrEd3gO50N5tCkQiIS8SA-UAms7UCjP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I love the vibe of this place. Ideally, would be my perfect spot…. BUT I ordered the Brussel Sprout Delight dish and I was unfortunately, was not delighted. Frankly, quite disappointed. Furthermore, I think this is a beautiful place due to the atmosphere and the focus of nailing vegan options, but this specific dish was not worth $15. I would’ve hoped for much more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnJa086GTltY0c2kikm2hD&fid=0x0:0x12dc3359dfd8bc6b"],"When":"2025-12-7"}]

[{"Name":"Felicity","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2p0Le-PMxO5_1GXj3OMalG02p3VFpXnWX7rbNEIG07s_X_7Mc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were here for restaurant week, and we left with bellies full of yummy food. Good vibes, nice ocean view, outdoor seating with heated lamps. Food was amazing and I highly recommend the ahi poke tacos. It was very delicious and fresh. We also ordered a fish entree. Mac and cheese was a bit watery but the breaded fish was cooked to perfection. Now.... The dessert. THE DESSERT!! This pie was the highlight of my day. 10/10 will come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeXKK__o0G5DeYlXgLTLjA&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Maura B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdJHSbFY6h1tCGGzHjmwr1_uWRQHbUi9KVf-M2cp3hzObKMdCf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Duke’s La Jolla — A Truly Memorable Dining Experience

Duke’s La Jolla is exceptional in every way — delicious food, a beautiful atmosphere, and a level of hospitality that stays with you long after you leave. Every dish was fresh, flavorful, and prepared with real care, making the meal feel both comforting and elevated.

What made the experience truly stand out was the outstanding service. The entire team was warm and attentive, but I especially want to recognize Will Landry, Special Events Coordinator, whose professionalism and kindness made the evening unforgettable. His gracious hospitality and genuine care for guests set the tone for an experience that felt personal and incredibly welcoming.

From the ocean view ambiance to the thoughtfully prepared dishes and exceptional staff, Duke’s is the perfect place to enjoy a beautiful meal in La Jolla. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZCcAYN1kuftfMBJ2Odmvw&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Samantha Mimi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKqdTilwO0RcRv0hvCaQsV6qT5eUWOBvDKPqXcki7uuJvkk5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dukes is a classic Hawaiian-fusion restaurant chain found among the coast in Southern California. It’s a great place for groups, which is the only time I go. Dukes is one of my family’s to-go restaurants. The food is really standard (like Hawaiian Cheesecake Factory) but it has a fantastic view! Definitely worth a visit, especially for those coming from out of town. Aloha!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxGI6P3lbnXgMzCwURvMBx&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Bobby Bautista","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY6r7c2l_7vMwXvxV4tyVSccb3IVGmTa0ceRrpD4SPVEd3yg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stopped by Duke’s La Jolla on our way back to Los Angeles after visiting the La Jolla Cove, and it turned out to be one of the highlights of the trip. It happened to be Restaurant Week, so we took advantage of their specials—and wow, the food was fantastic. The poke tacos especially stood out, fresh and full of flavor.

We sat in the back overlooking the ocean and mountains, and the view alone was worth the stop calm, scenic, and relaxing. The staff were friendly, attentive, and our server went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect.

If you’re in La Jolla Cove, I definitely recommend stopping here. Great food, amazing views, and a welcoming atmosphere make Duke’s a must-visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCm6AB7MEWlhya7ngUCvXGC&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Vera Quill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBjg7P12NrSR9EGk5oSuanWq0MjgDW0anIi_1QbxIPD6gs1LM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came here on a recommendation for the views and the food—and both delivered beautifully. The service was warm and attentive, the non-alcoholic mixed drinks were refreshingly delicious, and the food was just as satisfying. We especially enjoyed learning about Duke’s history and its impact on the local community—it added a meaningful layer to the experience. A memorable visit all around!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyXK21g4s6cv37hVssiqc6&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Curtis Grace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFAzM7t7amv9oMP6UiIyzCOFs51UxxNXpefzjMioVDl5_SYKPt_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found Duke’s online and had to try it while in La Jolla for surgery at UCSD. It was the perfect celebratory dinner. Great table with a sunset view, and our server was incredibly sweet with excellent recommendations.

The coconut shrimp and mac nut herb-crusted fresh fish were delicious, and the rice pilaf was perfect. Finished with key lime pie and an after-dinner cocktail at the bar. Wonderful food, great service, and an all-around fantastic experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDR2BG9sml0MhHIaCzlKUru&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Brad Newton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmp5AA-zKlcgFiYEt3MGI6UUp19ij-orImzN-LSIk2KIEtxsVP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really cool spot with great outdoor seating. Our server was awesome and the food was incredible. My wife's filet came out over done, but the quickly got her a new steak, comped the filet, and  offered free dessert as an apology. One of the sides for the steak is a creamed corn, and it was the best corn my wife and I have ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrf1gEx9sXUWmuisT6BP3y&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Edna G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9wxr_9VeIoYYVc4hGcextKYAGGCarFmH7j_z3CdRYu4geOwX8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To my surprise, the view of this restaurant is spectacular during sunset. Easy to find. Some street parking but best to come by uber. Came here with a group of 7 for a company group outing. This place is great for big groups, company meal, or romantic dinner. Their outdoor patio dining is where to sit at. I almost felt like I was in Hawaii. The staff were very accommodating as we wanted to sit closer to the ledge to see the water. I didn’t know how everyone’s food tasted but my husband’s and my dishes were good.

For appetizers, we tried their ‘crab wontons’ and ‘panko crusted calamari’. I loved the crab wontons had a good amount of filling that you didn’t need the sauce.  That is how it should be like. The squid in the calamari could be a tiny bit softer. I think it was a little overcooked but still tasted good with the sauce. We had their Mai Tai and Lavender Colada. The Mai Tai was all alcohol but better that way for the price! Haha The Lavender Colada, you have to add dark rum on top. It was good but did not taste any lavender in it but the coloring. I had their Hot Pot and it was excellent. Flavor of the coconut broth was so good, I finished the soup. It came with a small lobster tail, mussels and white fish. A good balance. My husband’s had the ‘Filet Mignon’. I thought it was cooked well with good seasoning. Didn’t like the corn with it though but then I am not really into corn. They only have two desserts that we liked and that was the Hula pie and Key Lime Pie. Key Lime Pie is the one to get! I love the crust!

You just have to be wary if you are not sitting underneath the big umbrellas as outdoor eating attracts the birds. Make sure you are fully underneath the umbrella. Still a great place for service, food and views. Totally recommended this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3XqvEArhnw-pqqK3l5_1G&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-11-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kimia N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZHbgvYgOHGfNzHdthsi34Hl9IiB3iEdKH0L2CapdwVcb2lQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went here yesterday for brunch and they were great! They had plenty of space and accommodated us being 10min late to our reservation. The food was delicious with our favorites being the Nogada guacamole, which was really unique with the nuts and fruit on the guac, and the cripsy crab and shrimp tacos as well as the wagyu brisket taco. All of the guacamoles are a little sweet because of the orange in it. It was unique and felt very fresh. I also really enjoyed their salsa with nice fresh chips!
We also got the baja fish taco and the grilled shrimp taco which I felt were just okay.
The prices are a little expensive at $10+ per taco and they add an additional surcharge as well but the food quality seems pretty good. There is a taco tuesday deal for half off tacos which would be a pretty good deal.
There was multiple spots for free street parking a couple of blocks away though parking may be more difficult in the summer months","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhfZtGz6brML-kX-x3h0U3&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Pankaja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxhm0fG_wOv09GG2KNG2mF-hupJlcue5L30_IaXEyW5vktlRejcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stopped by Puesto in La Jolla and honestly it’s a pretty good spot overall.

We tried the al pastor chicken bowl and tacos both flavorful, well-seasoned, and satisfying without being too heavy. The 4-salsa chips were really good (loved the variety), though the portion size was a bit small for sharing.

The pistachio tres leches was a pleasant surprise soft, nutty, and not overly sweet. Perfect way to end the meal.
Drinks-wise, the cucumber margarita was super refreshing, light, and balanced
definitely recommend if you’re not into overly sweet cocktails.

Overall vibe: lively, modern Mexican with good flavors
Food: solid, tasty
Portions: slightly on the smaller side
Would I go again? Yes, especially for tacos + margaritas

⭐ Rating: 4/5

Perfect for a casual La Jolla meal when you want good food, fun drinks, and a nice atmosphere 🌴✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8W23p3u-2e-6w-9KVAECO&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Niharika Agrawal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOmni-TwkrqLDTZUQXQ5Bn5Z-OJZTTq722_uT090msdwzk5518=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food, service, vibe - all too notch! Abby was extremely nice and made the best suggestions. I’m a vegetarian and I had Calabacitas and I think they are the best tacos I have had in America. That with the Dirty Soda and pistachio tres leches just made up for an amazing taco Tuesday","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcC76RPWdGBAIeuR-BrEPP&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Char","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzlFe0iYrQTRDh9VGXwBY47PIFUSLwJRNrHtDziDjgb_5RJk0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was surprised by how good Puesto was, especially as a vegan. They actually have solid veggie options, which is not something you can always count on.
I ordered the calabasita and mushroom taco and it was flavorful and really well done. Fresh, balanced, and satisfying. My friend had the cantina chicken bowl and said it was full of flavor and really good as well.
The Cadillac margarita was excellent, smooth and strong. Definitely one of the better ones I’ve had. The staff at the bar was friendly and attentive, which made the experience even better.
The atmosphere was great too. Relaxed, welcoming, and a nice place to sit and enjoy your food.
Overall, Puesto delivered good food, good drinks, and a good experience. I’d absolutely go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRNzzpVEyJ5RJsEL8ZtFEd&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"John K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4_X7UO5IluBtaZPcLJ2MKwu-8g7IPa3Qjhob4SdL7d0W38PU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time trying Puesto and lucky us it was Taco Tuesday which is 50% off tacos. I was in the mood for fajitas but I was disappointed it was not on the menu. Excellent consolation was Taco Tuesday. We ordered chips and salsa. The chips are a little thicker and definitely not greasy. Thank you!
I ordered one chicken, one fillet mignon and one carnitas taco. I’m not a spicy loving person so I got all the sauces on the side. All three tacos are stuffed with meat on a blue tortilla. The tortillas are smaller than normal but it was stuffed full. The chicken was very tender and moist. The fillet mignon was tender and it had a nice char and smoked flavor. The carnitas taco was ok but not on the same level as the chicken and fillet. Excellent from everyone we encountered at the host stand and Devon our server. This restaurant has an upbeat vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzA7oI511Zt5bQY1ST21Hb&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"1 H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9iwNH4XxuXCaSCLMbjX3qqnjSL8eYZlXipz106_7Km9X351g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a great experience! I went here with my extended family and we had to wait outside to be seated for a time. However, they knew about this and were very apologetic. They were very nice about us having to wait. Our food was great and the aguas frescas were delicious too. And we loved it. Overall, it’s a nice and great restaurant in La Jolla and I’m glad that we went. Great experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAS343G1i5Cj3tRi-ERNk8h&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Roberto Hendy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxmmAyHC2H3iDDE5wiUuldfwKHbJkF5x-WoctnMXI3QcXQSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Warm welcoming atmosphere.  Knowledgeable wait staff.  Described food choices and offered suggestions based on our questions.  Salsa for initial chip basket was enjoyed by all four of us.  Flautas with chicken was flavourful.  Carne burrito was moist and seasoned well. Quac three flight was spicy, cheesy and traditional.   Ez parking on Wall Street at the time we were there.  Umbrella shades at every outdoor patio seating area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArn3Zu8oIFJEpwXWNaGpdx&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Julia Hoge (she/her/hers)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2h3O54HMRLSE3bxeaEGbv0Gitvcmaz2Bi_Nit0HUDlZ6k71tk6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this place so much that I make sure to stop by every time I’m in San Diego! The flavors and textures in the tacos are perfectly balanced! I also enjoy the salsa flight here. The chips are not bad, but could be a little higher quality to match the rest of the food here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAh1gdKpe6kR8mpwCGUwD9u&fid=0x0:0x14c8ad92c03aabc7"],"When":"2025-10-14"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Shayer S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKk4Fh-3LngZ6x3nZpURSI5Ke80GxvO4aB_PUVHN7N9qwHaEQP9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ate at El Pescador Fish Market and Restaurant while visiting the area and overall really enjoyed the food.

Ordered a few things. The halibut was very fresh with a nice charred grilled flavor and overall very tasty. Probably the best halibut we have had, though I still think I personally prefer swordfish. The veggies on the plate were refreshing.

I had the swordfish sandwich for $20.95 and it was excellent. I've always liked swordfish but this was next level. Charred on the outside, tender on the inside, and a great option if you do not like a strong fish flavor.

We also tried the 8oz chowder for $5.95. It was good, but I prefer the New England style more.

My son had the salmon kids meal for $15.95. It came with rice and beans and he finished it in minutes. I tried a bit myself and honestly could eat this salmon everyday.

You order at the front and the food is brought out to you. There is no real table service. It was pretty packed during late lunch. There is a very small parking lot in the back, maybe four or five cars, and otherwise there's street parking available.

It did feel a bit pricey but the food was fresh and delicious. I really loved the fish here and would definitely come back to try these flavors again. You can also buy fresh fish to take home, and it all looked great. The ambiance inside was nice. 4.5 rounded down.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtOyaSTRYTTzADLvKlXA24&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"john xanthopoulos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEw7sgtM2rgfaTBvXf7HvlaaU185wp1ZWrFaCa3Ek5Hc4HbpNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Pescador Fish Market is absolutely exceptional. The service is great, and the quality of the food is outstanding.

I’ve never been much of a fish person, but this place completely converted me. The seafood is unbelievably fresh and incredibly delicious—everything tastes fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared.

I’m still talking about it days later. If you’re in San Diego, this is a must-stop spot for seafood lovers (and future seafood lovers).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD17tHAZ76-Zosghl3E6ihh&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Such a fresh, vibrant spot! You can see the quality right in the seafood display. The salmon dishes were perfectly cooked , my kiddo loved theirs. My octopus was just a touch chewy, but the flavors were bright and real. It’s counter service, casual, and not pet-friendly, but fair prices and great freshness. Loved the vibe!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXBr6utUQGXj5vGi1CcnBy&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Lauren Carder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIaVRF6b4r395ls-PJBn4WOY4HcYtt95W9Mgln0nTulzMjouQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is awesome! The seafood is truly the star of the show in every dish you order. Super fresh (truly from the case) with a bunch of local fish options. The sandwiches are amazing- highly recommend getting them borrego style with avocado added. The watermelon lemonade can’t be missed and the fish tacos are huge and delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA2-AaWndOLdOaSM0-guLDY&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"A C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6ydNudJQIFvdRA42QGfP1XkLwyYqkB0cTdLROSGMhG2o8ZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite seafood restaurant in entire USA. I have been in at over dozen times from their original location cross the restaurant in 2012 and the current restaurant for many years.

Sean is a talented owner who puts out absolute delicious seafood and hospitality. If you like seafood get here!

Thanks Sean and the staff for many great meals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVJyIKyTyBophtOL4no0wX&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Cori James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhQ1dJGxareKOAbJts7qY8KHqeAOTxt4KuHDRv-2viRq3zln4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We love this place so much we got a rental car to make sure we could make it out here to enjoy they’re food! Everything we’ve ever had has been delicious! I got the Cioppino and oysters. Looking forward to our next visit when we come back to the San Diego area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZI03RMG5F4UcY1OGhB28M&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Rama S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKv8N84fId2vXSX2lYHhi9VPWG4b-ASgcqJNeJFPKNR65LjWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped in for a late lunch and this place was bustling. El Pescador is a fish market with a restaurant attached and plenty of seating.

I got a salad with fresh halibut, avocado and vinaigrette. The food was good—4/5. The halibut could use more seasoning, but overall it's simple, no-frills healthy food. The wait staff was very nice too.

Worth a visit if you want fresh seafood without any fuss.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_x2SRi8L9Snf6Zs4iMpGr&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Meagan L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLoSVv8nFo7QTtetkfSBTK8388hbgIZMet2s1QeHE0hmCI22Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have eaten here so many times but this is my first review. This place literally never fails. Let’s start with the oysters….only got 4 as a little app for myself but I seriously could have eaten 2 dozen. Currently regretting my decision as I devoured my 4 in about 60 seconds. And their mignonette is next level. If you like oysters, do yourself a favor and get these. I got the west coast ones but I’m sure the east coast ones are also FIRE. Moving on to my main dish, got the blackened/cajun salmon plate and this also was next level. Even the freaking side of veggies was amazing. It’s probably not the cheapest seafood in town but it is easily the best. Worth every penny.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMz7xEqBCst7iYeMxEmDVG&fid=0x0:0xa09e200ae3867a9e"],"When":"2025-11-8"}]

[{"Name":"Eddie Lieu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7EY1E6-JmLvO-FAFwQ8v05ZDaS5z41bKCkM3USF8ubLRBgmrX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited La Jolla on a Wednesday (3/27) afternoon.  Started to get hungry and was looking for a place to grab a bite to eat.  Found this place just a few blocks from where we parked.  From the outside, Public House La Jolla looks pretty chill with patio and interior dining.  We opted for seating on the patio.  Very cool spot that’s outside but also shaded.

Our server (Jasmine A) was fantastic!  She answered all our questions including my beer questions!  She was hospitable, polite, and friendly.  Her service is a solid 5/5!

We ordered the Mushroom Bacon Burger, Two Tacos, a Chicken Apple Havarti Sandwich, and Kids Chicken Strips.  Everything turned out very good.  My burger did turn out a little more well done than medium but still tasted very good.  The Chicken Strips unfortunately had more batter than chicken and was a bit on the oily side.  The fries were very good.  My beer (8 Bit IPA as suggested by Jasmine) was very very good.  Food overall is a 4.5/5.

Value to price ratio is probably a 3.5/5.  The food here is pricey for burgers, fries, tacos, and chicken strips.  Burgers will set you back about $20+ or more.  My burger was $24.  Tacos are about $10 each.  Beers are about $9.  Our total for 5 to dine here for lunch came out to about $162 with tax and tip.

Over all experience is here is about a 4/5.  If you decide to dine here, expect to pay a premium for the food but you won’t walk away hungry.  The portions should be large enough for just about anyone.  The beer is very good!  You do have to pay to taste test which was interesting.  Most other places will offer free taste test.  Service is very good.  Our server (Jasmine) was wonderful and made us feel comfortable.  Public House La Jolla tops my list of eateries and comes highly recommended if you’re looking for a place with good burgers, good beer, and quality service.

If you find this review helpful, please give the heart or thumbs up emoji reaction below!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD8fq5Gg&fid=0x0:0x3984a3546f56347c"],"When":"2024-3-29"},{"Name":"Brad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQETnLFd2uNHLM2Tf4yXZadG2OtkHQ3aQH_POAVKwpuuYYdyHBeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sat outside in a booth but their indoor and outdoor seating at the bar looked like a nice spot. Food tasted great. I had the PH Club with the chicken breast mixed in BBQ sauce.  Their flatbread pizza was delicious also.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIuOvEuQE&fid=0x0:0x3984a3546f56347c"],"When":"2025-3-30"},{"Name":"Christina Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiXy6nsf5njyZcKsMKIQSXLyJFBw-zNRbvOitcL3fb8lMBhYAs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Typical local pub. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jessica Lane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvScXReaKxz4LpJy9h1hWH_C5Abscp4S5UtGogzNYW5B2biQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My friend and I got here at a perfect time because the line became out the door shortly after we arrived! We sat at the bar waiting for our food, mouth watering because we could see how everything was being made from scratch. I got the Baja fish taco, the grilled shrimp taco, and the carne asada taco. When I sat down, I spotted the Al pastor meat on the spit, and I asked a worker there if that was the Al pastor, and she said yes. I told her “wow that looks really good” and she got me a free Al pastor taco! That was seriously the nicest thing and totally above and beyond! We talked for a little while and she ended up being the general manager there, and I watched her and the others work and they were all crushing it. All of the tacos I got were incredible and the sauces were amazing. My friend got the carne asada burrito, and the char on the carne asada meat was so freaking good. I’ll definitely come back here! Everything was fresh and the service was amazing! 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPFRD2FH2JKf02L4nHpeva&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"drawonnoodles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf11UYkDy4s7H23IC7lrH2Hpy31x0wm8c7I3GeDEUmwB7PJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There's way too much competition in San Diego to be standing in line for 40 minutes and waiting another 20 minutes for the food only to just barely get a table. However, this La Jolla and it's my first time trying this place. It's a very very solid spot for tacos especially for being a small chain, perfect no notes minus the service speed. The Baja fish tacos were an absolute stand out. The best taco here and might be the best fish taco I've had. The meats were good too but something about that Baja fish taco I will think about for a long time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwLzMHnZJfABVs4zBmA4Ae&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Heewon Haven Cha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9X5kM5MTmF7fclt7sl_OUOJ8ZBp6uUe8_5AHJllHeUmYih65J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by The Taco Stand in San Diego and it was awesome. I got the Carne Asada and Al Pastor tacos, and both were super flavorful and smelled amazing. They have a separate sauce bar so you can load up on salsa and toppings however you want, which I loved. I also grabbed some churros, and they literally fry them right in front of you. They were super crispy, warm, and crazy good. Definitely worth a visit if you’re nearby!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaXi3DcXoFZS7hvalJKvCl&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Kunal Chonkar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQo42DjGUzitcbh3WwZ4l8Op-o5se1_NNgoKvwgsOBdViuJ6M-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This might just be the place to experience truly authentic tacos. Every topping is available in unlimited portions, and each one tastes incredibly fresh, adding layers of flavour to every bite. The tacos I ordered were absolutely mouth-watering; perfectly prepared, vibrant, and bursting with freshness.

I would highly, highly recommend this spot to anyone who loves genuine Mexican flavours. Even the churros stood out; they were exceptionally soft, warm, and beautifully made.

One thing to keep in mind: each order comes with one taco. But trust me, the quality, taste, and freshness make every single one worth every penny.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6wM6gjrQyUJYC6KwzMXAp&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Amy Thurston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMrFpKaVlo0ac0Sf3Syw6ADYv1-EsjMQDp2bLIPeL6rEOE3Sf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Heard good things and decided to check it out- it was great! I got the burrito Al pastor, which is a filling burrito! We also got an order of churros which were perfect and a great price. Others got burrito carne asada, and fish taco and everyone said they were great. Make sure to get sauces while you wait for your food, I loved the salsa cilantro sauce and pickled onions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8HrwoQdg4u8_9V8lnKJVZ&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Luke Qian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlrgnXnV_r4xeXCS2Y265gb22q3fbZJv5fpzsWn-tXq8zVYeES=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We waited an hour and a half just to place an order at this location, and another 30 minutes for the food to be ready. The tacos are indeed delicious, but given its proximity to La Jolla, the wait can stretch far beyond what most diners might expect. Among the several tacos we tried, the carne asada stood out for its aromatic grill flavor and well-developed seasoning.

Operationally, the strain of high demand is hard to miss. Ingredient portions varied noticeably from taco to taco, and the salsa station had slipped into disarray by the time we reached it. The canned margaritas, overly sweet and priced well above their value, are an easy skip. Despite the food’s strengths, the management challenges make this an experience best approached with patience—and perhaps a backup plan.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKeYGKoeiMn0h8NsjaJk19&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Alexis Capati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-jriwtdnnkamuuLvR1CZNxrD9cD4cvi1uORZgryEnWhoZtA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Vibe: 6.5/10 - cool vibe, but note there is limited seating and seemingly no bathroom
Service: 8/10
Value: 8/10 - burritos are the best value items here!! Burritos range from ~$10-12, while tacos are ~$4-6 each.

Pescado taco: 7.75/10
Pescado burrito: 9/10 - very filling, yet lighter than the al pastor burrito
Al pastor burrito: 9/10

Overall: 8.04/10 (4.02/5)

[To clarify our review system:
10 = we’ll never have anything else as good as this in our lives (we use 10 very sparingly!)
9 = extraordinary
8 = great
7 = above average
6 = average
Anything below 6 is being critical]","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA89gH5JHUfsvKK_auPk-jO&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Sullivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBLgOe_M_NSifnGZpa0Pne831XZb7D93nSX5dLBG96PgENcYF3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stellar service. Scrumptious tacos. The beef taco blew my mind, high quality meat and perfectly seasoned with a generous scoop of fresh guacamole. The house made salsas here are incredible as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBdjUeTyqwW7tqoGwbusr9&fid=0x0:0x73529c9f616b883"],"When":"2025-10-23"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lisa Azure","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLclV_mbU1B5wLDNUrTJdWJ5_GbMG8TE8u5pW08Y9AD_BQiqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've been coming to this restaurant every year during our annual CA vacation since 2013 (shortly after it opened). Many of the menu items haven't changed and why should they when they're so delicious. The flavors that result from their combination of ingredients are phenomenal. There is honestly nothing on this menu that isn't good. The place is immaculate, the service is the best, the ingredients are top shelf, and the prices are reasonable. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfao50xnBo8UGWExiTLNHRFQZO5PZQQrc8OYRqWrnddoodqyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Promiscuous Fork is well-located in the Windansea neighborhood of La Jolla, just west of La Jolla High. Strengths include an easy going vibe, attentive and friendly staff, a sense of local community, decent parking , as well as a variety of dishes — and a most memorable business name. To be fair, I liked the food, and ordered the salmon bowl, but found there to be a bit too much rice. One personal suggestion would be for the rice to be less clumped up and fluffy. The tacos my companion ordered were similarly a little heavy on the rice side. Otherwise, a very good experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOFKLswe8wPGF-BgFM5qNd&fid=0x0:0xc7796ead6570229d"],"When":"2025-7-25"},{"Name":"Deana Chadwick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFa_nT8H66z0pz9cK24ytZOpHOuog8KojpSqgtJZcUar45-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family eats here often. There’s good variety and the quality of food is great. Tonight, the chef came out to ask how I wanted my salmon cooked. He was so sweet. I always love my meals here, but tonight was especially delicious. Thank you!!! And the woman who works the counter taking orders  is a fantastic face to the restaurant and  so friendly to all guests. Highly recommend! Quick, excellent food with a chill vibe.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julie C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw2UVSA077uEEr3QqSle61vZO4PKkW7jXPwgxKdu8e30eth8OYZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best dining experience in La Jolla! Phenomenal food and the service was top notch with the gal taking our order giving us great recommendations and provided good follow up service as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGEYZiTI4-OPkocn0hbEh5&fid=0x0:0xc7796ead6570229d"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Lanie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZPfAlhqJLnRzEPqcee1GZiraTyUvAoT9TjVuiDfBXaBPl9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve read so many great reviews and I can confidently say, this place lives up to the hype. Very diverse menu - definitely meat-heavy which I love. We ordered the lamb lollipops, notorious P.I.G., and the fork’n chicken sandwich. Everything was outstanding. The fries were slightly dry which I why I couldn’t give it the full 5 stars but other than that, amazing. Can’t wait to try the poke bowl next!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDH6ZCeDQ&fid=0x0:0xc7796ead6570229d"],"When":"2024-9-17"},{"Name":"HollyM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNM4-ydfcatZFeslZvt0-tCFytGMR-4rQA7aZkpq9K6aU5FAY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dined outside with family, party of 4 and we all loved our food. The fries are great and sandwich portions are very generous. I couldn't finish mine! Friendly service, very reasonable wait for food. The only rice option is coconut- jalapeño, so right away 3 of the 4 in my party weren't interested in that flavor combo.

Pup friendly.

Do be aware of very limited seating options indoors, so you might need to call if your party needs to be indoors. Tables outside are high, so not a wheelchair accessible option.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDrhKLfmAE&fid=0x0:0xc7796ead6570229d"],"When":"2024-7-14"},{"Name":"Megan DeRemer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRGoKIgY3YmlgKkD1MVzWjRTXjUujNvoJylrqjW_drBQV0dy4N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really awesome staff and tasty food! I wish they had more variety of types of seating, as my aunt visits there a lot and she struggles with barstools. Maybe some regular chairs would be a good addition. Next time we're in La Jolla we'll be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIwZ2qMg&fid=0x0:0xc7796ead6570229d"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"Swoop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5ffY_oGO-aKKsjPD5sGvnBOzhktMHYw3TGb9LaHM6wlRF9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Food is so bland and tasteless. Seating is incredibly uncomfortable and cramped. Service is quite deplorable. DO NOT RECOMMEND
The La Jolla plate was the most disgusting thing I have ever tried. Chicken was not cooked thoroughly yet still rubbery. Rice was bland. Mac and cheese was viscous and disgusting. Everyone in my party tried it and found it nasty. Every food item is horrible here. But especially,  DO NOT GET THE LA JOLLA PLATE.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4EtMRVacgx55vu2F6D0TQ&fid=0x0:0xc7796ead6570229d"],"When":"2025-7-29"}]

[{"Name":"Bob Gregitis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWharWlwS-4EnbyAGGr7cJGN6lUoRMhrUAgEJXBr-tYRgX3d4dC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stopped here for a late lunch, it’s a very relaxed vibe with lots of tables or a bar to sit at, it also has some tables on the street.

A great selection of beers and there is so much to choose from on the menu. Service was excellent and very attentive.

Vegetarian options were good for my wife and daughter on the menu as well. My wife had the mac & cheese, I had the steak which was cooked perfectly. My son had a hotdog which he said was the best he’s had so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7sZHquv7Qx11hiDkFq26x&fid=0x0:0x4c8f254d035741d6"],"When":"2025-7-16"},{"Name":"Alexandra Guay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoiAjKXzCOwE00Wdv3zrSpuEmEaZdBM1YKIo_0NaGL1nksUzZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great vibes all around and the service was excellent! Would definitely come again! We recommend the potato skins, they were delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAH7gAnLGpj-gnwnwkE8dbO&fid=0x0:0x4c8f254d035741d6"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Malaysia Neal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXeotbj18Anon64Da60qKdRSF-vVs_ZCwkQjYYjrTtw0YgdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t even know where to begin…. I came in today with my daughter & sister and there was a ROACH IN HER SALAD!! Like literally running around her salad and she didn’t notice until after a few bites 🤮🤮🤮🤮on top of a disgusting insect being in our food, before we could even place our order the waitress, Sally I believe her name was, was extremely unpleasant and unwelcoming. I have worked in the hospitality industry for a long time and I would never in life treat a customer/family how we were treated. Her attitude was if taking our order was a bother and nuisance. Completely off putting when intending on having a nice family dinner in a beautiful location. When alerted about the insect, the reaction was completely underwhelming. I felt as if this situation was not handled in a serious manner and quite frankly I am very disappointed as well as my daughter was having to leave her food untouched and leave hungry. This is unacceptable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3EDk0765m9H_jXf6moGt3&fid=0x0:0x4c8f254d035741d6"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"David Ellicott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKMuUCCGFXUba0oDU1Fup4roqX4gXN2kt4FlTpPncTXPCLKWl3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to grab a beer and watch a game!. Really friendly staff and very accommodating to put on what you want to watch.

Update: went back for dinner, my daughter had the beach bowl with shrimp and said it was very good, I had the Bleu Lamb Burger and quite honestly the best I have ever had!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjOp-MB0Iu8Wf1vsC_ZA8X&fid=0x0:0x4c8f254d035741d6"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Rich The King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN-xcGb5VCY8JL2bl6W13qAGzWAj2Ie96YUnDdXLydFVIT4yqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to eat and watch sports.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mike Sperando","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_en4hstmxQlXEez9ODYd4-J_QV5-fzf9jhq4e4RBikF-eflXL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited George’s at the Cove in La Jolla and had a great experience overall. The location is absolutely stunning, offering beautiful ocean views right from your table, especially if you manage to get a window seat as I did.

I booked my reservation on the same morning around 8 or 9 a.m. and was surprised to find availability for a 12:45 p.m. lunch. Although there was some construction noise on the top deck, the staff accommodated my request to sit by the window and enjoy the view.

The food itself was great; I started with the salmon tartare and had rockfish tacos for lunch. The service was good- and the overall atmosphere was very enjoyable. I’d definitely recommend George’s at the Cove to anyone visiting La Jolla for the first time who’s looking for a great meal with a fantastic coastal view.

For those concerned about local wildlife smells, I personally didn’t notice any issue with sea lions during my visit, so it was a non-factor. Overall, a great spot for lunch with a view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYAfYqwQN4igucbQcQzc-F&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Haylee Jane Monteiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4F6GmFKEiNWrzo0vPgBuUR_Cl9LqyfsnuPuZFB3oLMLipcJNuMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would give them 6 stars if I could!

Came here for our wedding anniversary dinner and they definitely made it very special. They knew it was our anniversary so they upgraded us to the terrace seating and even brought champagne on the house.

Servers were quite nice and prompt to check on us, asking if we needed anything and if the food was good. General manager also came and stopped by our table twice and was quite a gem to talk to.

Portobello Mushroom - just wow!
I was not expecting to have loved this so much! Mushroom cap was perfect and went so well together with that Thai sauce and those shishito peppers! And oh gosh, even those cashews on the side had some flavor of their own. What a lovely combination here!

Salad - could be better.
Really love the concept of the pair and the blue cheese and the hazelnut, but that cabbage was actually quite a lot in volume and a bit too wrong and crunchy and some pieces were also fairly bitter. I think if the base was mostly mixed greens with a little bit of cabbage, this with salad would have been next level!

Chicken - 10/10
What an absolutely beautiful dish! That chicken was cooked so so so perfectly soft and there was that avocado salsa on the side and that creamed corn and the squash. And oh my goodness me!  Have everything together and one bite and it's a burst of flavor and texture in your mouth and it was just so so good! 🤌🏻
Only downside is that the piece of chicken was quite small like I think it was a quarter chicken instead of a half chicken like we were expecting.

Side of Grilled Chicken
Order this because there was two little chicken in the entree. Chicken was quite generally cooked and quite a large piece of chicken breast which actually also came on some pasta so they don't serve it plain. Very nice gesture. The pasta itself was extremely oily though, so we didn't really have any of it.

Banana Sticky Toffee dessert - speechless!
Everything was just beautiful on this plate. Really really soft sticky toffee pudding and then the bananas on top had that caramelized crispness on top like you get on a creme brulee. That ice cream had a lovely flavor of its own and then there was the sesame crisp thing and the little crunch on the side.. just wow!

Definitely recommend this place for a good date night!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVCg2aw-JcMRMQXupo46LJ&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Nicholas Stevenson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJrSguNnpCfdIWFghfqGKzaxpD_fRkOcIfNCvO9FYJhrU9h-DU6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want to enjoy a delicious meal overlooking an absolutely stunning ocean view then make a reservation at George’s at the Cove

We were lucky to snag a table just at the edge of the upstairs balcony,  but to be honest, when you’re up there, there really isn’t a bad seat. Even aside from the incredible views, the rooftop restaurant offered a solid ambiance/vibe. The decor, fixtures, bar, etc were all trendy and clean

The staff were great. We didn’t have to wait long to be seated, we ordered almost immediately, and our food came out in a timely manner. We also sat and enjoyed the views and conversation a bit after we finished eating, and our server came by to check on us but we never felt pressured to leave

The menu offers something for everything. We shared the rock fish tacos and their burger. Both were hearty and very flavorful. I would also recommend the chips and guacamole/salsa. I didn’t love the salsa flavor, but the guacamole was solid

Some tips:
Definitely consider making a reservation and ask if you can request a table that overlooks the water. There is only street parking and garage parking. We circled around a few times before parking at the nearby parking garage. But be warned, it’s $30 to park there. But after you eat, walk down to the cost and explore the La Jolla cove, the sea caves, see the seals, and explore some of the parks along this scenic stretch of coastline

Cheers!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzl-UaFs3DFOABOC7pDBqs&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Jie-Wei Wu (Jie-Wei Wu)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqHzyCZHsz6RNqctg3MItuo2jkA9zF8fXrnXTlwfQMFcFnOkrG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service was good and the staff was friendly. However the $44 flat iron was a disappointment. It was not tender and even bitter because of overcooked and black surface. The $38 pork was also a bit salty. The taco was good though. Overr food quality did not meet my expectations of a high end restaurant with good sea view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArruUJDn_P2xzuC5jwNHQE&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Ella Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW46ztq2Pc89_-r0lUZl0DZb6lxuMIr5KvodvjiWy8U_ZCtKkBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’m not a local from San Diego. The two times I visited this place, everything was underwhelming from service to food.

1. Food - Salmon from the main entree, is not properly seasoned. I guess it is cooked thoroughly, but I am not tasting any seasoning other than bland potatoes and some dill. $38 for mediocre food is just really not worth it.

2. Additional Service fee of 5% is just unacceptable. I’m not sure why some restaurants in San Diego charge 5% of your total bill.

3. Views are great.

4. Please locals drop some good food recommendations. I’m so tired of bad restaurants in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_uxWv9ujIdUAd1t8wibmG&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"rohan tibrewala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi4YamSdkMJWyclDIjWe7qeyn2gO5fa8BBvEXpGMzovr0rgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Go for the view, food maybe!
They have the right combinations, right ideas however food sometimes felt like it missed the mark. Cocktails are decent. I would recommend the spicy pina margaritas and you cannot go wrong with the watermelon feta salad.
Optimally priced for California standards.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDx6nIFRXUtWs2FDVNzIIvg&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Cheryl Fordham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUto-VERm9qOatuGJ70CDzLK7OCXLg-U95AXjN5n5VZmwYe_7kz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Always enjoying George’s and this time was great as well. We always order the Famous Soup. Cocktails were wonderful and chocolate desert was fantastic. View doesn’t disappoint. However, the city really needs to clean the pelican droppings from the cliffs below, the smell is out of control. Thank goodness the wind changed before our food arrived.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQ44SkLUgYI5_kdF_Mcw5r&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Maria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdI46QxRb819KpNeubsmPxZGVMusDXXyba7Ciq8srMG3NY6n9pbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing view of the beautiful ocean and what a sunset!!! The option to dine out is perfect! Bring a coat but their heat appliances are good.
The food is delicious. I had of course the meat it was so tender, filling and well cooked.
Creme brulee did not disappoint plus that side cookie...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_tA3bfamLLrXdM2ymbcXL&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-10-9"}]

[{"Name":"Audri Beach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVttIa1kaaPN94BWc5ejnNG0iuVIVM7ck0m-OwbKVMDzNnDOq1x=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SO GOOD. I ordered the stone grab Benedict which had a good portion of crab, the potatoes were delicious, and the green chile sauce had so much flavor. We also ordered the crème brûlée French toast (superb) the mermaid drink was super refreshing. Will absolutely be back on our next trip! 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWNy1yNAsYZFMkIiDKlM3e&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Omayra Colon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQBC9_wCBq2NkeDPuS36CW_xTzB5BsJqSIlA5ogBcWSzdcOqUr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went for brunch with my mom & sisters after seeing the Sea Lions.  Great location & no wait.  We shared the Chilaquiles, French Toast & the Traditional Benny.  I also tried the Little Mermaid drink, it had some sparkling water or sprite which I wasn't expecting but it was still good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAG2oZd8bZ8NQmTswixg980&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Melia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXja4ydA2CmRwCvm4rrxH1gbtk9NWpC1qYcsV-ZaeSjfUt1SSN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brunch with a viiiiew. Came here for our anniversary weekend in La Jolla and we were so glad to have picked Cove House. Ordered the Traditional Benny and subbed out for waffle fries which was a great choice (duh). Also ordered the Seasonal French Toast and it was delicious. I was worried it would be mushy from the sauce but the texture was silky and indulgent. Mmm thick bread! The atmosphere was very open-air and breezy and we didn’t have to wait long for a table. Tough to find parking in this area (especially on the weekends) but just keep driving in loops until someone leaves. If you’re looking for a yummy, filling, pretty brunch spot in La Jolla, pick Cove House! Walk around the cove afterwards to see the marine life and ocean views.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDghZiuGuLePJ1Z9AhaqlO&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Seanna Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRWCuJ-0OMRf4A4oJaskvq4MwRnIeAxE3j_B8-0_oH_wT4lA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute little eatery close to the cove. We ordered a spritz, the morning joe martini, the salmon avocado toast and a prosciutto benny. Service was very fast, our food arrived within ten minutes and the drinks even shorter. The space inside is a little cramped, definitely try to shoot for the outdoor seating for coastal views. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a reasonably priced and quick place to stop in and eat around the buys La Jolla area","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUtiPj80zrBAcXkOb_X28v&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Joaquin Lippincott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJWmjOXs5eL2sT1vWv_Adr00mpBAnsh2UlNPEjWJMiEEdDDPE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Breezy and light, with a view of the ocean, Cove House is exactly what people want and expect from La Jolla—but is almost impossible to find.

If you are a breakfast lover like me, you can get brunch until 3pm (at least on weekends).

Don’t expect to find parking (there is none). And they don’t do reservations, but you can get the full menu at the bar and if you arrive before 10am, you’ve got a good shoot of finding a seat or two. Dress warmly (hoodie or sweater) as a lot of what you will find is outdoor seating and it can get chilly by the beach.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIPM7NNH8uUre5KUt9-f8n&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Anton S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWwYyXm9QC53xdcYQo-cbblrDEM65S8LQ4a-wTQnPh1lJMK5pA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You come here for the atmosphere and friendly service. Great brunch spot near La Jolla park. Wouldn’t highlight the food - very average taste. But the vibes are top!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMrecUIHjhoznJabni92UO&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Lana Eilertson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUf6quZCd5Q0QPdLkg0MUVxizdm43pNRGJhrO5XpjI_MV75DPta=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous food with a great view. Absolutely think the crème brûlée French toast might be the best thing I’ve eaten in my life.
Hubs LOVED the traditional benny, and my picky 10-yr-old is still raving about the chick’n’toast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAlGOiedNVceEdDHE123rx&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Lauren & Santiago Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVar0iTBzvIUC7fEKKaYPI3YOXI1R8FbGaqxBdhf1JINVKa9Gb1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Casual no frills spot with great food and service. We had the loco moco and stone crab Benny. Pretty view of the ocean from the patio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-Ubcvwadd4WKgzLzmlh9W&fid=0x0:0xa7262764d2da672e"],"When":"2025-12-17"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chris Portillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbIWDpxIGfH-g5KoFBzTK6gP4GfpqYxpk9tILh5VcWxr7F6Cd8Hw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at Lucrezia was an absolute delight, thanks to the exceptional service provided by Jacob and Manuel. From the moment we arrived, they made us feel welcomed and cared for, striking the perfect balance of professionalism and warmth.

✨ Service
- Jacob and Manuel were attentive without being intrusive.
- Every detail was handled with care, from recommendations to timing of courses.
- Their genuine hospitality elevated the entire experience.

🍴 Food Highlights
- Tomahawk Steak: Cooked to perfection—juicy, flavorful, and beautifully presented.
- Lychee Martini: Refreshing and elegant, the perfect complement to the meal.
- Brussels Sprouts: Crispy, savory, and addictive—an unexpected star of the evening.
- Fresh Bread: Warm, fragrant, and a comforting start to the meal.

🌊 Atmosphere
- The setting in La Jolla adds to the charm, with a refined yet relaxed ambiance that makes every occasion feel special.

⭐ Overall
Jacob and Manuel turned a great dinner into a memorable experience. Their outstanding service, paired with Lucrezia’s incredible food, makes this restaurant a must-visit in La Jolla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCn0jrH2x2a0TsZae41GxkD&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Yesenia Nunez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFrAjgwFZFYmLPumsnXmswLsRbXwflKTqB8mQ54fsBYlAH4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was our first time coming to this restaurant, our server Diana was amazing! She kept coming back making sure we were good. Def coming back here! A pianist was playing, lovely atmosphere and everyone was so nice!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOiL-WaoLwCG2SKZSo8Wbj&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"HG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVA7gbpgwrG_NN1NFZUJ7JZ4tVBJjH-ye5ejmQV8y4Z3W91A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommended for happy hour!HH martinis for 12-14 dollars, strong pour and well made. We tried the tomatini (interesting and not as weird as it sounds lol), como cosmo, and the old fashioned. Fries were solid. They gave some complimentary cheese and olives. The service was a bit slow, which is to be expected for handcrafted cocktails (but something to be aware of if you’re on a time crunch). The restaurant itself is beautiful and cozy too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAodP8Qy6keMt3nUEOSoePx&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Ben Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb85qHkcnY7lPomPXL0NLZTCSyLXQYv5Gwfz7Xq6fvg6bhA_E8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pizza, great drinks. The service was kind and attentive. Lovely atmosphere, too. I'd definitely love to come back sometime.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHalRyzoI45ruzOKEn0D5z&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Robert Tendick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvbl75V1KMHdagj7cAMhGVAR5UsIkn550iVcjH7uwNwxb_SxFc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great meal here today for the first time. Service was on point. Food was great. We ordered the special, which was fresh made fettuccine with cacio e pepe sauce and lobster. Simply perfect. Serving size was plenty but my mouth wanted so much more. We started with a tall pour of barrolo which was so tasty; medium bodied with a light black pepper on the finish. Italian chopped salad was as good as you’d expect from a top tier Italian restaurant. The octopus salad was probably my favorite dish of the meal. Octopus was super tender and the green beans and salad that accompanied it was fantastic. Additionally, we ordered the lamb chops which were grilled perfectly and the heirloom tomatoes on the side were incredibly tasty, even though it’s January. Was it an expensive meal? Of course, but it’s UTC and you know what you’re signing up for. 5-star meal in a lovely atmosphere","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Hutton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTUTXTVLVoVIAW8YlP82CesNESGoMJ_bmXd4Fyzzrm-7jDsTIP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an outstanding dinner at Lucrezia La Jolla. From the oysters and Nostra Caprese to the grilled lamb chops, every dish was both beautiful and flavorful. Our server, Emmanuel, was attentive and fun, and manager Ramon made the evening feel personal. We ended with espresso martinis and heavenly tiramisu—the perfect finish to a perfect night. We’ll definitely be back. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlF5I7cDZPn3I1lm4aLQYi&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Celine Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlx8W4S7dPbQCC_JlxY9Z3KI3pcNYqWZehqS_e3Dp-s9oBmnEddg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tonight’s dinner was absolutely stunning! The lamb chops were tender, the filet mignon was juicy, and the spicy olives with cherry tomatoes made for a flavorful starter. Even the kids finished their pizza to the last bite! We ended with the perfect scoop of ice cream. Highly recommend this place!

It was my little baby second birthday today, and surprisingly, there were so many other birthday celebrations too! The restaurant even brought out a sweet little dessert with a candle—such a thoughtful touch. The atmosphere was so warm and joyful that even strangers joined in to say, “Happy Birthday!”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZDEXhQUQ0ijr8oO-iqLyU&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Alex Henningsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxMrE1Y6s7RMJM5EwJysu1N-tbpgGF248emvGCFvg2PfhIofC02g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Spent $288 here on Saturday. Had drinks, oysters, and pasta. It’s unfortunate that the food is only 3/5! It’s a beautiful restaurant but there are some much better Italian places in little Italy. Try Bencotto or  Monzu","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvQy7GABQergD1Khlj-cHT&fid=0x0:0xe216013aaf7714c8"],"When":"2026-1-26"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Pokemon Mom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNp7Ds-0AkJWGJdTphUpyvWO8PkK69oFan1HRTQkLe12biWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A group of us went based in a recommendation of a friend for a special occasion.  We ordered the whole grilled octopus, house ceviche, grilled cauliflower and wine.  All the food came out nicely.  Nothing spectacular but decent.  The service was friendly.  Waiter was pretty busy and the place was full so we had to wait, remind him for refills and grab his attention.  It was a chilly day so all of us opted for hot water.  The waiter was helpful getting us the water which took a while but failed to mention it was $3.50 for each tiny teacup, even after getting multiple refills no mention of the cost.  It was also not stated on the menu how much hot water cost.  We were surprised when the bill came with water being one of the larger line items in our bill.  Left a pretty sour taste in our mouths in what was otherwise a decent meal.  Parking not easy in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQScwmVVM1QrFnnowbqi67\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Dave Bledin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9atFRjk4ay92wkjtWUwZtZrHCIinZUh5-HVLrLq8UolCzyx55=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional. Anybody who doesnt give this place 5 stars is totally unreliable and not to be trusted. Great service, every dish was the best version of itself. Snapper tostada, soft shell crab taco, grilled shrimp main... All excellent. Sad I didn't get to try the octopus but next time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2GgZKDAz1qR6g22AcCRDk\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Musy Castellanos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2BJp9UVhAONTi9juN6ACEyJI7IBrJRLw_Njpy3H9AyBnRKSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have so many things to say about this place. I'll start by saying the place is beautiful, every detail of its decor, its wallpaper, the bar, its cups... everything is absolutely gorgeous and designed to perfection. The food is extremely delicious! Each dish has an explosion of incredibly delicious flavor. There's no doubt that the chef and everyone who works there know what they're doing... My husband and I tried several dishes and all of them were super delicious. Last but not least, the service. I want to emphasize that the service is extraordinary. Yesterday, a young man named Samuel served us at the bar. His service was so wonderful... he was so kind, attentive, and friendly. He explained each dish, each sauce, the history of the restaurant, and chatted with us a lot. He truly is a lovely person. I recommend this place because even though I pay attention to every detail, it has become one of my favorites in California. Excellent place!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhConRNwvnDSc8E_p8mZ-DKP\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Adrien Dion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMvhixdRoSV8NTAcWzJ_hdgCYKdVXSIe5WLTiqRAzKfRo-kRi-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Unpretentious, un-apologetic, and not your typical Mexican cuisine in the US.  Experience the raw bar, the tacos and especially the chowder.  Pictures is the soft shell crab taco which is the perfect taco in flavor, texture, and experience.  This is a must stop and hands down best taco in La Jolla.  Thank you chefs, thank you front of house.  It was an amazing experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRQAUck_MQ-4CW09hHs_I1\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Will Correa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTN9LiIkcEG3M1iA1dq45ssuEFt4FeuWgI6WWPpD_alC8tJumH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To be clear this is mainly a Mexican Seafood restaurant. None the less, they did have 1 non-seafood option in the Burrito and it was pretty good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbIA1X98E3h4-jK0vXUzcB\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Angelina Sam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2XbyV-T6_N2-BH67ootIiQoxi_hg0Yug5xxLCHfoBEOQ9oLrTGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Died and gone to ceviche heaven! So fresh, perfectly balanced ceviche. Lovely service. Definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1iX5OXLX__MQKzIko0htt\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Mikhail Ivankov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqvz1SHIdW_9upe3gTBCb6uFsSh4DIwWNpXV6g8GogTHjxvNjD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Getting from Tijuana to Los Angeles I stopped at this cozy cute restaurant where I ordered Tijuana Burito, these were two huge mouth-watering pieces with a cup of coffee. Great taste and cozy atmosphere, perhaps the two most important components of a quiet pastime. And of course, nice and unobtrusive service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKeoo8Krh_SUCQ\u0026fid=0x0:0xb2ae900bc6caa113"],"When":"2025-6-14"},{"Name":"Cheryl Portscheller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZCgHiiyUuyryugh3MafouhCDUqquQhGTNEphpIZXULotontU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was the best meal we had while in San Diego.  Originally planned to go to the sandwich shop just down the road but they were closed.  My husband had the La Corriente burrito and he could finish it. My friend and I shared the Octopus Chicharron. The guacamole served with the Chicharron was really good. The restaurant was nicely decorated and service was great.","Images":null,"When":""}]
