user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rylie Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtflwwMvMoslYxPnnmrfofyq_kjI18k221ohyuP0KlHS-KokvdUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Not even being dramatic this was top 3 meal of my LIFE. Cannot stop thinking about how good each bite was - absolute perfection. Tuna crudo and brassicas salad with persimmon jam was life changing for real !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCkTuhCbqRiegwKdz7huxwC&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Shanelle S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUbP0i_x-bGrMsR_tyYd_9JDDyHbkLR988uT7I8cyuK_slYZo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Michelin Guide recognized restaurant located inside the Grande Colonial Hotel. Had a reservation for five on a Sunday for brunch and were seated immediately. It’s $10 for valet parking when you dine at the restaurant, and you need to show your restaurant receipt when picking up the car. We ordered the octopus, sourdough bread, a pecan sticky bun, and tuna crudo for starters.  The octopus came with potatoes and a cheese sauce that was tasty. The tuna crudo came in 6 pieces and I liked the citrusy dressing. The pecan sticky bun was a sleeper hit (the candied pecans were particularly good); I only wish that the coffee machine was working so we could’ve had a latte on the side to accompany it.  My entree, I had the huevos rancheros. It was quite filling and I took half home for leftovers. We rounded out the meal with the half baked chocolate cake, which had the consistency of a molten lava cake soaked in ice cream - definitely split this with other people. Our waitress was very nice and the vibes were chill.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAarhICXZ8cw56j22Y29COj&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-8-11"},{"Name":"Nancy Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1WECliwwsmgipR6N28_6Hd8vphlpbGplrxc_0LFe8Blt1Y4TPcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is absolutely amazing and you can tell that the chef truly loves what he does. Every bite is filled with refreshing flavors and each dish sparks a memory","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7_qchqmBXrM62N07kllAK&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Qc Yong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsPiq9Ry9WYP98L1XwJ_SrULwtaI4tlx-NFfKOj1cXzaMOdOI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was pretty good, although kind of standard brunch, but we could taste some differences in terms of paying attention to the details. Too bad, only breakfast menu was available","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOYGu9xmHWeZqgiolhZJht&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Rina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkCvzF10p5M8FaZcu0kuNwJEOZzKnIEjfUQvoV56AyUbZE1Qqz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The restaurant had a sophisticated interior with a stylish, upscale atmosphere—perfect for a nice night out. The ambiance had a great start-of-the-night vibe, making it an enjoyable dining experience.

The fish dish was incredibly fresh and flavorful, which made it a standout. The steak was also well-prepared and satisfying. Overall, a great spot for both seafood and steak lovers. Would definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwt4aQ3wE&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-3-28"},{"Name":"Roderick Luna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxEu3XC15D_pI7eMNWBTUZ1xGIUd80PVu3V_IsdsxqTjDh31ozrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an incredible experience at Nine Ten Restaurant tonight! We indulged in the tasting menu, and every dish was absolutely delicious. Our server, Jose, was fantastic—super attentive and friendly. He made sure we had everything we needed and provided great insights about each course. The whole team was on point, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. I can’t wait to come back! Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw6MbQ9wE&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-3-23"},{"Name":"j h","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIN9ZViDgX-5uA7HNrzh69eVwxlCeboE8vEpC8KNvZD0JVtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is not a typical restaurant connected to a hotel!  Do not skip it and assume it's a basic spot to eat.  This award winning restaurant is so good, we ate here five times on our trip - which we never do.

Everything is made in house - from the pastrami to the Cacio E Pepe spaghettini.  The flavors here were so familiar, but you could tell they were made with love and thoughtfulness.  The most amazing thing we ate all week was the short rib toast with mornay sauce!  You can only get it on weekends and only at brunch.  The short rib is so good, we were hoping it would be on the dinner menu - but that's how much care they put into their menu- they are making short rib from scratch - just for weekend brunch.  If you are a savory fan, this is one of the best things served on Prospect Street.  Second savory delight would be the jerk pork belly - flavors you rarely taste together, but oh so good!

The service was also top notch - Alex, Pablo and Shelly took very good care of us and always had great recommendations for each meal.

You can sit inside, on the busy Prospect St. patio, or on the back patio, with partial ocean views.  There is street parking around the area and $10 valet for the restaurant.  Please take care of the valet guys too - they deliver old school service, which is so hard to find these days.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw2r7e-wE&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-3-25"},{"Name":"Frank O'Connor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV35NTMme8xK-M20lNvZ4g5F54lIlPx6TtHvG33t9dslOP5xzl61g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Inattentive service at best. Had at least 3 or 4 waiters take orders or bring food. Never heard a name and most items including the check were silently dropped off and picked up. The food however was certified delicious and well presented. The burger may seem like a “low end” menu item but it was excellent. And lots of add-ons can be had. The truffle fries are really good too. The lamb loin was a small portion but so tender and juicy and flavorful. It’s a very creative menu but they’re also really good with working around allergies. The ambiance is very nice, it’s a hotel lobby restaurant however so it’s small. But it wasn’t overly loud and the high ceilings and nice bright colorful artwork make sitting in it feel calm and relaxed. Valet parking was 10 dollars and those gentleman were very warm and welcoming. 2 staircases down to the restrooms.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwzJ6GLQ&fid=0x0:0xdaecc929b6cc1b0f"],"When":"2025-3-24"}]

[{"Name":"Joshua Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIhJC7_YGKedtLWUdZsnhnpFsFiX4dNImR5cbox9js6OzfPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here during happy hour on a work trip. The staff was incredibly friendly and even taught me how to eat my first oysters!

It was a little quiet when I was there, having some beer on tap would be a cool addition. The food was delicious though! The octopus ceviche was coated in a pretty sweet sauce, so be ready for that if you order it. The spanish octopus, oysters, and churro were outstanding! I will visit again next time I’m in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCiM7mKvtr6qsryDBu71i2y&fid=0x0:0xe365f149609f8f82"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Marc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSB1RodTtLh1JsorIfyYcQDbQSq9RwMWG3LtitigKYbUEhr5h9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The owner Christophe and his wife are just the cutest. Service was impeccable, food well portioned and exquisite! Give one of the amazing cocktails a try while sitting on the balcony. We‘ll definitely be back! The best spot on our vacation so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSaFlEx5ANHqHj4t54L2D-&fid=0x0:0xe365f149609f8f82"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Chelsea Rae Kent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpcZuKqW5fRKFRNb5HqOLGOEqIIiOP8TrB7mcuKYz393hWwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My partner and I went for their happy hour and the drinks were unique and delicious! The sensory overload cocktail comes with an experience all on its own. Our server was also personable, attentive, and kind. The vibes were great overall!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqusw7yr3QDKoBE9UW7Vo1&fid=0x0:0xe365f149609f8f82"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Portiva Portiva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm8Jrogrkql9d4nJpGoHyZxhK_ijBs6nLeFtahs7ALj5luodb0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a fantastic experience at this restaurant. The owner and his wife were incredibly friendly, offering a warm and proper greeting at the entrance. The service was excellent throughout, and everything was delivered with genuine smiles from both the owner and the staff.

The food quality was generous and delicious, with a great variety of choices. The sandwiches were especially tasty, and the drinks and coffee were excellent as well. We also learned that the owner is a knowledgeable French foodie, which adds a subtle and enjoyable French touch to the menu.

The atmosphere is one of the highlights—beautiful ocean views, fresh air, and an elevated location above the street that provides scenic views and reduces traffic noise. Overall, this is a must-visit spot when you’re in the La Jolla area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tu Ngo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6lnkQEH5f9aU7kKQQPVHLcAq6gBPDMUNPPhWBqkO6uEVC5J4iMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food and great service. The ceviche was spicier than expected but it was good. Will be back to try more dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCiK5bSkH6kLsGJgjpLTSbp&fid=0x0:0xe365f149609f8f82"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Amari Moran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8G99JJllHo0yk7vGwSuu21UaMuYEYJx_AkTsK2fTNqWnjJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a great experience, great vibes, loved the music, staff was amazing very cooperative, couldn’t have asked for a better night. Absolutely loved the crab cakes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN1BVWP-Fqyx7uS3Eoarsr&fid=0x0:0xe365f149609f8f82"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Dora K.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiomSaO72MlXcC4L5a98jfBU9-M9K_oa_AQSN2rBv9QuPLd3X6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It's called Mediterranean, but it lacks Mediterranean dishes.

Prime beautiful location, great drinks and questionable brunch menu and food. It explains why it is empty during brunch time at 1-3 pm !

I ordered octopus ceviche and had to return it as it was impossible to eat. It was fully covered in a ketchup-like sauce.

Lamb gyro was ok, lacked some flavor and Mediterranean seasonings.

My fiance had some brioche bun sandwich and loved it.

This place has a lot of potential, but it needs a new chef and a new menu, someone who has real experience with Mediterranean food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAd1E3RmWyYgf4JE5EOeNQZ&fid=0x0:0xe365f149609f8f82"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Jim Oppenheim (Opp)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4OQMSGWLVSvt75Ws9gzbzLnsvZeJ_n-0M9wDM0e-4aiSX-k4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The hostess/manager was excellent. She seems to be the glue holding it all together.
The service was good.
The food was not good. My wife had a salad drenched in dressing. It probably would have been a good salad with half the dressing. My wife’s cioppino soup had no fish and a couple mussels and a few clams and the bread was greasy. My seafood risotto was dry Arborio rice with very little seafood. There were four mussels, two of which were not opened. The manager did bring me half a dozen nicely cooked mussels to make up for it. Overall the meal was disappointing. The cocktails and the wine were excellent. They were the highlight of the evening.
The restaurant was very nice. We liked the ambiance.
We won’t be giving it another chance.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ethereal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOCA31i_NnvTjxCpghd8ichKEqCkguEkOoH-WsPZutdS1cyCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I usually wait until I get home to write reviews, but wow!!!  This couldn’t wait. The food at The Cottage is absolutely delicious and full of flavor. They even served a warm scone with fresh jelly, which was such a nice surprise. Simple, comforting, and truly memorable. Definitely coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhACskiBumWvFM9o0IulPQmi&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"the_moonglade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpMBzSqyXEzLhn9sU0oXCWq3ZggNK9sHW_1-k3HpgSOssNylg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of our favorite spots in the area and close to the beach. There’s almost always a wait, so plan accordingly. The service was excellent and attentive. We had to try the lemon ricotta pancakes, and they were incredibly fluffy, perfectly balanced, and absolutely delicious. Pro tip: add blueberries, they take it to the next level. We ordered the freshly squeezed orange juice, which was refreshing and surprisingly flavorful and a mimosa which was equally good. The veggie omelet was fresh, and flavorful. The only downside was that the bathrooms weren’t very well maintained.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOqpMb342g7_A5cLX57BRq&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Pratik Cholkhane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXik-RJTYn3gPwA5YaO5wMgHilVRO0N0SYslYvYmrh2M0WmUkj4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A perfect spot for brunch. The food was very tasty and well prepared, and the coffee was equally enjoyable. The seating arrangement was comfortable and pleasant, making it a great place to relax and enjoy the meal.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience with great food, nice ambience, and a welcoming atmosphere. Definitely a five-star experience and a place I would happily visit again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzS4VEAuZDkv7zcyXiJIO7&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"K C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeSyuoKqEZWBBVrOtY7n43oMvCCBVQtxUnHyER3kAl0ZjOyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was good, and service was good in terms of attentiveness of the server, but food took forever and we only ordered three simple items. I think that may be a kitchen problem. We ordered sparkling wine and it was neither cold or bubbly; we sent this back with no issues.

No reservations but seating was fast, even on a Saturday at 1pm. They have tables indoors and outdoors.

Overall, worth a visit if you're in the neighborhood, but I would not make a special trip, and skip the drinks.

Dinging half a star bc the sparkling wine was warm and flat, and food took forever.  The food was good though, so that redeemed a star.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDI_NXzvMiSwodE6nWxHvLp&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Pink Dragun (Pink_Dragun)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjBo2Itzhhc1kjGlpUNQxhSSehimAp3qmpoXv_KENpRR3LtktC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The BEST French toast I’ve ever had!!! Soft moist and didn’t need a lot of syrup. Emphasis on the soft the bread was so darn fluffy and good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBzzIqWZ6bUsAGUkP6NTop&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"Keah Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNAaCnmjVcL1loNZeVWuZtfAwN91ao1797jAWs_9yBrsLGJ6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really great spot for brunch. We had a seat inside and as soon as you walk inside you are instantly smacked with a sugar high from all the beautiful sweets and baked goodies. Staff is have attentive to everyone including each other. Even if you don’t have brunch here would recommend stopping in to get some tasty and fun desserts or baked goods.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYyF9fy6661FFkAvecqWlT&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Amol Mehrotra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9s9ktLRkC1y0K8gODwodH8CvX0OfECUvGPhQZkYUM78hI7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best brunch I ever had. All the plates were tempting, even the ones on others tables 😄","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLQSmR-y5XTi1NTMf1eAjq&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Quinn Duffy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRSNeM8zRiSXXknPeYliA8YVgkYO1c6ZTPAxYUXQWNSegJPCwj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was highly recommended to me, and it didn’t disappoint. The cinnamon swirl pancakes, which were a must-try, were absolutely delicious. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a sweet treat. I also tried the Morning Glory sandwich, which was recommended by the staff and was quite high on the menu. The service was great, and the hot sauce they gave us was incredibly spicy and flavorful. I’ll definitely be back when I’m in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP5oXR5wE&fid=0x0:0x6966f8a096e5facd"],"When":"2024-12-1"}]

[{"Name":"Michelle Flores","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6E19eO7Ci0AvSwI_BqtJJxd9HjcmoTtYCPuTEOXfa4lh6tVU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I went here as a recommendation and as much as I wanted to love it, it didn’t happen. I ordered a cheese pizza and caprese sandwich . The pizza was a huge no. Very bland and the sauce was not tasty at all. The sandwich had more flavor but super small. It was 40.00 dollars for the two items so pricey.  It was not for me or anyone that was with me. I’m glad I gave it a try but would not go back. It is also just a walk up window and you eat outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmPPinQi_OsySffETMhNQE&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Anna Rodek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUdHWbvxD9--E5tt7j-YJSk9Ne6fBAOnqZ9fo9XhVhemp6wixc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite places!
I’ve tried almost everything: acai bowls (my absolute favorite), the Date’’ smoothie, and the best turkey avocado sandwiches.
Everything is so fresh and delicious!
The customer service is amazing too—so sweet and very professional!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWvFYpVuHbBFCe_TMoRWhi&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Sabrina Steck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgrO5ZziNrPLfyzis85AYUSBjGkuyJY-O2Kdo690EwUoVHXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best meatball sub I’ve ever had, hands down. Stumbled on Lark & Owl and now I’m obsessed. Ece (the owner) will not steer you wrong. This spot deserves way more hype — 100% worth going out of your way for.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCn_M7-NcYq2362Ii1-HMR&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Christopher Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvB6Mm4QddVkwZiLVQiMCdaMm8YOBQt0ZNeUWTxTrGs8Pqv0JWdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here for dinner with my family. We ordered goat cheese and Caesar salads and pepperoni and Margherita pizzas. The salads were very good, especially the goat cheese. The spinach and beets were super fresh. The pepperoni pizza was pretty good, but the Margherita is steer clear of—it was kind of bland overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICe8eftjgE&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2022-9-17"},{"Name":"Lale Kumral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQLNUwGtfO6Z_R6yHRYVuaAqNwDuaJhjH7pf9dPCCc_sLT1pn1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pizza is incredibly delicious! We are visiting from London and I think it’s one of the best pizzas I’ve had in a while! Margarita pizza was out of this world. The crust, the cheese, freshly sliced tomatoes👏👏 My son lived his Meat Lover Pizza as well🙌  You can tell they value using quality ingredients. Amazing job! Hats off to the chef for creating such high quality food in this cute little corner hut.  Lark and Owl is in the adorable neighbourhood of Bird Rock and it is 2 mins walk to the beach. We’ll go for dinner and go for a walk to see the sunset next time👍My daughter tried the smoothie; rich & yummy!!! The goat cheese salad with green apples and candied walnuts was delicious and ingredients were very fresh! Recommended for beautiful night out or for take out👍👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJjKONwAE&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2023-7-12"},{"Name":"Cindy Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBwPMHeJ2ccd4ve1VpcIBWAosFd4qPlNKyGDpl-OefdTK5hj7C=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have you been to the smallest restaurant in San Diego?! Located in the heart of Bird Rock Lark and Owl specializes in not only amazing smoothies and acai bowls, but  also great pizzas, sandwiches and salads. Matt the owner takes great pride in all his dishes and even sources his ingredients from the farmers market.

🫐 Acai bowl: acai from Brazil, topped with fresh fruit, coconut and granola
🥤 Smoothies: creamy and filled with fruit. Definitely get my favorite the date smoothie
🥗 Goat cheese salad: beets, strawberries tomatoes, walnuts, balsamic glaze
🥗 House salad: green apples, cranberries, gorgonzola cheese, pepitas, tangerines, balsamic glaze
🥪 Caprese sandwich: fresh tomatoes and mozzarella with pesto sauce
🍕 Blue Cheese: sun dried tomato, mushroom, fresh arugula
🍕 Meat lovers: pepperoni, sausage, ham, bacon

Lark and Owl is few minute walk to the beach so you can enjoy all this amazing food and catch the sunset too!
.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChi5CongE&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2023-2-22"},{"Name":"Helen Hudson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxC94KS1N2bW8juA2bXP1WURpuPfn7KojSj-ed3csxl7WuJc8h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tiny spot serves BIG taste!  Stumbled on this place on a foggy La Jolla day. Part owner Sarp from Turkey is charming, honest and generous. Will eat here again and again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvrbumywE&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2024-12-23"},{"Name":"Kinsey Britton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUp_2Sty39NY-IQMEJxpbnMAwXyFPG2acW7Q3KQFbMHd96Fk5ck=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Im so happy my partner and I found this spot tucked in next to the Starbucks! The gluten-free pizza was spectacular and my partner liked their sandwich so much it was gone before I could snag a photo 😂","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwt4zf1wE&fid=0x0:0x709e544cd5eaf5de"],"When":"2025-3-21"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Natalie Heredia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1M54SSaUoyZuP6i4HA8mDBEvORrwjbFOl2t3BZSX8tUWS12vr0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here last weekend and the food was great!! My husband and I went to see a movie, and were able to order from this menu, even at 9:30pm.

We had the BBQ chicken pizza and Parmesan fries- which were both delicious, fresh, and hot. The BBQ chicken pizza was on a thin flatbread, seasoned well + parm fries were crunchy, hot and really tasty. All can be ordered directly on an app which is a nice feature!

My only issue was the service— despite how many servers a busy theatre had— we still waited about 25 mins for our food and wine. I guess if they are making things one by one, this makes sense

Could not take photos as we were in the theatre, but I will know to order earlier in the film next time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Inga Intriago","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4ckxD_C7oF3syhlsshzR1hIFmEWXjn5mQbaSbNTlOjGpSXSqk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and service here is amazing! The ahi tacos are one of our favorites however everything on the menu looks delicious. The restaurant space is open and inviting. We love having a small bite and a cocktail before or after a movie at The Lot which is part of the restaurant. There is also parking validation for 4 hours which is another nice offer! Also, be sure to check out the monthly music events for brunch and dinner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAG0zvbcxT3BE-LvLCkpt7z&fid=0x0:0x8a19246886eda443"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"Héctor Miguel Sánchez Soto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIy10n7iT6D3sMMH5DE7Ix2WikJBH_tJbx5ySGuSAU-cLvLeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great place for breakfast!
This spot is extremely comfortable, pleasant, and well attended. I don’t understand why some people prefer to wait at other restaurants nearby when this place is just as good—if not better—and much more peaceful, with plenty of seating available.

We enjoyed a delicious breakfast of pancakes, an omelette with chorizo, cheese, and veggies, along with some tasty drinks. I’ll definitely come back whenever I want to have breakfast in La Jolla. It’s such a comfortable place!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brad Gordon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWy9PEjypEGru9C8-vuU1SCR_l-ofXRCE8MTGYpsYD50zy-XxFChw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Everything was pretty much terrible. We waited at the front desk to be seated. After a few minutes a manager walked towards us and without stopping asked, 'what are you waiting for?' And I said,' to be seated' As he kept walking he said 'sit anywhere'.

The fried Chicken came out cold and soggy. The street corn was soaked in vinegar. The waiter spoke almost no English and took an incredibly long time to enter our order into his portable  The room is very nice and modern. While the server seem to have no idea what he was doing, he was also very pleasant. Lot next door which the restaurant validates for. But as far as food and quality of service,, this place is terrible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Perla O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINMETzxUQ72ASl4aA3XOkx8ul5vyKXS8AstbvS-japM20X0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the coffee and the Mexican concha was delicious. Alexa, the barista, was awesome. Highly recommend it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDy5unPVIZIANKW0m5PbonF&fid=0x0:0x8a19246886eda443"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"RPI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmECr73Y3Ii19K8iQE1i8q0Tx1eIeAwyTQr1LV5oJBjmAEcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Bland and off tasting food, lacking creativity.
We ordered Brussels Sprouts which came drenched and floating in oil.
Huevos rancheros was pasty and almost soapy in taste - odd since this is a seemingly simple breakfast staple.
Burger was meh.
Server was enthusiastic and attentive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ahlix Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6ARq3FpNCcbMjeChF3DAQdyU6lH-Ffzq63qtBFwyRZ4nm4AOk1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by Zentrl on Wednesday for an early dinner and was not disappointed. [{"Name":"Ali Marjaninejad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcLtrvAoMJTzG5z3xDmqFfUaQNPmv4x8Y8moMX2NROGWK03iqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing place with a lot of tasty items made with high-quality, organic ingredients.

This place has amazing decoration inside and also a large, lovely patio you can sit orwork at outside.

Also, this place has a menu for dogs too, which I found really cute! (see the attached photos)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA47HZ8VDj2Q2WGkkQfyez_&fid=0x0:0x9c6402422cb12ad0"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Rachna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLERmAn5aSUQWNc_fU9me0rdJsfbc_194t5SuBOCxCTVG-K91A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Just 2 blocks from La Jolla cove, we have always loved stopping by at *The Flower Pot* bypassing all eateries and cafés in La Jolla. However, tonight’s experience was beyond disappointing. Our family came for coffee, tea and small eats, 40 minutes before closing. Ordered 2-Hot Mexican Mochas, 1-Chai Latte and 1-Chicken Quesadilla. Paid $46.50 w/18%tip. Coffee arrived in very small cups (not in coffee mugs as they usually serve). It was served overly lukewarm-cold. And, it wasn’t just the top-foam was cold; the total of 4 sips of coffee in the cup, was cold to the last sip. As if it was sitting for hours in a machine brewed with descaling and cleaning issues since the taste of the coffee was stale, flat and no flavor of Mexican spices as told by the cashier. Tea latte was cold too, though served in a mug. Hot quesadilla was somewhat of a saving grace for chilly winter’s early evening hour, however the chicken we paid extra was barely there inside the wrapped quesadilla. Paid unreasonably high price for something that tasted like a day old left-over food, coffee & tea. Seems like they were out of everything an hour before closing the shop. Posting pics from our good times, breakfasts, and when Bobboi Gelato first sent us here to buy organic coffee. Bought ground organic coffee packs from Gloria over the years.
Lastly, what’s with the school kids who never buy food, but are sitting there with convenience store coke-bottle doing homework on laptops, (1-school kid today) occupying 4-seater table inside, never leave for hours until closing time. We are not returning any more. Hurtful for the very reason why small local businesses we do not ever want to see closing down keeps going away. Awful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAt97T48Grqysrg-vVsXkxv&fid=0x0:0x9c6402422cb12ad0"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Iryna Yaresko-Linska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUw_2Pz9RNXU9t0fibN6OM650P1QH_Am6MwwuApbUkAD1OwYAT1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Met up with friends here to catch up — and this place is really well suited for that. I liked that there’s plenty of space, especially outdoors: big tables, lots of seating, and enough room to comfortably gather even with a larger group. There are also quiet spots where you can work or just relax on your own.

We had coffee, but to be honest, I didn’t like it — just not my taste. Still, the overall atmosphere is nice, so it’s a good spot for friendly meetups.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIfmsuXdkaiCSw&fid=0x0:0x9c6402422cb12ad0"],"When":"2025-5-23"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved our brunch at The Flower Pot Cafe and Bakery! First of all, what a great atmosphere. Abundant indoor and outdoor dog friendly seating. Lots of books, board games, and puzzles. The perfect, cozy coffee shop vibe. The food and drinks were great too! The white mocha and iced caffe mocha are very tasty. The tuna melt and breakfast Sammy are nice too, very filling. They even have a pup menu and ours loved the salmon lox cut. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI6KXxIw&fid=0x0:0x9c6402422cb12ad0"],"When":"2025-3-29"},{"Name":"Dana Care","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKh4H3n5emR1YDD5895RTuKSglhWEiC4_Db_L3sl6tbaKdgag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Visited this place with my girlfriends on a Christmas week. The atmosphere and setting were great. Coffee was great. As for the food: yogurt parfait was generous and tasty. Avocado toast had two pieces of bread and some orange slices. It wasn’t special, no egg, just avocado mash. I had a breakfast burrito it wasn’t the best.  The potatoes inside are big chunks of boiled potato and the seasoning was mild. Overall, it’s a nice place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Causor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0GDsqUKoK-FsITv6gSPFrr_sn2wi_0QXF-cbU99Uo8Ad487kyMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visiting from Memphis, and this place was cute from the outside I had to stop and try it. The coffee was amazing, the sandwiches we ordered were great- just huge so I got full really fast. Ganon was the guy behind the counter who took out order and he was adorable in every way. Such a cute vibe here. It's probably my favorite place I have been to so far on our trip","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAA10U2H8Azlh9Vqp0_aJNW&fid=0x0:0x9c6402422cb12ad0"],"When":"2025-6-4"},{"Name":"Alesya Kos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFt_A8o9Uc8vKxlLbMEfSWEAepaMV02g-LH0wrFvAwcdR_68Uv4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the 'hippie' vibes.  Lots of flower pots everywhere, it's different and unique, unlike the modern coffee shops that look the same and lack character.  Has indoor and spacious outdoor seating, perfect for people watching, and just taking a breather.  Great coffee as well, had their vanilla latte with oat milk. A little pricey, around $10 with tip, but it's fine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb4PK-kAE&fid=0x0:0x9c6402422cb12ad0"],"When":"2024-8-1"},{"Name":"anne werber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQM0cLFdEHhrC38zHpUphtA2I0UIg56oXcVP8NW5KI3c6doUpCzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the spot.

I was at the Flower Pot Cafe for just a short amount of time, but it's AMAZING. The coffee was truly some of the best I've ever had. I got an iced oat milk latte with half-sweet vanilla - it was great. The atmosphere was very inviting and welcoming, and the food menu looked delicious! The service was quick and gracious, if I ever return to La Jolla I would love to go back!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ricki Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9Hals9Uoag9WupzjHLGBa1VnOAvOL_xqv-JbdzVBlgu-d9TvrMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was delightfully surprised at how large the menu was and how authentic the food was. As someone who doesn't eat seafood, eating at a place named Crab City wasn't my first idea, but my coworker was excited to check it out and the views are gorgeous.  We definitely made the right choice.  The service was excellent and it didn't take very long to receive our food. I cannot wait to come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRBMJH1sUYRutwMwgBE_8e&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Isabelle Rosales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzjNX8OLk-1pw3_xN2Fw3V4josO4bodDcQbr41Gve2E1UO_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"First we should of known not to stay here because no one was at this restaurant on a saturday night (dinner time). I got food poisoning from this restaurant, while on vacation my last day spent not feeling well due to this seafood boil.
It is over priced for what we got.
Our appetizer came after we got the boil, the Dungeness crab we ordered came 20 minutes after our boil. (was supposed to come all together)
The sauce was not good at all, tasted more like tomato pasta with thick garlic. The green muscles were very fishy tasting and still cold. The corn was not boiled/cooked enough.

Do not recommend this place at all. Ended up going to another restaurant to actually eat a good dinner.
As picture shown we maybe ate a quarter of the boil we received.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9P_Fx7Y6tTWFgrsWs5V8b&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Jennie Ran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvROQDnHkDCib1fHvdIlLiob2IIGBgS91_ZkszaF4PSf-nSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ordered P13 pho and B1 pork vermicelli bowl. The pho had good flavor but the noodles were stuck together. The tendon was tough but not inedible. An average bowl of pho - nothing amazing but still satisfying. The pork vermicelli was grilled perfectly - light char on tender slices of pork. A hefty portion of meat. Balanced veg to noodle ratio. Patio seating offered some views of the ocean. Fast service for those hungry after a day at the beach.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzIKokvZ5EIM8FOfd5SwsD&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"David Truong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtIzJgPSOPwiCygHnyxHCGB-DRcLH2qqn-p7UJ1-tF9jIWWVPBeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Seafood lovers, this is pure happiness in a bowl! The moment this massive Cajun seafood boil hit the table, the aroma of garlic, butter, and spice filled the air. The mix is generous—plump shrimp, sweet crawfish, tender clams, briny mussels, smoky sausage, and crisp green peppers, all drenched in a rich, flavorful sauce that clings to every bite.

MUST TRY!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZCANRsIw28dE9BDVSkisa&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Tomer Kom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfDqwjLaFH451_Td2NREpMUBX3DvBLTxZVf1h8Kd-iVgLXJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice people, good chill atmosphere and delicious summer rolls and soup, the portion very sufficient, great sauce, affordable price 😀","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzZ7-fzlaYUr4KbzjDUPOG&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Daniel Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXokhXUupa0pyDIuelD3JfwIbJyXxdAa2UrwlHt1VhS0AiTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food and have a nice ocean view from their patio. Their server Jordan and Nom were friendly. I visit this place once every other week. Good Pho👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPdlkUQZf2aMpBg9o1NKdb&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"J. Gray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZ9D7lOx1IyFdlPwKTqetthUCjEldgOK6T2JydgJ_pWGmLguRj1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re visiting La Jolla, this is a must!  The seafood boil was delicious and the pho extremely satisfying.  Excellent and speedy service.  So glad we came here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBW0UardjCs-DhN1m-lW5lE&fid=0x0:0x13b496806b48cdb2"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"Brandon Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIRdvXxCkcvLbz1-K8eGf9pQ1zr80jJ3CTiYCKgFQeCdYf7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is the best for seafood boil! My girlfriend and I love coming here all the time. The beach view is amazing, the service is outstanding (they remember us every time we visit), and the food is to die for. Plenty of options for food if you don’t want to eat messy with the seafood boil. Can’t wait to come again!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I was only in town a short time and went two times because of how delicious it was. I tried the fish tacos which were amazing and the habanero salsa yum! Also the chili relleno burrito and a regular bean and cheese burrito. The beans are hands down great. For dessert I had the churros and yum yum yum soooo good and fried perfectly. I will definitely be back if I go back to that side of town. Do not pass this one up. Sooooooo good 🙂","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLcs0YvWIWph9bKYCqeTz4&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Kytka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFbLxCr0yvAqfHQCyTsjXfQy9R17dE_EQqu_BX8i1OgxMFORH4zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During my recent visits to Don Bravos Authentic Mexican Cuisine at 5504 La Jolla Blvd in La Jolla, CA, I was thoroughly impressed by the quality of their food and service. On consecutive evenings, I enjoyed their carne asada tacos and carnitas tacos, both of which were flavorful and satisfying. The no-frills, fast service, combined with the delicious food, made for an excellent dining experience. I highly recommend Don Bravos for anyone seeking authentic Mexican cuisine in a relaxed atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgu_HTEQ&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2025-2-21"},{"Name":"M Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfao50xnBo8UGWExiTLNHRFQZO5PZQQrc8OYRqWrnddoodqyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was OK, but given the price, I didn't think it was good value. You can take a look at my picture and see if you think it was worth it.

Technically the food wasn't bad, but Don Bravo was simply not competitive in a city like San Diego, or even just one neighborhood like PB.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_kej9oAE&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2025-1-24"},{"Name":"Chris Astrella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpIY-rfGV0pv_4bC5HIjlmIHNrXe5C2Era67Mz1VY_n0cQpJ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I'm in San Diego, I stop here for the best fish tacos of my life.  These pictures are almost 2 year apart, and the tacos taste exactly the same.  My wife got an Enchilada plate and loved it (though she would have like more cheese, but we're originally from Wisconsin so there you go).  You will NOT be disappointed coming to Don Bravo.  Simply the best.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2l6efVw&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2022-5-27"},{"Name":"Jonathan (Jonathan.modern)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgH5D73IQqXHbhCG7QvZBdgxcvWJU9uCPWebyJQ3MbZ-jYtEWq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"UPDATE

I recommend the carne asada burrito. I do not recommend the mahi-mahi burrito.

PRIOR UPDATE

$1 added to credit card purchases. I don't believe in that.

ORIGINAL REVIEW

I got the carne asada burrito, it came with chips, and small bowls for salsa. I thought it was very good.

It's a good size, and one of the things that's nice about this location is that it's in a very small busy luxe area with beautiful nature all around, the ocean and wonderful places to explore.

This is an easy way to get decent food and also it has a porch in the back that overlooks the ocean and is a very good spot strategically if you want a nice view.

I enjoyed the burrito and I think I would get the mahi-mahi burrito next and I would go back. Thanks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRlPGmmwE&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2023-3-26"},{"Name":"J T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0YJhU4U4lDyli-jeyd3hMDS8Q5R-8LnzU4NA4E5fAryfU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"little thing about mexican good food is that you don’t need a microwave to heat up a chili relleno. i like the carna asada and the beer was kinda $$ but we are at the beach. had some birria that was more like the likings. saw parking lot. thanks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christopher Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvB6Mm4QddVkwZiLVQiMCdaMm8YOBQt0ZNeUWTxTrGs8Pqv0JWdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A classic Bird Rock institution that’s been around for decades. The food is great and the salsas are even better! I love the habanero and tomatillo salsas so much here. The chicken and lobster tacos are super flavorful and juicy as well. As you eat, you can sit on the back porch and see the Pacific Ocean! They even have a food truck in their parking lot that serves other off-menu items like menudo and pozole. This is a great option for Mexican in Bird Rock/North Pacific Beach!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZzM3I3QE&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2023-9-5"},{"Name":"Rob Stephenson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBx3Thrj4KqIPSScB_TXj3bSOGUh3r8GpRFMrMxhFrkg_GglZh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely a great taco shop by the ocean. You can get a beer battered fish taco for under four bucks. The operators were really nice and I’m gonna go back and try more of their dishes and I will update this as I go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD_q701gE&fid=0x0:0xc050ceb8e6593aaa"],"When":"2024-3-28"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ellen Scheumann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3MLG0a8wuSzo21vz2LhhTfi0ybmK1LPLYZsMUFhtaQyu69mjv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Shore Rider Bar was the perfect spot to celebrate our son’s 18th birthday after an evening swim! The food was absolutely amazing—fresh, flavorful, and a total hit with our group. Even though we arrived late, our server was incredibly friendly and attentive, kindly letting us know the kitchen was closing soon while ensuring we had plenty of time to order. The service and atmosphere made the night extra special. Highly recommend this place for delicious eats and great vibes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFnqbfZXVwMcvT6gKXGF9q&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-8-26"},{"Name":"Wilfred Jeremiah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpT7WpCp8l1R5PiHcTTTw55O-oCoUcHgfjkZt6zTrXE9PxXEYj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There used to be a burger, tater tots, and beer here, but they were delicious so I eated them right up.
Friendly laid back attitude with extra beachy vibes.
Great place to pull up and watch the game with sand still between your toes. Wide selection of local brews, and well made fare. Cozy, tasty, friendly as can be. Great place to bring your squad for a good time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEh-BG2hD0ZR71qhvYyJUA&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Alma Rosa Reed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVmdi4b7BLegUlWFSxSRN7oji-VOjg-7HoK9drtlvYW4cTZYFL_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Had lunch with family here. I really wanted to give them more stars because I was enjoying the kale salad with chicken but there was a hair in it and it completely ruined my appetite. Brownie points for them because they didn’t charge me for it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZYmvj__MYYPjnsteGheRN&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We popped into Shore Rider on a whim after a beach day, and it turned out to be a great choice! It was busy, but the space is large and open, so it didn’t feel overwhelming. We ordered the fish tacos and chips with guacamole, and everything was fresh, flavorful, and came out fairly quickly despite the crowd. Our margaritas took a bit longer to arrive, but the bar was definitely slammed as there was a Padres game on, so that could have been part of it. What really stood out to me was how family- and dog-friendly the place is. It’s clean, casual, and perfect if you’re out with a group or want to bring the kiddos or pups along. They also had a solid beer selection for those who prefer brews over cocktails. Great place to kick back and enjoy a casual, coastal evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0vtXFSnL8dg-hKFH-nQYI&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Ericka C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5xa58ST6GLOEFN-nQ6ioDy036YMGcEwwxm5MljjOE6O7V1aI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got a bite and a drink here before our kayak tour- it was a great beachy vibe, delicious tacos, and a good margarita! The place was huge and wasn’t too busy on a Saturday afternoon. Nathan helped us out at the bar and he was really nice. We ended up doing fish tacos and shrimp tacos. Both were so good! The fish tacos were a nice chunk of fish and are not to be missed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMChleKa0um4HQ&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Jessica C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6H-qkK_Xus0_TOCYJ5pb6p91CjuH6PLsgYZz3TV_I_dai=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my new go to places in San Diego! We went here for dinner and got the rice bowl and the poke bowl! Both were so good we had to go back another time before leaving at the end of our vacation. Their lemonades are great as well!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMvHknncZ8YJS6wBrD9HHv&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Beullah Escalante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVktHCnUFEwERAQA5iVleCAEtFivAaM_5BFe5i6SqNNLBn-uQPJzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great service and vibe.

10/10 Drinks: great, delicious margaritas plus, they have some variety with the mocktails.

3/10 Starter: we got the Brussel sprouts. It wasn't crispy, cold, too much going on flavor wise. Probably not in season.

Food:

I got the poke bowl, hawaiian style/
ahi. And it doesn't taste like oahu hawaiian style poke you can get at foodland or onos but it was good enough. Rice was def cali portion and it comes with some side chips. (Please see photos)

My got the shrimp, carne asada, and first tacos.
He states the best one is the carme asada, while the fish and shrimp were tied.

The tacos were socal style surfer tacos and nothing at all like the kind you get from a downtown or SD street style tacos.

Vibes: very beachy and touristy. Can be fun with groups and family friendly. They have indoor and outdoor seating.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI37_PMw&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-4-14"},{"Name":"Sushil P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfVYIXcZkr6daBNpXM176puWvBIaQmPJVosSUlyKVNmvS4LYu4bw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Shorerider sits in a cute, well-lit stretch of La Jolla, surrounded by a lively cluster of restaurants—perfect for a casual evening out.

The menu had good variety, and the mezcal-based drink was excellent. Definitely one of the highlights.

Tacos were solid, though I wish the salsa had more depth. The chicken quesadilla was also tasty—not overly cheesy, which worked well.

Service wasn’t bad—understandable given how busy it was—but it did feel a bit stretched at times.

One thing to note: even though the place is listed as open till 10 PM, the kitchen stopped taking orders by 9 PM, which was a bit of a letdown.

Overall, good food, great drinks, and a lively vibe. A solid 4-star experience—just make sure to get there earlier if you’re planning a late dinner!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApF_5z0wAh6qtaz1afeBuS&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-6-18"}]

[{"Name":"Martin Roberts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3KLNwjdL8_C7UAtzbEGUnfevXClGnmEDChQStCVnMWfBy-GTs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited 'Smallgoods' on a recommendation from some locals and I'm glad I walked the mile to the store for a sandwich as it was awesome. I had the "California Cheese & Turkey" which as well as the cheese and Turkey, obviously, has apple slices, cucumber and some greens in it, along with some Padron jam and Big Bill's Mustard Mayo... It was delicious, all the flavours and textures (the crunch from the apple) just worked. Service from Jenny was friendly and prices are reasonable ($12.99 pre-tax, for my sandwich). There are a few seats outside, and a few inside too. All in all a great sandwich and lunch experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbU-RgX05lWObt2_cwPEWF&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I tried a mystery picnic that is set up in LA jolla. As part of this experience you complete clues that will take you to local restaurants to pick up items to your picnic! Small Goods was one of the places on our stop. And I'm so glad we got to try this place, they gave us a variety of cheeses that we took around the corner and ate by the beach. I believe they call this their summer beach box, which is totally perfect pick me up to take for picnic or by the beach. I'm really glad I got to try this place and will definitely be coming back to try more of their cheeses and other items!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGKzgShbkaLnCG-r5k67pp&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2025-8-12"},{"Name":"Ed Schwitzky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQ90OQIVoF8DD3VsFVBLtbHPMbDCCrYpTJ8Ddt_mEVhKmMkI82=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This past week while visiting San Diego's North County from Tucson, AZ my wife and I went in search of the perfect grilled cheese. And figured to have found it at Smallgoods Cheese Shop & Cafe in La Jolla, winner of multiple "Best of" awards. Except on Tuesday, the owner was having a day...and refused to take our order for an SG Cheese Melt. She said we could return another day - suggesting it was best to call first - albeit with no assurance she would be in a sandwich-serving mood. Ever-hopeful, two days later we called and received her approval to make the 25-minute drive (again) from our hotel in Del Mar to savor what could be the perfect grilled cheese. But it was apparently another bad day (or maybe this shop owner wasn't born with the "hospitality gene"). Her husband prepared and presented a sandwich that was indescribably delicious. And he did it with a smile and gracious demeanor. However, no sando is worth enduring demeaning, rude service. Regrettably, we are one (actually, twice) and done with Smallgoods Cheese Shop & Cafe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvLD7JdCBP_ooVBhZ1oe4E&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Court F.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvqQ1hT2n4OC2cneiQead0pacEd4lWIxlfj0sYBb88d6Gm8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best sandwiches I have ever had! Fresh and delicious ingredients that all complimented each other perfectly. The owner was incredible as well. If we didn't all travel all the way from Canada, we would all be there weekly! Thanks again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAU0_rlur-e-vOJ2KuHRMEF&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2025-6-27"},{"Name":"Selena Dortzell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhT_8PW9OjwLi85AIdibHUeicqZKfv9JVorxElssxXDqUus5_k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AMAZING catering experience! Found this shop in a google review by someone else and reached out immediately. Pricing is better than another local shop I was considering in the SD area. Mike went out of his way to understand my event fully and my cheese/meat preferences. He gave me all the options, even offered exotic meats I would have never considered.
I was so happy with all the options and they did a remarkable job with our charcuterie platters for our non traditional wedding family picnic. (equity note, they had no issue with a same sex event and treated us like they would treat anyone else.)
He offered to deliver the platters to us since we were holding it at the park nearby. Everything arrived beautifully arranged, fresh and beyond my expectations. I fed 25-30 people with 5 trays and one micro green salad for $640. I felt comfortable with the pricing and they were able to accommodate my budget. I laid out my needs upfront, and they met them and exceed the expectations, to a T. I am very happy I chose them as a vendor and they were maybe my favorite vendor to work with because it was so easy. I didn't have to bend over backwards to get in contact with them. Mike did a great job reaching out to me when he needed to.
I really appreciate how kind they are and I can tell they are passionate about their work and do it with love. I can't recommend them enough. You have to try them for your wedding or similar event that needs catered. You will save money and have a better experience here than with someone else.
Didn't have a chance to check out the shop itself, but I did see they have a shop ween on their insta, and as a ween mom, I really love that and it definitely contributes to the family vibe. Will be back to stop in next time I am in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPGxdT66Wb4gVVbyXRKMdf&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2025-8-26"},{"Name":"Steven Megannety","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC8OjvrACdSmdytiTebHZu1efvl-HCXPW7kY9w_TjAfFcOYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our second time ordering from SmallGoods in La Jolla, CA. Bring 3,000 miles away didn’t impede the ordering, same wonderful service, same exceptional choices. Ready when they said it would be and enough food to feed 8 people - including 5 who just arrived after long flights.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Flores","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYpi2bk8ENu9FVFsVImIEf_4oprnWi1VFxMXQvjwkSYAgxGSH8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely lovely place. Owners are very helpful and knowledgeable - they know their cheeses and charcuterie. Great prices for high-quality cheeses. We ordered cheese + charcuterie trays for hiking in Anza Borrego, and we couldn't be happier with the selection. Just yum! They recommended smaller plates rather than a big platter for portability while hiking, and it worked really well. They even included a list of the cheeses and charcuterie. Very pleased.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICK6JPLCA&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2021-3-27"},{"Name":"Tyler S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbhHFKGqnFYUKaNM8EgqItIqyxAxroKUqy7pEccPElN7yDCCaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Haven’t had an experience like this since my SF days. Artisanal, creative, delicious, cute, friendly vibes, all adjectives you will feel after coming to Smallgoods.

The sandwich was better than anything I’ve created in months and it’s not this 1000 item menu. It’s simple, straight to the point, and highlights the best they have to offer. But they also have charcuterie trays, they cater and they have tons of cured meats and cheese you won’t find in the a Whole Foods or Sprouts. And the owner is super friendly and helpful with anything you need to know or maybe even don’t know. Yes, my new lunch spot when working out of LJ.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDrmuyBvgE&fid=0x0:0x74f095232a19192e"],"When":"2024-7-16"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Luiz Oliveira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIA_Wsn6_91fWj8Yr3V-9q3YFHKfbzTVSvoot1Ql3uCB5ojg2wn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I truly enjoyed the spaghetti and chicken parmigiana. The marinara sauce was beautifully seasoned, striking a confident balance between acidity and depth, clearly made with care rather than haste.
The garlic bread was excellent—aromatic, well-toasted, and indulgent without being heavy.
Our server was gracious and attentive, consistently ensuring our comfort with a level of professionalism that elevated the experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAc6FhLDCzTL6SaY8Tw9yt-&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Kayla Thonesen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPEh6OiHbe_0oWRjc5v0owilxovdMCXHLB8mfPY4dHy9vgWU2G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved this little spot! Short walk from La Jolla Cove, it’s a must if you need to scratch your Italian itch. Very warm and inviting atmosphere, we had a great waitress and the prices were reasonable for that area. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvHVB4ed_9M1z9fyiGNVox&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Mamaof1","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4rO4P1sSKebVMmug-hX3-JbVFTtlEwLjj588BMIQNfZ8zXiM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you first of all for accommodating our party of 10 with 5 children. That's one of the hardest things that we had trouble finding a good family friendly restaurant. Not only was the food exceptional but Connie's (our server) attentiveness was exceptional! The patience the menu knowledge and frequent check ins are truly appreciated. The fresh bread the salads the appetizers calamari and the main dishes we even ordered 4 of the specials. Thank you! My sister's engagement is off to a great start thanks to your restaurant. The location is hard to see as it's further down a few cafés. Parking must pay for close parking but once you get here it's worth it. Also priced accordingly. I did not feel like the other nearby restaurants that price gouge I felt it was fair. Thank you again. Will recommend to everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABUzbrb50rAu2SqpoOqeCj&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Александра","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6bb9kabynVWlEq6WWBd1Q2YWC-Wl-VakMN3Q7JTfxiYckoz3m=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love it ! JUST LOVE IT ALL. We had Choppino and grigliata and both were super tasty!
Thank you Giorgio for amazing service! We felt like in Italy 🍋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDn9PfW0EkzdQqlU7X3YwfW&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Tim Kealamakia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUw-BGoo98lTXLaDTGv-9DwkaCXTo47jsFUq1Bgn1ZobOTcIRvQdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decided to get some Italian before heading to our flight home.  We found this fun cute restaurant in La Jolla.  It's tucked away in a quiet and nice spot.  The service was really good even though there was only one service person working.  She was efficient and kept checking in on us.  We ordered the carpaccio for an appetizer, I recommend it!  Next was a pear salad that I don't remember the name of.  It was different and fantastic!  For pasta we got the carbonara and the penne alla vodka.   I believe the carbonara was a bit better than the vodka, but both were hot and cooked perfectly.  We finished with dessert where we tried the tiramisu and cheesecake.  For dessert the cheesecake was the favorite.   Absolutely great location, great food, and a wonderful time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBU-9vrhKhEs2odQESruwz_&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Vaish “Siso” C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtcKlU2ovIl0Cv6NxU_dnrip3ODsbS8eDmpg5LC3kCKrckIuaIfg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great restaurant for business or personal family get together. Even during a weekday, they were very busy. The restaurant is a bit small and can get loud. Our server suggested wine was fantastic and reasonably priced.

The food was great.  Service was fantastic! Desserts were a bit too sweet but they were good.  Overall, great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENG0vOrW4drdCQ&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-6-12"},{"Name":"Dan Provost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjEoX5eWfN_pI0LSQZ2PqNqFhAC-jynpZbM5mXl2jN03mb-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food at La Dolce Vita was phenomenal. The calamari was fresh, well seasoned, and melted in your mouth- the addition of fried pickled peppers was an excellent choice. Reservations are recommended, as it was busy even on a Monday night- there was a slight wait without a reservation but there is so much to look at in the area while you wait. The bread for the table was fresh and the sun dried tomato dipping oil was amazing, I definitely recommend taking a jar home with you! Connie was our server and she was so friendly and genuine with her recommendations. The Tiramisu was the perfect close to the meal, bursting with richness from the espresso and brightness of fresh strawberries. The ambiance of the restaurant transports you directly to the al fresco dining of Italy. If you’re looking for a great dining experience in La Jolla, make it this one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6v1iz7LFvE7BxtHNhtd54&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Laman Anvarli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCRlpiv8eMPGrrqtKv18gs92qtDK5pj0XZcsu1WFQMZbExZ5VXsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was my second time at
La Dolce Vita Ristorante and it was a right decision to celebrate My Birthday there! Delicious food, good size portion, wine and limoncello👌🏼
Good personal and atmosphere, thank you!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAs4bbX9w0XNAfhLCS1j6fz&fid=0x0:0xf0fe3e33d63b28ab"],"When":"2025-9-26"}]

[{"Name":"Dena H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKtVCmeRSEO2JN-XjhWfiki04lahW87SWpuI19osXiWXmrEXHq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came here on Friday night for their late night music and had a great time. The music and food were both amazing!

We shared some dishes and my favorite was the baba ganoush / dips platter, Greek salad and truffle fries.

I’ll definitely be back to try other items on the menu!

If you come on Friday night for the entertainment definitely make reservations ahead of time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZyJZ18ZgctYqAkCpbLQbD&fid=0x0:0x298672a9d94167b0"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Emy Emmanuel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVa8VPV48cDxbpiTuQPFrb_IhT6QZW1tgRbv1TERJJoLHJdxc0dqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good ambience and nice decor making it look cozy
Average food mainly because all what we ordered were greasy
Ordered using the kiosk- and took a number for the table. But that was of no use.
I wouldn’t recommend ordering the Turkish coffee and chicken shawarma.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvRaKAlNRwiG3ssWjuiBog&fid=0x0:0x298672a9d94167b0"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Mrugesh Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4c2JOlRXOIqYSYFLKtqja9uapawxPFMy6JSUJNraeCjHxzjoI1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We thoroughly enjoyed our recent visit to this delightful establishment. The atmosphere was truly welcoming and provided a perfect setting for relaxation. The culinary offerings were exceptional, with each dish prepared to perfection. Furthermore, the coffee served was of outstanding quality, enhancing the overall experience. We highly recommend this wonderful place to anyone seeking a memorable outing.. staff was polite and very helpful.  I strongly recommend this place to visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-mnK3jIjf8gZwEtRaH4j6&fid=0x0:0x298672a9d94167b0"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Jannah Tarabishi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyXIVCnhyEwPOt2fSUZn0vPm7wTBuezsmBJT9oQjmx1uOG1aMd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Living Room Café has such a cozy, vintage-cute vibe with its seating and decor—perfect for a relaxed stop during a La Jolla walk. Their chai tea latte is definitely the star here, rich and flavorful, one of the best I’ve had in the area. The desserts are decent—not the absolute best, but still enjoyable and a nice complement to the drinks. Honestly, I’d come back mainly for the chai latte—it’s worth the visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDoGnQn2YJUlIvh7FQBRnZ&fid=0x0:0x298672a9d94167b0"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"rania dababneh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFCK4PRbuaI3u_oWyMKR911sN_hnjoS1HpBY--LsYweAaGLJs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I celebrated my 50th birthday at Living Room last night, and it was an absolutely exceptional experience. From the moment we walked in, everything felt top of the line. The ambiance is elegant and beautifully decorated, creating a warm yet upscale vibe that makes any occasion feel special.

The food was outstanding — every dish was flavorful, perfectly prepared, and clearly made with care. The service was impeccable: attentive, professional, and genuinely welcoming without being overbearing.

Everything about the night exceeded my expectations, from the atmosphere to the food and the overall experience. I couldn’t have chosen a better place to celebrate such a meaningful milestone. Highly recommend and will definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teri Storm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3wpFitY3QC3_I2b8iHFBfYJwPeP3e-C4yslBL3h2Uqwv6-DQvmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here with our out of town guests to get a coffee break while walking La Jolla Cove. It is a beautiful gathering area with plenty of room. They offer many food items and coffee drinks to chose from. I can honestly say it's the nicest coffee shop I've ever been to. It made our day extra special!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aleksandr Moreno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVanKNwsdTy3L70GuBUwd0674PcBjNge71jqNA274rqG28-v9vB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for a late night coffee spot and came across this place. I was pleasantly surprised to learn they serve food as well. The mushroom swiss burger with garlic aioli was delicious. The service was on point and Dani and Suzie were super friendly and accommodating. I will definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNlZGR3QZx3TVRG4Rpl8G4&fid=0x0:0x298672a9d94167b0"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Schayne Lees","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwS7VYMyOuJchYxXSF2FsuC92nrvxlLeuhjzvxznr7y-dhZpaZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love the evening lounge here, offering hookah, a decent food menu and a full bar. They have live music on Friday and Saturday and the staff is super friendly. Camer here for breakfast and had a great omelet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLvQMulqCQynrmIBOjVur0&fid=0x0:0x298672a9d94167b0"],"When":"2025-7-8"}]
