[{"Name":"Nadia S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQa55nV3LMvQo8I_Ft3ayKzf9Xsgx9QqeVA9svuB2jr1Lgmyvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tried Bobboi Gelato in La Jolla and had a bit of a mixed experience at first. I sampled the charcoal vanilla and the dragon lemon, but honestly didn’t love either of them, the flavors just didn’t work for me. The charcoal vanilla was a bit powdery, and the dragon lemon was too tangy for my taste.

Then I went with panettone and dark chocolate, and that combo was amazing. The panettone had such a rich, festive flavor with bits of cake, and the dark chocolate was deep, smooth, and not overly sweet. Together they balanced each other really well. Definitely a must-try combo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN6cKXX0VtyBInZNctxmrJ&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Stella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUYMabqNGcfw9rin1JGvxRy0_l-9ZgqmpA9D5ZMSzPRrJELYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s a beautiful little shop very close to coast. Ordered mocha and dragon lemon flavor. The mocha gelato has soft and tender texture, and they include small chocolate chips inside. Dragon lemon is plant based and has a thin and crisp fruit flavor. The flavors are good, but not very impressive :) There’re only a few outdoor seatings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAGOTr9nYVi7qvVEKTi8DJ&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Carol S (石凱洛 Carol)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWUJqns5fEVknCPt0hOTUH3im8z87v1sPVK4p42B9y6uKrwvsJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I passed by, there was always a long line. Today I finally got the chance to try it!
I chose the Dragon Lemon and Cranberry Orange flavors—both were smooth, rich in flavor, and didn’t feel heavy at all.
The staff were very friendly and welcoming, always smiling.
I’ll definitely come back to try other flavors next time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBE3Xv6-vqmesgrm6dRTCTY&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Joshua Medina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVFOcjnLlXafMdEZGft-Nsg-3kdiyB7p5qcUWdQEWlTX5ftTuYYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by Bobboi Natural Gelato and it absolutely lived up to the hype.

I got a two-scoop waffle cone with Panettone (their holiday special inspired by the classic Italian Christmas cake) and Stracciatella (vanilla bean infused with dark chocolate chips), and both flavors were phenomenal.

The Panettone was rich, smooth, and perfectly captured the essence of the traditional cake—festive, comforting, and not overly sweet. The Stracciatella was just as impressive: creamy vanilla bean with high-quality dark chocolate that snapped beautifully in every bite.

You can really taste the quality and craftsmanship in their gelato. Fresh, balanced flavors, great texture, and an excellent waffle cone to top it off. If you’re in La Jolla, this spot is a must—definitely coming back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoybAge104xAbVr5DO49gx&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Ashish Aggarwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_51eT3sg0eeSUUHEjC0CLYcxHod7XvUlNy6am4ZVLGhdzTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"They’ve got a bunch of plant based flavors which is great. Generally found the ice cream / gelato just ‘ok.’ Flavors sound really cool but the taste is just ok

Got the pistachio and stracitella and it wasnt as good as I thought. But it was decent. Solid spot.. 4/5 stars but not winning any awards","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABIXvmXKe2o1qFo9_5DgfM&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Amy Thurston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMrFpKaVlo0ac0Sf3Syw6ADYv1-EsjMQDp2bLIPeL6rEOE3Sf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Appreciated the samples, the server was very helpful and informative, everyone loved their gelato. I got the bacio- dark chocolate hazelnut.
They had dairy free options too:
-coconut coffee
-dragon lemon
-dark chocolate sorbet
-pistachio California
-cranberry orange
-pomegranate","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQRUjeR0oRG9YvU_ijR1-n&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious gelato at Bobboi Natural Gelato in La Jolla!  Definitely one of our favorite San Diego gelato brands. We enjoyed the pumpkin amaretto, bacio, and stracciatella flavors. Very friend service and quick to order. Nice indoor and dog friendly outdoor seating. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5h243zF4yYnvLUW1XMZV8&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Alex Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDi1fzPLeCmdzfaw2mABVIoTuf8HTqXrYJt8X32ckWre9EQv7FzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was adorable and welcoming, we tried a few free samples in the front before we headed to the La Jolla beaches. After the beaches hit the spot and it was definitely the highlight of our trip! The owner whos accent was definitely to melt for like the gelato was very sweet and do was the gelato! I highly recommend the Dragon fruit Lemonade flavor!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjN-uTWFSTqGxePbEBDxzY&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-9-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went here for lunch on a weekday so that it's not so busy in LaJolla. Parking was still an issue and we ended up parking in a lot for $20.

We were seated at the last table by the window. Yes! Gorgeous view of the ocean, the many varieties of birds, and sea lions sunbathing on the beach below.

We took advantage of their great lunch special. You get to choose an appetizer and entree. We both chose the pork belly bao and a full size ramen combo for $18. The Me So Hot ramen was delicious with a nice heat. Delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiyu7j2gqQAcj9-gc1wTL6&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"George","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt8t12dOujlVIiZyv49S5cwJaEVksXQSE46l0S5eCC0TMoOdw9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing restaurant with an incredible view, excellent selection of food, very fresh sushi fish (stocked daily), and all at a reasonable price!
We had a great time stopping by Blue Ocean for lunch during our day trip to the Cove. A little off the main street, it offers likely one of the best views of the shoreline (you can see the seals!), but only if you get seated along the window.
We tried quite a lot of food. For appetizers, their hamachi kama (cheeks) were huge and delicious! For entrees, their ramens were balanced and well made, but their raw fish options stand out. We had their Rainbow (soft shell crab) and Marine Boy (spicy tuna) rolls, and both were delicious, and portions were generous (see pics). Additionally, their have an Omakase Box which, when we visited, was priced at $55. It may change in content and price when you visit. However, as someone who's had a lot of sushi (including many times in Japan), this box was objectively excellent. I received a generous serving of essentially everything on their a la carte menu: eel, uni, toro, hamachi, albacore, maguro, and salmon, along with a nice seaweed salad and some tekka maki. We were very impressed! Even from a supermarket this collection would easily run $50+, and here we were enjoying super fresh, high quality sashimi (for instance,uni had no fishiness and light sweetness) with an ocean view at a reasonable price. We'll probably return just to eat this again (independent of the view and the Cove).
Service was... mixed. There were some friendly folks, and some that were less so. We did have a service-related issue come up during our visit, which could have made it a 3-star rather than a 5-star experience, but fortunately, the manager, Ozzy, came through for us to save the day. Thanks again Ozzy!
All in all, we had a wonderful time and will definitely be back, and I highly recommend stopping by as part of a Cove day or just to eat the sushi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGKE1LK0fB1uTDtSHEhgcD&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Shruti A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5CxdIlI0zzUHFLWCbVlSVETljbHns3EhQWqF03WaVEirZjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went here for lunch with two kids. There was a little bit of a weight to get seating next to the windows with the views but the wait was totally worth it. The food was delicious and the service was good too.
My kids loved the sweet Nutella buns","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyFNG4P4JlKJR3gZtkSIHC&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Natalia Strukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSJ0s7vwE_FmMhTO-7x2FnDqQkpXnvp9IuEg4VwcbgJvokGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is hands down our favorite Asian spot in La Jolla — and honestly, probably in all of San Diego. The view from the restaurant is absolutely stunning, and the food is consistently excellent while still being very reasonably priced.
They don’t take reservations, so you’ll want to come early and expect a line, but it’s completely worth the wait. The character buns are always a hit with kids — fun, cute, and delicious. I’ve been coming here for years and have tried almost every dish on the menu, and most of them are exceptionally cooked.
The sushi rolls are fantastic — our favorite is the Padres roll (pictured). The salads are also great; the cucumber salad (also pictured) is so simple but incredibly fresh and tasty.
If you’re looking for amazing food, great prices, and one of the best views in La Jolla, this is the place. Highly recommend — you won’t be disappointed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQFJ4JsUMTyQk-LNrqtLI4&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Maan Kyeso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYWhPXDk42Wn6Bv7VH4HOtxiAjuYPRC0U_ne8Op2-ClQuYgFS0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food here was very good, the bulgogi fries were kind of soggy at the bottom, but very delicious nonetheless. The calamari was great, and the broths for the noodles were also amazing. Sushi rolls were also very flavorful. The dessert was good, but it’s more stunt food than anything amazing. Overall, I would come visit this place again, very enjoyable experience with a nice ocean view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvRMGpFNGSIVxXjPVoqumU&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2025-7-23"},{"Name":"Victor Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYegB_-85QJ7LwBDVENWlxgIndOYKfPA6zSRcd63cwQzTyMuAz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chef hooked it up today. Kudos and thank you. The Omakase was beyond amazing, especially for the price. It was definitely worth it. The 2 collar items as appetizers are a steal for the price and quality. When I want sushi with a view in La Jolla I am coming here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxhSnuEsPM10QeVUjTomxa&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2025-8-23"},{"Name":"Josh Tardieu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVrjFgMpAlMADEACOGFudUpLsgS6ptB1O7FJGIjXUst1YVmATm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just great no complaints!!!! Amazing sushi with the ocean view, adult beverages as well can't beat it!! Shout out to Wyatt, great customer service, almost said we were now best friends. Treated my wife and 2yr old daughter with kindness and professionalism!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVN3G8qX7VAL_cf2wTHgMm&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Emily Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4_ksAnHJEk1nQPuzE3kVUgO6lWE14hXDYOUXAPhaQ5mgeGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A bit pricey but everything we tried we loved aside from the piggy bao buns. It tasted more like an Italian meatball. My favorite side was the corn cheese! Best one I've had in SD. The chicken bun tacos were to die for too! Will definitely be back. Shout out to Sophia, best hostess and excellent customer service!! We were really impressed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN0IVJAOLqdHy3LLk6LtQe&fid=0x0:0x35da63a913dab069"],"When":"2025-7-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Someone had recommended this place to my husband and he was craving steak so we decided to order some food for delivery for dinner last night. We are both very impressed with how well this food traveled! I can only imagine how well the food tastes at the restaurant itself! I ordered the goat cheese and beet salad and also added chicken. My husband ordered the steak in fritz. We also ordered a moose-like dessert and burrata cheese appetizer. The quality was outstanding! Even a simple as a fries that came with a steak was so well seasoned and crisp and soft. We are both very impressed I definitely want to come try this place in person. Highly recommend this place they have a variety of food options from steak, to salads, to pastas and more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1vkDhV3zQ7DKO_vVI6WzK&fid=0x0:0xf84b34274b10c2a1"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Dr. Carol Utay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLSF_Pi7F1agRJQxBHCYJJqxL5X9Xrdfzb5mQoZ4dOkpaU42ccgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delightful delicious meal at candor‘s. Each dish was unique and worth re-ordering one was a great server with good recommendations the za’atra salmon was fresh and really great. Even the simple salad was not so simple. The dressing was amazing. We ordered the tomato bread with garlic for a starter and it wasn’t too much but really delicious.  Even though we didn’t really have room for dessert, we ordered the tiramisu with chocolate mousse complemented each other perfectly. I encourage you to come here for a delicious and special lunch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI27CqzAE&fid=0x0:0xf84b34274b10c2a1"],"When":"2025-4-4"},{"Name":"Peter Eells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7yWfEJVq4UouRWeXr6NrC0MUyAPiApeXtgAUatTyNgOSO-B-b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were treated like family by Matias from the moment we were seated. We had personable, attentive, and very informative attention.

The recommendations were spot on, and the modifications we asked for (less spicy on one dish) were readily accommodated.

We had the Roasted Branzino and Fisherman's Stew, with the marinated Shrimp Al Ajillo. We finished with a Carrot Cake and 2 Americans. It was all amazing in presentation, flavor, and texture.

The ambiance was slightly diminished by being on a main road, but Sunday night even outside was a very nice relaxed, upscale vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzyZzldw&fid=0x0:0xf84b34274b10c2a1"],"When":"2024-6-3"},{"Name":"Belle Zaldivar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNXxl0YFZpRwBWGypLvREpD74JFWDsMM0kkWR0352cXj1g9C_Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our very first visit at Candor by Guiseppe was perhaps a very good accident. We threw our high school's 10 year reunion on their back patio and everyone had an incredible time. Courtney and her team helped us get all of the details finalized including games/layout, food (which was delicious btw), and photobooth package through their partnership with KPTZ Photo Booth (highly recommend!!). We had a slideshow playing and got to play our own music - all of the little details that really made the night a success. Everyone was super helpful and friendly day-of as well!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWEWrzoeOoAHJ-VfVaPnce&fid=0x0:0xe9048e933b63dbff"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"REZA VEYSEH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvk5R6wmHxBe2L5SXE9bwP3nFPIAXjy7DWROb6sXZ9ZKVXCEtpMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Incredible Spot – How Did I Not Come Here Sooner?!

I’ve lived in San Diego for 21 years, and I’m honestly wondering how I never made it here before! I stumbled upon this place by chance—I just needed to use the restroom—but as soon as I walked in, I was completely impressed by the ambiance. It has the perfect balance of style and comfort, making it a great place to unwind.

I ended up staying for a drink and some food, and everything exceeded my expectations. The cocktails were top-notch, the food was flavorful and well-prepared, and the staff was incredibly friendly and attentive.

This isn’t some hidden gem—it’s a well-known spot for a reason! If you haven’t been yet, make sure to check it out. You’ll be glad you did!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgxY6WCg&fid=0x0:0xe9048e933b63dbff"],"When":"2025-2-19"},{"Name":"Tre “Nerdy Traveler” Heitman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-OTylTAFXTLzOF5Dd6mlYy5j2bEBNYo2KQC270q7hh7ZXkmB-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic restaurant that's extremely delicious! We were out walking around the beach and got a bit hungry so headed up the hill a couple blocks and found this place.

We love outdoor dining and saw they had tables outside. One thing led to another and then we were stuffing great food into our faces.

The menu has many options but we opted for an appetizer which was The Gilroy garlic cheese curds and they were very tasty. If you've ever had the cheese curds from the cheesecake factory, think that but better! Also the photo showing the cheese curds is missing quite a few cheese curds because I forgot to take a picture before we started eating them.

We were both out walking around and so we opted for salads. I got the surf salad with ahi and it was mighty tasty. I got the wasabi vinaigrette dressing and it had a small kick to it but nothing too spicy and it complimented the flavors of the Ahi and the grilled veggies that are mixed within the salad.

My fiancee went with the Cobb salad with the cilantro lime vinaigrette dressing and that was also delicious. She got chicken in hers and the chicken was cooked perfectly.

We will be heading back there again so I will update with what other goodies we try when we actually dig into their plates and such. They do have other things such as fish tacos, wings, ceviche, burgers, pasta and more.

It wasn't that busy for a early September Saturday and there was open tables around 1: 00pm. Although people did start coming in right after us.

I was also surprised with the cost as it was not that expensive for the two salads and appetizer with a soda and a tea.

Definitely a new favorite that we will back too.

Update #1: tried the buffalo chicken sandwich with cheddar cheese and regular fries. A+++ / also tried club sandwich with steak fries, also A+++. Great food!

Update #2: Tried the fish tacos. Also most excellent! The lady stuck with the Cobb salad with the cilantro lime dressing so nothing new on her side. Added photos of the delicious fish tacos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICemezbLA&fid=0x0:0xe9048e933b63dbff"],"When":"2022-9-17"},{"Name":"Jamie Curtis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMRbqsCyQOGUW8OiVdy_52n337APXr8QMRHTBpqpct9MZM30_N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a great Tavern! My husband and I stayed around the corner on our honeymoon and came to the Tavern everyday! Athena was our server I apologize if I spelt your name wrong. You invited us to your Christmas party and we had a blast just a day after our wedding. Thank you for our memories and the Philly cheese steak was the best we had! Please ask for Athena she make the best drinks! Thank you for our margaritas on the beach. We will definitely be returning on our next adventure! user_reviews: [{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've driven by this place at least a dozen times and really wanted to stop by and finally got the chance today! Parking is a little tricky in La Jolla but a weekday is at least more feasible than a weekend. I arrived around 10:30 a.m. after a hike and the coffee shop was packed! Although I was able to order very quickly and get my food and coffee out fairly quickly! The service is so nice, friendly, warm and gives a really welcoming mom and pop family feel. They offer a variety of pastries and baked items as well as a full breakfast menu! I ordered a latte with oat milk and a spinach quiche and both were delicious! Definitely a really cute spot if you're in the La Jolla area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNmUNRkrCJNjrBSIstIFlR\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Jason Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX07JenIwnRNWREuEseQBt7lHS7zq8lAcH8IlSKpWd4NWAiR-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Scones are a must have 😋 delicious egg burrito too. Love that they partnered with nearby hotel to provide free scone. Would highly recommend this place for breakfast or grabbing a sweet treat to go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhACWXgTTHE0IfOuRNMNnkN7\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2025-7-23"},{"Name":"Alesya Kos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFt_A8o9Uc8vKxlLbMEfSWEAepaMV02g-LH0wrFvAwcdR_68Uv4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great little spot for breakfast/brunch.  Had their breakfast wrap, and it was delicious. It had everything that you would want for breakfast in a wrap. A little under seasoned, but there's a self-serve station with condiments, salt and pepper. Outdoor seating by a not-so-busy street. Also had their maple glazed scone, it's the perfect size if you crave a little dessert after your meal, 12/10, really inexpensive as well. Definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb4IKbDg\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2024-8-1"},{"Name":"Micaela El Fattal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7mlNdKmL2d7w4hvUWZODrOhvggHU2KAQE4EajUO9VBoPgpz4U9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible and affordable breakfast spot with only limited outdoor seating. Very cute and country theme. I had a bagel sandwich which was great. They have a decent but small coffee bar for creamer, chocolate, or cinnamon. Good and fresh coffee. Scones looked incredible but u didn't buy any. Next time!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID97faLhwE\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2024-3-20"},{"Name":"Katie B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViroWvrlS3sBOjRlAJegkWx52psJMM4x5sktsn28NX_UHCZj_D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited this coffee shop today while hanging in La Jolla. Order caramel\nMachiatto iced and they our whip cream which was treat. It was delicious. Then I order the chipotle turkey sandwich which was also good. The ladies working there were very nice and attended to me right away when I walked it. I sat on the patio and read for a little while which was nice. Great place to pop in for a coffee, pastry or sandwich.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbz3eKKGlEjMLiHT4M2Yym\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2025-6-24"},{"Name":"Tiffany Miner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-nWqCRT747ApCqsFRRsMpYoaXjMDtof_LBmSLxnAPUIXSaosJuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"They deserve 4 maybe 5 stars depending on what pastry you get. But I am giving them 3 stars because.....The Brick \u0026 Bell in LaJolla no longer offers cheese danishes.  😭   One of our highlights when we vacation in La Jolla.  We even called the downtown location and was told for 6 months have not had Cheese Danishes.  it's like dating the man or the woman of your dreams and then they ghost you.  ☹️💔","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHl97rcwIXdYDEnJGJUtsd\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2025-7-2"},{"Name":"Faith Warnke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqY14Kv0jnPVpBCv6ULubOP9SKVaenhuvuRq7gcPmQVS2iHjqETg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was mid and lukewarm, but the employees were patient and kind when ordering.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6PamgorS-4TcrmE5YXr3q\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Tara Wilhelm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFmUwNT2tzTTUU6-iGp4mEwnVoIcDrtgxdDDuQsQntVVyvOg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Located at 928 Silverado Street La Jolla this counter service restaurant has coffees, breakfast pastries,sandwiches, and more. They provide you with a buzzer to know when to pick up your order from the counter. There is seating mostly outside with a couple tables inside. They do have a restroom.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL9drbuwE\u0026fid=0x0:0x6e6e850295a86317"],"When":"2024-6-22"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Siddartha Donthula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMSCro94SEWShYUKiGH9wXGy6y3QkuI05wDa8FXZvWQQt8hPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cody's is a rooftop restaurant that offers splendid views of Pacific Ocean and amazing food to pair with it. We tried the veggie patty burger and veggie hash, they both turned out to be pretty good. They have plenty of outdoor seating with heaters which lets you enjoy the ocean views.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwcvX6uxntBxyrAdYOFtaA&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Oharu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFT_Fsu2cGoDNyhML3SJ4_PXFBwNEqwSiwkUW40jlxvtfNfDMP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Decent views, but falls short on value for the price.
I visited for breakfast after watching the seals at La Jolla Cove in late December. The restaurant is located on the second floor and can be a bit tricky to find. The outdoor terrace was well-equipped with heaters, making the chilly morning air comfortable.
I ordered the Healthy Breakfast Salad. While the combination of spinach, zucchini, and poached eggs was okay, some of the greens lacked freshness, which was disappointing for a dish that relies on quality ingredients. The coffee also lacked the depth and richness I expect for a morning cup.
As for the view, you can see the ocean in the distance, but it wasn’t as spectacular as I had anticipated. It feels as though a large portion of the price is for the location rather than the quality of the food and service.
Overall, the experience didn't quite justify the high price point. At this level, I would expect better ingredient selection and a more refined coffee experience. It was a standard experience, but I likely won't be returning.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBge51OV_fOT8yp96gXsg54&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"O Castle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_pEK11gfixiDlUhiP42c6icNR5ho8fDo0_Cn2pkwsErpKHjEM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The place was very nice and our waiter was friendly.  However, the food was average and due to that felt over priced. We had an app and three entrees: crab & artichoke dip, the burger, fish & chips, and the lobster roll. The fries were not crispy enough and were kind of cold like they'd been sitting there. The dip was amazing and probably the best part. The fish while delicate had almost no seasoning. Lobster roll was good. Overall, decent but would not return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJwqIpCMmWFdczfwCmk92y&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Clay Wu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhvVauxHMziC8xDbji0pjfRXjFPrY4TdJOI1EnVLOoX4G2mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had such a great experience at Cody’s! The vibe is super relaxed and welcoming, with a perfect beachy feel that matches La Jolla. The staff was really friendly and attentive. We had ordered a French toast to share and he ended up comping us because he had forgotten to put the order in initially.

The food was delicious — everything tasted fresh and flavorful. We especially loved the crab cakes benedict and lobster roll, and the portions were generous.

Definitely one of those spots where you can just kick back, enjoy amazing food, and soak in the San Diego atmosphere. I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1PErcDonhypb4AxJ4XUTK&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Tiffany Poon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMw27TSaYDOfRR3rEKT0BePBH5dtTcGJ9l5raaJQpaqGNDucj4JQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My boyfriend surprised me with an impromptu date at Cody’s La Jolla on a post Labor Day Thursday, and we had such a great time I had to come post a review. I used to frequent their old location down the street after a morning in the ocean, but this was my first visit to their new reimagined and elevated dining experience. I ordered the highly recommended bouillabaisse for lunch while he opted for the bacon and cheddar omelette with griddled potatoes and sausage and a flat white coffee from their all day breakfast menu. Everything was fantastic. The bouillabaisse was full of perfectly cooked seafood and such a generous and portion that even after sharing the bread I took an extra meal’s worth home as leftovers. He thoroughly enjoyed the breakfast he had been craving for a while and noted the excellent coffee was served in the proper size cup. We had my dog with us, medium fifty pound size and well behaved. They were so kind to her, letting us choose a table where she’d have room to lay down out of the way, bringing her water along with ours, and while they no longer have a printed dog menu, they cooked up a plain burger patty for her that looked so good I would have stolen some if it didn’t arrive in a dog bowl. It was not too busy when we arrived but even with if all the tables were full there is plenty of space between them. Service was exceptional from the front of the house to our attentive and thoughtful servers. Thank you for a wonderful ocean view experience on this perfect weather day. We’ll definitely be back to try the crab chowder!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDQfeYDVH3TxgKIAC1Ok7t&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"HPF","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbGuMqXP5G_fAo449skM6T8XkcaXKfgBPdRleLzMS4Y0IfnTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an awesome breakfast at Cody’s Place! The view is amazing, and the vibe is super chill. The staff were really friendly and made us feel right at home.

We tried the Surf & Turf, steak and eggs, pancakes and an omelette. Surf and turf including omelette was super tasty and cooked just right, pancake and steak Ang egg was just alright. You can tell they use fresh ingredients.

Perfect spot to enjoy a relaxed morning with great food and a view. Definitely coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7-WzeUDcpsqfadf0UjFnR&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"lizbeth salgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWEX7YySPecMUj9BPzXU3T2KbNXJBo4O47m_ZiR5PRYbLR1dvC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute little spot in La Jolla. This restaurant/ bar has a nice view of the ocean, they have large windows that open completely letting the breeze in the bar creating a great atmosphere especially during summer. We sat at the bar and ordered a couple of drinks, staff was friendly and knowledgeable of their cocktail menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmxqHfcBtyFyoln9HWZ_rl&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Stephen Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4huqXqevNexSwcoPWwEe2WYfbLE7yxMlTcOnySvU_4KAj-2Lq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I come into town every year in December for her birthday for four or five days. And this is the first place we always eat and continue to eat while we’re on our trip. Always great food great service great staff. And their espresso martini never disappoints","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBolWFmiRbHtE5CYfRNHN8M&fid=0x0:0xbfa0e1971eaf7332"],"When":"2025-12-17"}]

[{"Name":"Ariah H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgStBOQ3jTfBlFZym5yTqLpjvdAOszrmjUcYx3qs1dzg7b0Ldd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Butter roll perfection warm, soft, and buttery enough to make you question every other sandwich you’ve ever had. The lobster? Fresh, sweet. I did try adding extra lobster, but honestly, it didn’t change my life enough to justify the price  save that cash for dessert or another roll.

The place is tiny, with just a few outdoor tables, but you’re surrounded by adorable little shops, so it’s basically like eating luxury seafood in a postcard. The vibe is super chill and informal  the kind of place where you can wear flip flops, sip your drink, and watch people browse stuff they don’t need.

Easily one of the best lobster rolls I’ve ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0rXsUmVHj7i1ItzyB6YIT&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-8-12"},{"Name":"lizbeth salgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWEX7YySPecMUj9BPzXU3T2KbNXJBo4O47m_ZiR5PRYbLR1dvC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Delicious and juicy  lobster rolls. The only reason I give it 4 stars instead of 5 is that I was hoping to get French fries with our lobster roll combo but instead we got small bags of chips and 2 soda cans. Other lobster places I have had in the past normally come with a side of fresh French fries. Clam chowder was delicious too and very flavorful. Staff was friendly and will definitely come here again next time I come to La Jolla","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfrGmRU4PHpDNTwdOro9HP&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Belly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwaDqNtuUOyl-_JRoZSNHG5ud5hy6520FDQFPdQGaXq7MDcjc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lobster roll was delicious! Make sure to ask for the meat warmed. We did get the boss lobster roll and don’t think we got the value of meat for how much we paid. There wasn’t much lobster inside the sandwich, just on top to make it look like a lot more than it was. However, it was really good anyways especially with the warmed meat. The coleslaw was also a delicious addition!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtJSkXw6jlN4bXpgjuud7W&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Krista Kroll","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqLbLoN_tVWSZiu9gR7ZrOOVM9qYA65JunCuWeCRFNgPHuYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Expensive not worth it spend your money at a difference seafood place. Lobster was served cold on the bread (bread was good) but not much flavor which I was expecting. Clam chowder was decent but way over priced. $32 for a roll and very small clam chowder","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9SiZxwcS5t3zxDBXDbHSJ&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"David Cho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1zM5XB7jSBjxI6NQM7bFmhpBe9fQQuwrD8lj_r-M8KX1RwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great little spot in La Jolla for a quick bite when in the mood for a lobster roll and chowda. I ask myself this at every lobster roll shop though. Was it worth it? Usually the answer is yes, but I’ll save the five star reviews for the place that wows me at that price point. I opted for the “boss” lobster roll which has 50% more meat at $31. Not sure if the regular would have been disappointing or not, but I guess we will never know cause the boss was good, so assume the regular would be lacking. The sandwich was very good, but at $31, it better be. The best value in my opinion was the flight of three soups for $12 and is easily the only reason I would go back. You can get a lobster roll almost anywhere these days, but the trio of soups was a bit unique and right up my alley cause I can never choose just one. All three were delish. Lobster bisque being my favorite. Didn’t have lobster meat, but at $4 avg per soup, had the right flavors. Really can’t go wrong with any of the soups, but the option to try all three was a marketing winner. Parking on a rainy Monday was not easy, so plan accordingly. I was just passing through, so trying for street parking. If you plan to check out the local shops, there was public parking, but the one closest couldn’t accommodate the height of my truck.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIuLyWUw&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-4-6"},{"Name":"Nhat Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlUQbmRvxBU2ymLYr1_odgPdrZXHb_k6m0kcxkwIa0L8AJeLu-bw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Of the best lobster roll outside. Lobster West in La Jolla serves up a buttery, packed-to-the-brim roll that's pure happiness. It's my go-to spot in San Diego for a seafood fix. Every bite is perfection, and the staff is super friendly. You can't beat it","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAquGcXmgbxuesVZE79XTlz&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Debi M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqKMP7M15_vejMS_zRximWJv1XygeYQK2miW5sglkY53i3pJmJkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We thought the lobster was delicious! Also, considering it is Maine lobster, price was very reasonable. We pay the same being from CT and much closer!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRPoqlAaUISVvH_pgL9xAg&fid=0x0:0x86af65d36f03867a"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Ayerim Pichardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1K0T74qnK8AFewT9oEd4zEXaBS88rPpNET_e8m4y0KlfSNICf5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I had super high expectations about the place. The food is good but decent. The attention could've way better. The place was empty and they served the order and the person  never ask us if we need something else or give us other recommendations. It's just ok. The restroom was super dirty.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tu Ngo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6lnkQEH5f9aU7kKQQPVHLcAq6gBPDMUNPPhWBqkO6uEVC5J4iMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pastries were pretty good, not overly sweet. The Le Royal had a nice strong chocolate flavor, the hazelnut cream on top paired really well with the chocolate mousse plus the crunchy layer which made the whole cake slice very enjoyable. Blueberry danish was also good even though I wish the bread was a little less dense. Mushroom danish was quite savory. I’ll definitely come back to try more stuff next time I’m in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4GoboeumFiCfDkqboJLHb&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Arkady Borkovsky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdjp2Jq0AL6N_cwyk0oEvsV2UePTVHVOIswukPmtI6JQzPCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A rare find - a true French patisserie, with perfect pasties and good coffees.
We come here whenever we are in the area.
Today’s croissant was delicious.
The passion fruit pastry makes you think of Hawaii ;albeit it is bit too sweet for me)
Located inside a luxury gift shop/ decor shop.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAB_oy-vHGEOVVup35r3jyl&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Linus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2B3oXoEVm2qe390aTXcgeWrZ7KNNCXSuddfFdPkCG3-wLP8gtIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had the rose filed croissant and it was delicious but was hoping for a stronger flavor profile. The day we went it was one staff member running the front and it was pretty packed in there. I wish there was more seating available it’s two tables in the store and two out front but everything was packed and a very small area very over stimulating!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWIEyn7tGpC0YDdZACxrMi&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Sara Ar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCkEJJnGfzJ1TU-7WAl7_rKBdEAQ-VaJgMiTJ3hbz903fS4mMuNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"​Excellent patisserie with a beautiful shop setup. The entremets were outstanding, and both the pecan and pistachio danish were favorites. A minor note: the cream filling was a bit heavy in the standard croissant, and the rose/matcha croissant could benefit from a touch more sweetness and less cream. Highly recommend visiting this spot!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3LGzFx0aWTuiSY-BuQYoG&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There was a big line for this bakery at the LaJolla Wine and Arts festival. They had set up in front of their shop. Everything looked so delicious, and beautiful too. And they were so delicious! I especially  like the salted caramel tart.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALbPA_Am_Vqtu_f7GLBCrz&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Georgianna OliverSmith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUv_fwwWxqe3uJZwhYuj_QVXTEsOoJ9JYeLYTHKOkdj-VCvEIv1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I didn’t know exactly what to expect going into this little Parisien bakery in the back of a flower shop, but I was honestly blown away. It’s charming and impressive from the second you walk in with its beautiful pastries and sweet atmosphere. The baristas were very nice and attentive to my food allergy, and even gave suggestions. If you’re from San Diego and looking for somewhere new to try, or a visitor stopping by in La Jolla, Parisien Gourmandises should be at the top of your list!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdeKZc7IUYt0NbcVsFp-LD&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2025-7-24"},{"Name":"Oleh Yurchyshyn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJpzLWH6Umd8w5U3YgutpdK7njZi3sSDtUKcrTi49wO80mrLM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional French-style pastry — a rare find in San Diego 🤩
The croissants are beautifully laminated, with a crisp exterior and delicate buttery layers inside. Balanced flavor, not overly rich or greasy. Truly authentic French craftsmanship.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXHakCxcj24OdYslq7D_XQ&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Amanda Adames","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO1jV6pUGbPB-mmpHsPqoAg1QeVcyi8vCGNGs4JShUGQVcVkM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Parisien Gourmandises created the most exquisite pastries and birthday cake for my daughter’s first birthday and they completely surpassed our expectations. The cake was not only stunning and exactly what we had envisioned (if not better), but every bite was absolutely delicious. The flavors were refined, balanced, and clearly made with great care and skill.
Every time I visit the café, I’m blown away by the warm and professional atmosphere. The staff consistently greets every guest the moment they walk in, even when the café is bustling. It’s clear that hospitality is a priority here and it shows in every interaction.
I want to especially highlight Sascha. She is truly exceptional. Her knowledge of each pastry is impressive, and you can immediately tell how passionate she is about her work. Her customer service is second to none. If she’s not helping a customer, she’s bussing tables or making sure everything in the café is absolutely perfect. She goes above and beyond every time.
Since COVID, it's no secret that customer service in many places has taken a hit. But visiting Parisien Gourmandises feels like a blast from the past, a beautiful reminder of what outstanding service, care, and craftsmanship in food look like. From taste to presentation to experience, everything is top notch.
Highly, highly recommend this place. Whether you're planning a special event or just stopping in for a treat, Parisien Gourmandises is a standout in every way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBx_w1krEa3NbGRtPewrDwl&fid=0x0:0x55dce061d47b6566"],"When":"2025-9-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Small restaurant in La Jolla that gets pretty busy so expect to wait a bit for your food. We came here on a weekday for brunch and were luckily able to snag a table by the entrance before a big group came in.
Counter order and find your own table.

The blue whale brekky, steak & eggs, and French toast were all delicious. I really like the sauteed greens that came with the brekky. The French toast was beautiful and was basically desserts for breakfast. Yum!Portions were big.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBP1SzQGxho63bwj4RSHBsR&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Lea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViITsGHqy94AAPrNnmXUU14zlG2F8QzaCJdiByRN1PKGnKMLXW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to the Blue Whale for all three days of our trip to La Jolla! The drinks and food were delicious and flavorful. The entire staff was also extremely friendly and welcoming. We’d recommend this place to anyone in La Jolla and will definitely come again when we visit again :)

PS - our favorite drink was the mango tajín smoothie!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1ruLvRlqFgrKSJ4G23dIl&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Charlene Hsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYm2AHqPn55t7qWiTX-2jJPaSqRQ1FgAB05oWwYNtsBOfWLFN_Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The lattes are pretty solid in the cutest mugs and the french toast is pretty hefty and filling. Super cute little cafe with such a beachy vibe. The decor is super cute and gives such a cafe by the sea look.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFx6-A6zzGESMFUn5wzjJV&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Ghazal Ghasempour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFqYiMML8J0Sihh6VtIH9oBqvrNBi8VE1K1HwcMKD0bjKj79ZrVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I really enjoyed the coffee shop. I went there to work but it is busy for working and the music is loud. It is better for hanging out.
I had a rose tea and really enjoyed it.
The parking situation is a bit difficult and hard to find, buy over all it was a great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1dHveVNJp1p7PFNKX3Tig&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Leah Bosé","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBzBuVkHrxw0HwUU_o9wCnQclhjHAweIlizRdtAVhIh8LPTKcwgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had a delicious and breezy Sunday brunch on the patio today and it felt so good!! We arrived at 9:30am - the line moved quick and we were able to find a table with no wait. The drinks were not overly sweet and we both loved our dishes.

I ordered the Morning Sando and it was perfectly crisp, with a soft buttery middle. The hash brown had no business being as good as it was - in hindsight I wish I had ordered an extra!!

If you arrive anytime after 10, the wait for a table starts to increase. There's no AC inside, but they keep the windows open to let the breeze though. The patio has ample umbrellas and we were seated in full shade which was nice. Blue Whale is quaint, but super cute and absolutely worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb6b-Qbg&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2024-7-28"},{"Name":"Mala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJR4aKDFP1WAzFuaT8KHszEg9w6DlJPAeitzp2e4tHzO1z6ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Super cute summery café with delicious brunch options. Their strawberry matcha was absolutely incredible, and I also enjoyed the lavender iced latte. I had their blue whale brekky; sourdough bread was perfectly crispy but unfortunately the eggs were too well done and quite dry. The ube pancakes were moist and flavorful with fresh blueberries- absolutely recommend. You order at the counter but they have some nice seats outside. On the pricey side but worth it. Would come again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDO9J4vADo1-OFQIFRprwOT&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2025-7-16"},{"Name":"Michelle Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-iCZLnxO2RobxX3yeQbGEoILsjR-EdJzfH9E3xs2xspI5Ym89=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dog friendly place and wheelchair friendly. There’a about 9 tables outside that seat 2-4 each and a couple inside as well. The lines are pretty long but definitely worth it! We got the lobster roll and the honey bee blueberry smoothie. Both were pricey but they do not skimp out on the lobster. It was so delicious. I’m not a big fan of lobster rolls but this one was hands down my favorite! Even though it was more of a sandwich than a roll, the bread was perfectly buttered and toasted. I’ll be coming back to try out the rest of the menu!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYgcfUZw&fid=0x0:0x74753ac3b552ca2a"],"When":"2025-5-4"},{"Name":"evelyn westfield","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_0N3N6zcPZ_49nKeExAbQ2g2OIpOFt98ihwS9v1wQ-h-XWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"the breakfast bowl was the least flavorful meal i’ve ever ordered. dry arugula on grains and hummus with no seasoning. the egg on top was overcooked. i was shocked at how flavorless the food was for being $20. i usually don’t leave reviews but i felt like i had to since this place is so popular","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Brandon Nolte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtoI3lwUCA8iBkLYqFo-PJFi8nZL1hASn6zauNOtNn1h7iNciedg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The sunset views over La Jolla Shores are beautiful, and the staff was genuinely kind and welcoming, which made the visit worthwhile. The food, however, was fairly average. The ceviche tasted a bit plain, and the soup could have used more acidity and some added texture to bring it to life. Portions were generous, but the flavors didn’t quite match the setting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsq2yNhtl_0Z2UF0-Ue6QM&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Steven Ellison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgm2rhMx1vVtkcb2q0QinNjOilo4SWZa7bzPlYJDG-9YIrKN-xqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have a dog friendly patio, which we had never realized. The patio was right on the beach, which was really cool! We were surprised at how many dogs were on the patio. The service is always top notch. The menu has slowly been going downhill, it used to be much fancier fare but it's slowly going simpler and cheaper. That's fine for attracting more customers, but it feels like such a fancy place to eat that they should still have a lot more higher end items on their menu. The food itself is fine, it's good but I've never felt wowed by it. They validate parking, which is important if you're going on a busy beach day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCu4x1HLxzve7do_29JM5uC&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Andrew Deluise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtTsoT63PKuwGhSFjdSI5UXiAas8AnT9GiHbcsB_ZLpiIB-hph=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"🌊 Beachfront Bliss Awaits! 🍸🧉🍻🍷🥂

Looking for the perfect spot to relax by the waves? This restaurant offers an unbeatable beachfront location where you can enjoy a snack, lunch, or dinner with stunning ocean views.

✨ Why you’ll love it:

Immaculate service that goes above and beyond.

Delicious dishes crafted with care.

Cozy vibes—even on brisk nights (thanks to those heat lamps!).

I started with the mussels appetizer—a rich tomato mussel broth paired with warm garlic bread. Absolutely divine! 🍞🦪
To complement it, I sipped on their house Pinot Grigio, which was crisp and refreshing.

If you’re craving great food, amazing drinks, and a relaxing seaside experience, this is the place to be. 🌅","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1kpigGgDXyX1vFkOHJPc7&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Esther Jou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMVyF5wt6GqUJiD03NhBLa9pMHY_dVdo195k-DtUorQz1XifPXHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The restaurant is located inside the hotel, has a beach front view with inside and outdoor seating facing the beach and ocean. We went on Saturday morning around 11am and there wasn’t a wait for tables. The food took about 15 minutes to come out, tasted not bad, but also not amazing. Standard American brunch food - omelette and turkey sandwich (the sweet potato fries tasted off). Server was great, really friendly and attentive! Would come back for the vibes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDASbZUxJSjIwXo7Dt0fums&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"The Calm one","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGFdrg_jxwLTraOfcIrgn3HLajC0aFs08VW5z54mSCYiluhLLv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had come here for the Easter Brunch. It was decent. Great Ahi poke,Prime Rib,salmon, crab legs, shrimp,chicken with spinach and mushroom, root vegetable, omelet station, salad, fruit, cookies. Total per person after tip and tax $125. I should have taken more photos but I was to busy eating pounds of Ahi and prime Rib. Service was great and the view is perfection","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoxMLA3gE&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-4-22"},{"Name":"Maria Mnatsakanova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvXbwttzyydYB06fa8wV9HX-aAoYsibNJz1nzDLykVyyDfSmr3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had breakfast, lunch, and dinner at The Shores, and every time, it’s been a great experience. The food is always delicious, and I never skip the ceviche - it’s a must.

But for me, it’s never just about the food. I love places where all my senses are engaged: the ambiance, warmth, service, and of course, the views.

The Shores is part of a hotel, and while the hotel isn’t the newest, the restaurant is well-maintained, welcoming, and beautifully set up. The staff is always friendly, the dishes are colorful and beautifully presented, and the whole space just feels good.

The view is phenomenal. My favorite spot is in the arch booth by the bar, looking out through the arched windows to the ocean. Any time of day, it’s beautiful, but for sunset, book in advance. Also, very kid-friendly, which makes it even better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ1qivvgE&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-3-4"},{"Name":"Jason Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX07JenIwnRNWREuEseQBt7lHS7zq8lAcH8IlSKpWd4NWAiR-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"located at the Shores hotel, very quaint, reasonably priced lunch menu. sit indoor or outdoor and people watching along the boardwalk. the yellowtail tacos 🌮 were filling, but their sweet potato fries were yummy 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB98kPjDBB3j6pCYOfjRKZA&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Omid Armani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrUkcCz6ajAJJDjoi9stPVFviVXyVuYMaSlzMeieqRNiWBvIxd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We chose this restaurant primarily for the waterfront view and made a reservation in advance for outdoor seating for a party of seven. We arrived on time, but were seated indoors, far from any windows. When I mentioned that our reservation was specifically for outdoor seating, the host told us they don’t have outdoor seating available for a party of seven. I then pointed out a large empty patio table with eight seats, but was told the table was “closed” and that the manager had confirmed it wouldn’t be used. We reluctantly sat inside. Not long after, we watched another party the same size as ours get seated at that exact table.

The food was okay but portions were very small for the price. Nothing terrible, but not in line with the prices.

I’m giving this place 3 stars mainly for the potential of the view—assuming you’re actually able to secure a window or patio table.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Heidi’s Gotta Tell Ya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYeVckm7ZC7Wj6E5ofWi_R85ztWsKnf5l0pOs5x3r24xXtRDzt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The Shack Bar and Grill was a little spot my husband and I stumbled upon while visiting La Jolla Beach. At first, it wasn’t the best start—it took about five minutes before a waitress noticed us. But once she started taking care of us, the experience turned around, and we were glad we stopped in.

We shared the fish and chips, which were delicious! Tip: eat the fries right away while the fish cools down, because the fries lose their heat quickly.

This place doesn’t have any bells and whistles—it’s simple, casual, and all outdoor seating. Just keep in mind it can get hot sitting outside during the summer months.

Overall, I would say that if you are in the area and want a local pub vibe this would be a cute place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBj2Bj8JIgJJi31Ph2a_R2p&fid=0x0:0x732cf479d193ece4"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Brandon Gibson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuqYt18ELeBkmWsyxhMT-bwKQu7ghsXxSwyE4HM0fLvANVeepQ7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"If you're looking for standard pub grub, this is the place. No frills, pretty basic and tasty for what it is. This place is definitely for atmosphere. Great vibe, fun patio nice pool table and near the beach. Service wasn't good, but then again they were slammed with only 2 people to run the whole thing. Even with that considered, I feel like it could have been better in terms of the service. I'd go back, but if you're not a patient person, this could post a challenge. I do live the vibe if the place though.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLkqCs8QE&fid=0x0:0x732cf479d193ece4"],"When":"2024-6-26"},{"Name":"D G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWA1W45zkhySBBdBMrz_VgQ3GgxrUDH-yz8mq9lm2ngtaamF5F5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were traveling from Texas and an old navy officer recommended. Amazing place to eat. Truly a gem and they have fantastic burgers (1/2 pound) and great wings. Marissa was wonderful and the place has a cool vibe! We loved everything except for the limited parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBkpKZkQE&fid=0x0:0x732cf479d193ece4"],"When":"2022-12-21"},{"Name":"Royal Washington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXooq-DdepTqfq6pCHhDAr8eKINe8EPn29P4LuKhN71nxXzxi8i=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing ambience at The Shack brought to you by Kayla. Enjoyed the Midwest hospitality during the holidays as I’m missing home. Great mix of energy jokes and pure entertainment from the soul.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brittany Schlesinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAdwyQ22am9JpPdk3-zR1GIiSloekzTuleXA2sHNpYNGddBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kayla was amazing. Great customer service! The chicken nachos are exceptional! Last year we stayed down the street at the hotel and found this place after a long day at the beach. We come here every year now to get them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vincent Freeman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7p76kU0kajJzbf407q-en2xQC7Bou5bhvz5G9SByZ-4R-V633=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Was pretty good food I got the fish and chips but my fish were all kinda stuck together the chips a queso were really good  I thought it would come with salsa instead it was more like pico de gallo all and all a good  experience 200 bucks tip included for 6 people
Little pricey but what isn't these days ....they only got 4 stars cause of parking and food otherwise a great establishement","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmLhcBJQpjSvF0fF8PumTZ&fid=0x0:0x732cf479d193ece4"],"When":"2025-7-20"},{"Name":"matthew beaudoin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3BVqbb0AsTL5NzAW63IbIrCO_UUkXVpOteEDXFG7C_KXOCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kayla welcomed us as soon as we was liked in the door.  She gave us recommendation of the Shack Burger.  The burger is amazing, size, not too big, but enough.  And don’t forget the tater tots.    Amazing taste and the sauce is amazing.  Kayla checked in on us throughout our lunch.  I recommend the Shack bar & grill in La Jolla.   From Mi Kasa Hot Springs","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Schuur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAsuuompwgSX41SR8c6Lf5xIpIgpoa8H1V8i8ay9AcmdtURA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"VERY cool casual little place in La Jolla. [{"Name":"Diana Griego","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWLp4ggSoqqjwYfdEyjVEwz02gwcjnfiObUltCquf-cediogj3IA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is incredible!!! I am always looking for an amazing salad with fresh ingredients and good chicken. The salads were amazing. We ordered the kale  ceasar with chicken and the Cobb. The Gold Coast soup was also delicious!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBkRsIaZPoX7F_Nlmsjm0AR&fid=0x0:0x52b2b9a3453063a9"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"CDG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzFx43WTgk1OE1TPPEZNXe_MlSqueCFa0VEPWZR3x9b_LVVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Salad is great, dressing is great, staff is great. One of the better installments in OB in a while.

Only constructive criticism is the last two times I paid for chicken to be added but didn’t receive any, not a huge deal but it is $5 extra charge so a bit of a bummer.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kimberly stratman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpDMA4tEM7K3jMl6z9mHQ-k6g_ssSAabICXgeepvOU7lhdpm0U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered our Mediterranean salad to go. Dressing on the side and added an egg.
The salad was packaged great. Everything was crisp and fresh.
Very pleased with the service and the price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren Halla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6o6uiozhpFjX8c8HI5NYwx_bs7RdfMn9S9aQXdeYSSaTL7GE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best new addition to Ocean Beach!! The salads are fresh, creative, and full of flavor and color. I'm currently hooked on the Harvest Cobb salad and think about it daily. The staff is super friendly, the building is very clean and bright. If you need lunch or dinner, and don't want to feel tired or sluggish after, this is your place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mercan Findikoglu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU22B06IR_VazsfnlBuTzofDL7Adv2smhTr3jrb3B0ph5tSPo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by this salad place on a whim, and it completely blew me away. Everything tasted incredibly fresh — you can tell they actually care about the quality of their ingredients. I built my own bowl with mixed greens, grilled chicken, avocado, and roasted corn, and the balance of textures and flavors was perfect. The dressing (a tangy lemon vinaigrette) tied it all together without being overpowering.

The staff were super friendly and got my order out quickly, even during lunch rush. The place was spotless, and the atmosphere felt clean and modern — perfect for a quick healthy meal or even just hanging out.

If you want something light but filling, this is the spot. Definitely my new go-to for salads!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"mariah mack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhN-eMhTIoEkuc5NxZISQqQoEREhkD8cv997gahntUb_d_05D5sA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mary’s Salad is a true gem. The food is incredibly fresh and delicious, and the people make the experience even better. Such a gorgeous café with great energy—everything feels thoughtful and made with care. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dede Sabey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuBV47fWlStyOb8jzGLtIvLrwQksxvkPQBew9FsiEybEMarw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their salads are so delicious. The space is simple and small but very well designed (love their serving bowls). We came for lunch and were all blown away. Even my 8yo boy loved his salad and he doesn't usually care for salad. We ordered the cobb, the chopped and super food. Our entire party raved about the food all day. Highly recommend. Only thing that could have been better was a table inside... But we got sweatshirts and a blanket and sat outside watching the world go by. [{"Name":"Jen Kaminski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLGzUTEFOsvxbazzdxNzECp_zzTfNrGb3kheOR4mev8DWXjdvC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place sooo much!! The pear cambazola salad, all the soups, lamb stew, beef bourguignon, best homemade bread, and lemonade are some of my staples. In an ever changing and growing San Diego, it is so nice to have a consistent and quality place for homemade food that tastes and feels the same as when I went the first time 20 years ago. The owner is still there all the time working super hard running everything and keeping Girard Gourmet amazing. Everyone working there is also super friendly. 5 stars every time I go 🙂","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA64-WDomP5QoQSk-oDSMtS&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Zsuzsanna Sziveri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtl89jDJ0XT8XnOM7Fp0KP7nESstqeOotJjs65EhkDpNCdYoRGtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great bakery. It's been there for over 70 years. No vegan pastries, but they had a nice 15 bean soup or carrot soup. Busy during lunch hours.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuFcqmpqGSm1pZekb5DM2e&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Annalee Sasahara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDYdM2wfKaZM3JLplQS6bhxKbw-yxBuietTBOcvUdriNwaX9_c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love this place! Their sandwiches are delicious and it has such a homey vibe. Staff is excellent and extremely kind. Service is usually very quick and lots of seating available inside and outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRMJcGmu9yV1fLmCebj1O3&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Jodi Rudick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtlmu2azGhNSic81LeeJvtJ8bAcqTAep1RGy-p-21m0S-vKR1e=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Girard Gourmet is a must-visit in the heart of La Jolla Village. The food is consistently delicious, beautifully prepared, and incredibly tempting—from savory pot pies and comforting hot plates to fresh soups, salads, sandwiches, and irresistible tarts.

Diane, the owner, is often on hand with a warm welcome, which makes the experience feel especially personal. The staff is friendly, knowledgeable, and always happy to help you choose just the right dish.

I’m a huge fan of their specialty cookies—they’re creative, seasonal, and always perfectly match the mood. Everything here looks amazing, tastes even better, and keeps me coming back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vita & Vox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ4scpln3ripT7aKeiW2l6V85Nsv83px9l1_K0KPFGiqlZCP3Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Not a fancy spot, but a really solid choice when you’re hungry.
The food is good quality with a nice variety to choose from—perfect for a quick bite or snack. I asked for a chai tea latte, and they made it especially for me, which was such a nice touch. The apple strudel was also really good—fresh and flavorful. It’s a casual, comfortable place that delivers exactly what you need when you’re craving something tasty and satisfying.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELuMtLOO85ePdg&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"Alexis Barrios","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0gWKDgTb4ycFosOkfFyB3bOZDRdnlPhNf71vzFXyWYXwE-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were just walking by looking for a coffee, and we end up in this amazing place!

First of all, I want to recall the five star attention from all the staff including the owners, and adorable couple!

We ordered a quiche, blue berry muffin, capuccino and a latte, everything was good.

This place is very pet friendly, they offered our pup a piece of ham and water, we are very grateful for that as we just came back from the beach.

This will be our new fav spot in La Jolla!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBC7WWBBIkQVGhQtBCMzKY0&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-6-21"},{"Name":"Fiona Bratvold","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkKVshxGxVMEEGCFFS3gcEVu3bxn4uRZ1N7p-__IzVtiTHsl7bdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow!!! Our Girard sandwich was delicious and huge. Thank goodness we shared one. It was toasted with turkey, bacon and veggies in it. I really enjoyed it as well as the cowboy cookie. Everything looked good. I will probably go back tomorrow and get one of the pies. Limited Seating inside and out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA7uTdoQE&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-2-1"},{"Name":"DREA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxOBX6VV9ETU8JaFRepx5xRv3GUslvfgxdaC3OCrvDPIgwENIf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"if you come here i hope you don’t get the red head male with metal glasses! really rude! i asked if i could have my sandwich all the way literally using their own terms that they use here (btw i come here all the time) and he replied back with an attitude “ohhh so you don’t want me bother you by asking a million of questions ” um excuse me i just asked for all the way as mayo, mustard, micro greens, pepperoncini’s, red onions, literally alllll the wayyyy… and then to my disappointment he made the most basic sandwich when i paid $14 for this","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDY_C37VL7hBcXh3LK_y7Y_&fid=0x0:0xb70505379df5ad2c"],"When":"2025-7-20"}]

[{"Name":"lalo valdivia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvJE0aIVdqgVVdIXqrkH_j2Y07Pkqq2_u3B4Io_ZSxjxooFrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Taylor served us during our first visit, her service was horrible that night. I had to get up multiple times to ask for water refills at the bar, condiments or even  my receipt  after we paid and were waiting to leave. When she brought our food she was quick to walk away and didn't ask if we needed anything else. Good thing Sabrina and Austin from the bar were super nice and were able to help us with our needs even though the bar was a bit busy. Food and everything else was great, not letting one person ruin this place for us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgfi-yAdSo-88UyO8iyFWf&fid=0x0:0x140dd1f246c88085"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Jason Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX07JenIwnRNWREuEseQBt7lHS7zq8lAcH8IlSKpWd4NWAiR-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great indoor/outdoor dining, overalll good vibe, live music, and awesome food. we came for their famous burgers 🍔 but ended up with entrees recommended by the locals...Mac n cheese is flavorful, salmon was perfect, and tomato soup with grilled cheese was a hit too 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOrlX7WN3wVObMgKaEeNmF&fid=0x0:0x140dd1f246c88085"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Candice Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUq2IiOzb38NcRdZffGpz14rWY_21RckyQmCz0OM8NW1BwoL8ww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered the shepherds pie and onion soup… truly, I have never in my life tasted something so revolting in my entire existence. This place needs to be gone for good!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tom Klopack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINHhAulVKTwRJfB35hEqPMFaZWuHbYj6oeLPUR6e7ZnVzik9k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good bar food and beer selection with usually a game on the TVs.
