user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Blediana Noka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwjvhwXnr7N8C4X_gQyguJr6e4poe-fmM8DizsjqX7fVKFS5M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pepino is a place that I have been waiting for a while to have its own shop. I love the food, and the storytelling that comes with the flavors and items on the menu. Chef Sebastian definitely showcases his love for food and his roots in the menu and the way he presents food; very simple, but packed with flavor.

My favorites right now are the Lomo Saltado burrito, where the taste of spring onions and meat blends incredibly, and the dulce de leche pionono is a must try dessert. It's a must place for the people in the neighborhood and not only.

Lastly, it's a place that stays open from 8am - 4pm which is rare for a bakery / eatery in SD!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFRbhFdPShQ4gsJzdlfz8Y&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Connor McMorrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPfJPgIWuiAamiZo94q_qbPtTmYSU86LLQ_hMNL6Wx59yrdEafFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pepino’s grand opening was everything we hoped for and more. The space looks amazing - warm, welcoming, and full of that homey, family vibe the moment you walk in. The food? Absolutely unreal. The Lomo Saltado burrito was packed with flavor, the New Yorker breakfast sandwich is already iconic, and the seasonal pumpkin coffee cake with cream cheese drizzle just took it to another level. It’s been so cool watching the transition from pop-ups to a full-blown restaurant, and they’ve absolutely nailed it. Can’t wait to keep coming back again and again and again. Chef Sebi is a legend. Pepino is here to stay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-ol68oye7SDN4QKn_2BOV&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Madeleine Stone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqDddvJYGsQDoly_SocE8JzVcjUcoVVAI15Sv1nZTYTVDdZ8llPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Súper fast and delicious! The lomo saltado burrito is just as tasty as it looks and the yucca fries were a great pairing. The sauces helped it all come together:)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD913_jxuHUcBI1e989CLaC&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Brittany Noris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItoyZz989iTDx5qt94FdE91uJf_MgjXpxnvqRx_9vyTMugyA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"BEST PLACE! Wow this is my third time here in two weeks and I keep craving the amazing burrito that they have. It has the perfect flavors that meld so incredibly. And to top it off the service was so quick - we got our food about 5 min after we ordered it with it being so fresh! We couldn’t resist the pastries on our way out and bought two to go which was the best decision. I will definitely be keeping it in my weekly rotation, such amazing food, ambiance and customer service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATmS2Ziouxje8U4DQB5le8&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Denise Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCEZxe8CKrxRjzENUM13AgtMP2m-7_MDc_dnLkCWG6s4ChgCeJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Omgoodness, delicious!!!! Pepino Eatery and Bakeshop was recommended by my favorite chef and did not steer me wrong. ☺️I had the Loma Saltado Burrito which is a breakfast burrito with shredded beef, tiny tater tots, egg perfectly ripened avocado and all kinds of goodness 😋 The staff is friendly and really love what they do. Definitely a Go-To 😁🥳","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgHg5-eAKd3e3sGxuNUr-M&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Jillian Imilkowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSA0ahe69qyv1-Y_E99brXOeiRA93-CqiAkldc22Y88w48qvKTTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Grand opening and I am so impressed by the service, food quality and atmosphere! Got a New Yorker and some Orange Juice. Delightful way to kick off my day. Am loving seeing the community support for this new local spot! I can already tell that this is going to be hot spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6HoZuyBwzfColhku79GjV&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Udy Watta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTdB96E4llE6SyPkjNLSpUe75e2WQcNV9rMgjeEEXGMG6OGZiF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely incredible food and experience!

The Lomo Saltado burrito was next-level amazing--only the second time I've ever had one, and this was hands-down the best. The meat was cooked to perfection: incredibly juicy, packed with flavor, and unlike any burrito I've had before. The sauces that came with it were outstanding and tied everything together beautifully.

The sweet potato bowl deserves its own praise--my vegetarian wife said it was the best she's ever had. That alone says a lot.

The restaurant has indoor seating, and with the open air windows in the La Jolla atmosphere, people-watching, and the beautiful weather--it made the meal even better.

We felt so lucky to stumble upon this place. With so many options in La Jolla, finding the best spot on our very first try felt like winning the food lottery.

We will absolutely be back the next time we're in La Jolla. A must-visit!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Creagan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuSKtXGPbV3acxifde4RceuuueO9i9IoeKUWx5FX0TZ521uA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything about this place is amazing! We both got the Lomo Saltado Burro and drip coffee. It’s the best breakfast burrito I’ve had in San Diego. So tender and juicy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDihZBPoJkF_RA-Flds2rfJ&fid=0x0:0x10beab9da2fd1497"],"When":"2026-1-11"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"TAO SHI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_HhV39U7Kpk8arUdUsIdabnb1YjDtQ_HfRzbcFZwzI8KP-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a wonderful small cafe. Everything surprised us. We came here in the morning of Christmas Day. The place was packed with people. We waited in the queue for about 15 minutes before placing our orders. My wife ordered morning burrito and I ordered eggs and smoked salmon. The food was so delicious. My wife loves her hearty burrito, made from soft spinach wrap with scrambled eggs, bacon and potato cubes inside, with a cup of hot Latte. Mine came in 3 sunny-side-up eggs, fresh smoke salmon, grilled asparagus and slices of avocado with a large piece of sourdough bread toast and a cup of English Breakfast Tea. Honestly we had a most delicious breakfast here in the year. The servers were nice but not over friendly. They did everything right. The place was crowded but they cleaned your table quickly before the mess over your table for too long. The other thing we loved was the price. It turned out it was cheaper than that of New York’s where we came from. I strongly recommend this cafe to everyone who happens to be in La Jolla Cove. Thumbs up!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhhmUxkxBBfKo-r62JHxTa\u0026fid=0x0:0x76ffc9fc2e32ccf5"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Lion Mane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVADA9_5qxwcqMNh3gvKpcx_lOHzuCsVcNg1KCl031ibotaxLcT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enjoyed every bit of my meal…The salads are super fresh and crisp, and the tofu is always made to perfection. Parking is brutal so make sure you’re not so hungry when you want to go here….You’ll be circling around a bit until finding a good spot, but this place is worth the hunt! Enjoy!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAphUaOFlNiC6EpXYZR3Y67\u0026fid=0x0:0x76ffc9fc2e32ccf5"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Elena Arredondo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9TZksYvxRQQPjoaoemPLoDynKdGvHilymbaMSLLfgeRAQ0kxY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a cute place I’m always fond of French style and food type. The cups are more durable than standard single use cups I feel like you could reuse them at home which is nice","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDg3iYysGuKOtqwtD-pczyd\u0026fid=0x0:0x76ffc9fc2e32ccf5"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My husband and I went on a mystery picnic in LA jolla, and this was one of our stops. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"cathyc 444","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKjVG0eCwBxhEqWqRygnyA48fWOZlQy1d5L-b21_3V4VxsNC69=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a gem!  Maybe only the locals know about it…

The View:  As the namesake it is as beautiful as is the ambiance on a blindingly sunny day!  All tables are positioned to see the sea, sky and beyond.

The Service: The restaurant is quaint and well staffed and the service is on point.

The Menu: Lunch Menu is simple and a must try is the wild salmon sandwich, but be ready to get messy!  Come here hungry!😋

The Chef: Executive Chef Ernest Lopez has been with the restaurant since 12/2024.  He brings with him a spin to the local bounty La Jolla  is known for!

If you are looking for: great food paired with a good wine selections… look no further!

It just maybe my new meet up place in La Jolla!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1FhgI6jsnZ4-oDTXsWuyv&fid=0x0:0xd3c0f6dafcf62ffb"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Rina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkCvzF10p5M8FaZcu0kuNwJEOZzKnIEjfUQvoV56AyUbZE1Qqz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had the chance to visit this restaurant located near La Jolla Shores, and it was such a memorable experience. The restaurant sits on the 11th floor of a nearby hotel, which means the view is absolutely stunning. From the moment you walk in, the wide windows showcase the coastline and ocean, making it a perfect setting to enjoy a relaxed meal. It’s the kind of spot where you can sit back and take in the scenery while enjoying good food and conversation. I went there for lunch and ordered the BLT, which was prepared really well. The bread was nicely toasted, the bacon had a satisfying crunch, and the vegetables were fresh, making it a very enjoyable sandwich. I also tried the hummus, which was flavorful, creamy, and came with just the right sides for dipping. The combination of good food and that kind of view made it feel special without being overly formal. I can definitely see this being a wonderful place for a date or even just a relaxing afternoon meal with friends. Overall, I would recommend this restaurant to anyone visiting La Jolla Shores who wants great food in an unbeatable location with an amazing view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_e5C3U8YO5yPqmtQKOdE5&fid=0x0:0xd3c0f6dafcf62ffb"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Bericbogan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVv8s7f4J4ccxloKqbIedNqfri7QCtxcZ2Z39PiP0JB966UAtj6ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dinner at Sea and Sky in La Jolla was absolutely exceptional. [{"Name":"Kristine Warren","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCHDJph7hslZy2XW-ho8nPA-sKlXcsQP6aYnY9XL1bjDXflgviEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yum! We ordered a turkey wrap, and it was large enough for two people. My kids ordered Nutella French toast and, again, large enough for two people. I was pretty impressed with the portions for the price. They have a very expansive menu as well. The only complaint I have is the lemonade. It was just water with some lemon juice. Next time, I'll get a smoothie.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5puipLA&fid=0x0:0x372d3ed3c29b5c16"],"When":"2023-10-24"},{"Name":"Michael Soldate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8MRGFqs-uZrv_MNXgE7h0YEEcFPEXXY0mXqaWFzrPiN4Kfh4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Freshería in La Jolla is the ultimate spot for fresh, healthy, and downright delicious eats. Tucked away in the charming Village of La Jolla, this cozy little gem is all about serving up vibrant, nutrient-packed meals that leave you feeling good inside and out. If you’re into clean eating without sacrificing flavor, this place is a must-visit.

The Food:
Freshería’s menu is a celebration of fresh, whole ingredients with a creative twist. Their bowls are the star of the show—I went for the “Baja Bowl,” and it was a flavor explosion. Think quinoa, black beans, grilled chicken, avocado, pico de gallo, and a tangy lime vinaigrette, all layered to perfection. Every bite was fresh, satisfying, and packed with texture. They also have amazing tacos (the cauliflower ones are a game-changer) and salads that are anything but boring. Oh, and don’t skip their agua frescas—the watermelon mint is like a sip of summer.

Vibe:
The vibe at Freshería is laid-back and welcoming, with a casual, beachy feel that fits right in with La Jolla’s relaxed energy. The space is small but cozy, with a few outdoor tables where you can enjoy your meal while soaking up the SoCal sunshine. It’s the kind of place where you can roll up in your flip-flops, grab a quick bite, and feel totally at ease.

Service:
The staff are super friendly and genuinely passionate about the food they serve. They’re happy to walk you through the menu or make recommendations if you’re new to the Freshería experience. The service is quick and efficient, making it a great spot for a healthy meal on the go.

Overall:
Freshería is a breath of fresh air in La Jolla’s dining scene. It’s the perfect spot for anyone looking for a healthy, flavorful meal in a chill, no-fuss setting. Whether you’re a local or just passing through, this place is worth a visit. I’ll definitely be back to try more of their menu and soak in the good vibes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgmpDu1AE&fid=0x0:0x372d3ed3c29b5c16"],"When":"2025-2-16"},{"Name":"Ceci Jayo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZ-5o3RJXlsOa5b2IjlyXXbkxBek3vFa0B_427UNGUlHmwfD0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was surprised at how many breakfast options they have! I thought about getting one of their breakfast bagels, but they only had plain or wheat and I prefer an “Everything” bagel, so instead I shared two other dishes with my husband. We got the Avocado & Ham wrap and the Ham Omelette (swapping the ham for turkey) and the omelette was such a large portion that we just shared that and took the wrap to-go to enjoy later. The prices were pretty reasonable especially for the amount of food you get. They were also kind to give us some hot sauce. The food was nothing crazy special, pretty simple but seasoned well. Their smoothies and juices look good. The ambiance is just your basic little fast-food café. I noticed there are outlets on the walls and they have wifi in case you want to work from here, but the metal seats are not the most comfortable. I would certainly come here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDveOnkAE&fid=0x0:0x372d3ed3c29b5c16"],"When":"2024-3-31"},{"Name":"Esmeralda Sosa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUmX_zffpj67WZnr3QMHYFzAfGQvaytHJqQCitdWvHoYFJzIjbkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was amazing. My family ordered Chilaquiles with eggs. The amount of food you get for the price is unbelievable. We also ordered French toast which was amazingly delicious. We also ordered a Tinga Torta that was packed with lettuce and lots flavor in the Tinga. Also, the drinks are a must when coming here. We ordered the cucumber drink and it was delicious very flavorful. You can’t go wrong with the strawberry drink too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICp2YfLfA&fid=0x0:0x372d3ed3c29b5c16"],"When":"2023-8-6"},{"Name":"David Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXkdQjts6R_xLLJjJDnmmpQQg2Vhz5_dHizUMkIuDJlacNiOjZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great salads and juices, as well as a variety of açaí bowls! Very fresh. They also have breakfasts and a full coffee menu to go with it. There are no restrooms however, but this is really more of a grab-n-go spot (quick service) rather than a sit down restaurant. It’s just minutes from the beach too! Menu items all under $10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEy7mtdA&fid=0x0:0x372d3ed3c29b5c16"],"When":"2018-1-15"},{"Name":"gio sib","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz5eI_GT4iKyBnLuNMHBTJnxvPuNGt_gfr4trOEw-Um9QLgZlv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alex was amazing, he was always attentive to our needs. I came in and saw their menu, which has many vegetarian and vegan options, and was very excited since I'm a vegetarian.

I definitely recommend Fresheria for anything from the lattes to the lunch!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC51vKUEg&fid=0x0:0x372d3ed3c29b5c16"],"When":"2023-10-13"},{"Name":"Amanda Sandoval","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXHlqvxO1RI85Nk6txW4z75efadtjGxZa2yJiOZWa8VRV-JQh42g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I used to like their wrap but after I order a vegetarian one and they sent me with shrimp, and on a second try they sent with wrong ingredients, I give up.

Be aware there's stairs get up to reach this resturaunt, I didn't notice any other way to get up,  they have outside patio and inside seating. The restroom was small but clean and I had to wait to use it. Parking can be tricky during the weekend. We got here early on a Sunday and we're able to find two spots to park with no issues. The host, server, cook, and manager were all so attentive and helpful. We had the crab cake Benedict, and chefs special seafood omelette... Incredible! Topped with their BV Mocha (espresso and Mexican chocolate). Well worth the time and money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6qGK25Hc4J_Bvsf7QQPS9\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"amirreza bahramian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxHFcc51gr33_zTZGGzT6AgN3nwXRYGxpiL3-d2cwWA4WQE24=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ate a lobster sandwich with chicken soup for dinner, it was delicious and good quality, we had a great time since it was my wife's birthday that same night.\nThey are so friendly with us.\nI recommend it if you want delicious seafood and a great ocean view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6YFtrfy2MAzvbv9rJUinV\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Lij T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9uqDR9DTOTk9RqHe4-kNLFTAwKft2nRclHmDDKAhZUZAi9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I stopped in for a late breakfast on Labor Day. The setting is lovely, with beautiful ocean views from certain tables that make the visit worthwhile. The food itself was fairly ordinary and on the pricier side, but the atmosphere helps make up for it. My waiter was sweating and he said there was no fee to use credit card but the final bill aftwr paying showed a credit card fees.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwkBAID_WMlskpr7nu53-P\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Chaitrali Joshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlyozBEMuS3nHPhvyIThGh1b4TAIH1GtobCMZXe_7YNNFen3AR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We went to this spot because of some good reviews and it's views of the beach and ocean. But it was a great disappointment. First the lady who sat us down was very rude, stalled us for no reason. We saw our table was empty for a long time before we were seated. Its way too expensive for the food quantity and quality served. The food tasted very stale, was of bad quality and weird taste.  Their roasted garlic hummus and pita bread was good, but bread was bit burnt though. We order for buffalo cauliflower cakes, high tide tacos and vegan breakfast tacos. We could taste stale oil, the cauliflower cakes were fried probably too many times, it tasted like it was frozen for a long time before being served. The tacos were a disaster - broken tortillas,  too much filling, no taste other than side of salsa, very dry, no flavour. The ambience is okay, though questionable hygiene, too many houseflies and insects all the time, smelly restaurant and not in a good way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBQB-DddGqZ9mWbWnY1-gm\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-11-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Raúl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUC4ggSCKF2uOb9mz28pm8os6XhmHWP9ZmD3izYLAhW-Lg8o7vk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited The Marine Room in La Jolla for a special date night, and it was truly an unforgettable experience.

The ambiance is exceptional — candlelight, ocean views, and an intimate atmosphere that makes it perfect for a meaningful evening. It feels elegant without being overwhelming.

The food was outstanding. The tuna dishes were incredibly fresh and beautifully plated, with bold yet refined flavors. The seared entrée in the rich sauce was perfectly cooked and full of depth. The cocktails were equally impressive — balanced, refreshing, and crafted with care. Every dish looked like art and delivered on flavor.

Our server was amazing — attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely kind. The service made us feel welcomed and taken care of from start to finish.

The Marine Room offers more than just dinner — it delivers a complete experience. Highly recommended for a special evening in La Jolla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_eAVEnaS-odjkXa1zKd5d&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Doris Holderness","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-DJmlMRhnHH813VvauHZSeXtSFDCqdQ8LDtOxKJ3kJV4MtElE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful setting! Waiter was very knowledgeable. Food and service were exceptional. Extensive wine list. Started with some focaccia then trout tartare which was excellent. Entrees included the ahi tuna and seared scallops both outstanding. Dessert was the apple spice cake as the base with cheesecake mousse on top. Very light and satisfying dessert to hit the spot. Ending with 2 complimentary chocolate truffles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwUt-wG_ZXW6zJ5PdM0isU&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"john leija","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtPHQsin4cFVOVcVcZRUgnfh3XaDNgnB2QVAOe07gMIDb1GCs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding! Big meaty lobster, Japanese 4oz wygu was more fatty than meaty. Had better wygu other places like Animae but didn't try Australian wygu here cause Japanese is normally best! Shrooms tasted amazing. Couldn't taste speckled truffle on potatoe puree but squash was good with pomegranate seeds. All their mixed drinks were presented nicely in Small cups. Drinks like cast your spell and ain't talking bout pumpkin were our seasonal go to.
Great view of ocean and waves. Tried going during king high tide, but even at max peak, waves didn't Crash up against the windows like they did last time for us. $300 for 2 people with our order above, could've definitely doubled that with a bottle of wine or escargot or oysters.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlyN9icDZmTcWZoH2isIbt&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Macy House","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpNHTFxhGwhjThZQm3idZTmxHFkbs5UZQpgxvd_ziuEPPl1BML=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Took my boyfriend here for his birthday. Lovely atmosphere and food. Worth it.

The Bunny Slope drink was to die for. I can’t stop thinking about it.

Both tartare appetizers were phenomenal, specifically the steak. The caviar was lovely, just melted right in our mouths.

I ordered the Japanese A5 Wagyu and it was phenomenal. No words can describe. Boyfriend got the Australian Wagyu; tried and it was tender and juicy.

10/10 recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHLb9zNbiGYv3I-gZp2VXW&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Elyaa Hammad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwIkndsE-c3DmiqYYq_KQPRogXEnTWmF2qilCOHk5QLB6I2GSpcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was amazing experience and good food. We love our time there. I ordered oysters and my husband ordered tuna both was amazingly cooked.  We celebrated our anniversary and they offered us a complimentary sweet.  Love the sunset time if you book your reservation and hour before sunset you should be good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDutsuVdRXmbigROeSzbsO-&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"James Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZOg9KJ-MWjdceaCYiRoLRm4k4Pnh7WXAPsdOdkIQaFxOEqLjG7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was amazing and the atmosphere was great as well.  I realize this is Turks and everything is a bit expensive and we are willing to pay extra for the experience- but we also have teenage children with us - this restaurant charged us for every Coke and Tea refill - we had $30 in Cokes and refills - that is a money grab to me.  A restaurant of this caliber can do better than that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1UIdDqFTMigK1cauYbP3L&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"amy harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqBfRzZxqB-08WarPdntCiclcotbBqMwQS6hJiKjuLEicgLE1h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited there 21 years ago and we excited to bring our friends for dinner.   I made reservations for 14 a week in advance and was able to get in for a sunset dinner.   Located in the beach in LaJolla it is a great place to dine.   The service was wonderful and atmosphere was elegant.   I had the filet mignon and Cesar salad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfLzgiwOrhlL9QsiRlF4kr&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Charlene Bernard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmaReXTxdBSFjitiy_nt2eMBjoREu8RIBHEjCzoMZaCQCa6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tony at the bar was outstanding, started our experience off on the right path. Cassandra gave full service table side and ensured that our great experience continued.  Favorite part of our meal was the trout tartar","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWnk89a2xmphgAxV9ScSx2&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Igor Minar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIpdbbT4xP4qHBR2PjCh8njqdmWeS1kQAZtoN33Xle85z7pvYEVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I rarely give 5 stars to anyone unless it’s exceptional and this place is definitely exceptional. It’s small / cozy which contributes to the ambiance. The blend of eccentric indoor and green outdoor spaces is so well executed.

The service is wonderful - you definitely get a small / family cafe treatment here. It feels homey and comfy, even though you will likely end up waiting in line to order for good 10-20minutes if you come during peak hours. The wait will be worth it.

The panino / sandwiches are fabulous! I’m a bread snob, spoiled with Micheline star bakeries as well as the real deal from the old world, and I find Lilli’s levain to be world class, definitely one of the best I’ve had in my life.

All the puff pastry is great but I do wish the dough was even more flakey but mainly more buttery. It’s still wonderful regardless.

And the coffee! Oh my! I found this place because I was looking for a good coffee in La Jolla while staying here for a few days, and the coffee is from out of this world. Very much Italian quality coffee worth coming over for even if you come from further away.

I love Lilli’s and will be coming back on my future visits to San Diego! Thanks for building this wonderful place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAp75s4fUw0kaEW_3uK6WV9&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Ali Marjaninejad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcLtrvAoMJTzG5z3xDmqFfUaQNPmv4x8Y8moMX2NROGWK03iqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely place. They have seating in the garden, which is really, really nice. Also, the people are very, very friendly and helpful. The coffees are really nice. Their breakfast/brunch items are, however, in my opinion, their best items. For example, their mortadella sandwich is out of this world. Their sweets and pastries are also really nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRhI11uDkYk50QIaDJ7peE&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A coffee shop nestled in a garden in La Jolla, this warm Italian-style restaurant has a lush, green, and serene atmosphere. The staff are very enthusiastic, and all beverages and food are made with high-quality, fresh ingredients—you can truly taste the care put into each dish. The presentation is also beautiful, making it perfect for photos! I heard their pistachio croissant is incredibly delicious, but you need to go as early as 9 a.m. to buy it, or it will sell out quickly. This time, we ordered the lavender agave latte, which was absolutely delicious—highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDc3K9cedW091DCciSxeJu_&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"David Anton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ96UepaqNvlwa9XV4nBgB7y3lFzc9bsLNc3lrwOz6mXaNWvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is what a coffee shop should be. We searched for an Italian coffee shop as we are fatigued with the atmosphere of normal coffee shops. I didn’t think we’d find anything but found this place by surprise. Great atmosphere and seating inside and out. Fantastic coffee, baked goods, and food. They used great ingredients, have whole milk for coffee, and use real sweetener. Dine in and enjoy the experience and soak in the Italian music. It looks like it is run by the whole family. I wish they opened up a place back home! Best coffee shop in La Jolla!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVjCLHZ3gOEwqDArJBz4d5&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Andrea Wilkinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJE00F5iHIf8L3g6DOrYedUjz6jTiUIQ8IwQkt8G02jqOiGpY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lilli is truly a hidden gem. The menu has something for everyone, with a standout selection of cream-filled croissants, flavorful toasts, and fresh yogurt bowls. The coffee is excellent as well—rich, smooth, and presented with care, making the whole experience feel special.

I only live about 10 mins away and ever since the first time I went I've been going weekly now I love it so much!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5vVwhulQKRi327YCosOC1&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Sara Ar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCkEJJnGfzJ1TU-7WAl7_rKBdEAQ-VaJgMiTJ3hbz903fS4mMuNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"​The cafe has a great atmosphere (good vibe). The prosciutto cotto panini was enjoyable. However, the avocado tartine was disappointing. I plan to skip brunch on my next visit and instead focus on trying their pastry selection.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIFCwLW2I30VyC5J_OHLJQ&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Alexis Capati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-jriwtdnnkamuuLvR1CZNxrD9cD4cvi1uORZgryEnWhoZtA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Vibe: 9/10 - this is such a cute spot! We loved the outdoor seating

Service: 9/10

Value: 5/10 - definitely pricy, but the ambience makes up for it

Oat milk macchiato: 7/10

Nutella croissant: 8.25/10 - so huge and perfectly flakey

Overall: 7.65/10 (3.825/5)

[To clarify our review system:
10 = we’ll never have anything else as good as this in our lives (we use 10 very sparingly!)
9 = extraordinary
8 = great
7 = above average
6 = average
Anything below 6 is being critical]","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHfQ-sr4M_LQULsN6Lyavt&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Patricia V Waldron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHP0kzGSDThlbrY37cR5rY6CJG6V-rBfeckEk6b47gFx-fw5dQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a lovely spot for coffee and pastries tucked into a serene space (former Pannikin) in LaJolla

Authentic Italian cafe. Delicious soft croissants filled with pistachio cream, marzipan or Nutella.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTv41omEZvo8ssXDJ1y4sO&fid=0x0:0x56f34d3201c2b458"],"When":"2025-10-8"}]

[{"Name":"Erica Chao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVkPOlCmSXE13Tj425maurBnv6KatWBCl_PbvVnmvReUnGpDxI6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This 5 star review is purely based on their California burrito and salsas (red and green). Their burrito is one of the best burritos I've had. My partner lived in the area for 5+ years and ordered from this place basically almost every week and introduced it to me. Inevitably, I became a Don Carlos fan. Their California burrito is wrapped in a soft tortilla wrap and stuffed with cheese and juicy, small bite sized beef and other complimentary ingredients. Their salsas are freshly made and are full of flavour and spice. The staff are also very friendly. We rarely dine in as we lived nearby, but the ambiance of the place is like every other mom-and-pop-shops, not the fanciest, but got a family owned type of spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCA8fDEGWVpRp5EEhQA7DuJ&fid=0x0:0x4968798fc0cfcf1c"],"When":"2025-6-19"},{"Name":"Ryan Hansen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK37VvKHD1_g2HIayC1YquMoJnwzrV8cNugyw0wA59EcvRY2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 Recommend!!!! Listen up, I’m from out of town, and where I come from we don’t have tacos like this, I’ve been to California and Arizona numerous times and when I say all I get is tacos and burritos I mean it. Taco Stand line was out the door, so decided to up the block and check out Don Carlos. You look at menu and rows of AWARDS!! By far the biggest “street tacos” I have ever eaten in my life. Small shop, good people, better food!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8x8wubTen62IaGSLxjBUY&fid=0x0:0x4968798fc0cfcf1c"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"L G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmrOoBrZlCuFckw40AWq5ILunbxNaL599Yg7cjZuVLci6qAPBM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was in from out of town and ordered “The Ari Shaffir”, which is conveniently named after a comedian I enjoy. Not even kidding when I say this was the best burrito I have ever had. I will long for the day until I’m back in San Diego to feast on Don Carlos again. Also not to mention these burritos are dense! Definitely worth every penny.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6FYYFnqa6dlAfwRkA-TBh&fid=0x0:0x4968798fc0cfcf1c"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Mikayla M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoB5_h9KGYmBdrpguGdjdX7N46mtF6CiPltdNh0f4QmNwKPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A gem! [{"Name":"Angie C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6YEKFMC4hRjFjUFUO377-f0OESWzMkEYnWpiaRP6Cm0wyVar9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by Better Buzz Coffee in La Jolla and absolutely loved it! I got the maple matcha and it was delicious perfectly balanced and not too sweet. The service was super nice and welcoming, which made the visit even better. The shop itself is very clean, neat, and well-organized a great spot to relax or grab a drink on the go. Definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARjynD-DoxGp_BkiVdG9CM&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"P H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwIeLjcRN1WV-Gusk46EidnhX_lsp-VKCjnl8eQnVAISr5E91o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We had two açaí bowls and two flat whites. Unfortunately, the açaí was completely frozen, so we could not eat it for the first 25 minutes, and the flavor of the mixture was not so tasty.

The flat white tasted more like a latte, and when I mentioned that it had too much milk, the barista seemed offended and started explaining that a flat white is simply without foam but has the same amount of milk. For a barista, it was quite surprising not to know the proper milk-to-coffee ratio for a flat white, and his reaction toward a customer was rather unprofessional.

On a positive note, the girl working next to him was very kind and understanding and kindly made me a new one with less milk.

The atmosphere is nice, and the café is conveniently located in the city center, very close to the sea.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5x8lzyHUKNe0qkqbXfNoh&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Scot Meeker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLRmynJ-WOowLJit0h2E_7R8kcUOf7j4KO_aLUkgkI-JVfq7dl5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my first time to this coffee shop. My second time to La Jolla. This was a very good find. I didn’t try any of the pastries or food although they did look very yummy. However, I did have the very best cold brew that I’ve ever had. It was a cinnamon cold brew that I know wasn’t a skinny version and may have had quite a bit of sugar, but it was worth every sip if I ever get back to La Jolla this is a must stop.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_suH7i0Wp2voDvoZLdcGn&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-7-10"},{"Name":"Vera Quill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBjg7P12NrSR9EGk5oSuanWq0MjgDW0anIi_1QbxIPD6gs1LM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A charming coffee shop nestled in the heart of La Jolla, offering both cozy indoor seating and a breezy outdoor hangout spot. The menu features a wide variety of coffee flavors—perfect for exploring something new or savoring a favorite. Whether you’re catching up with a friend or just soaking in the local vibe, it’s a sweet little spot worth visiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBB_HTki09ytqxnrJTGj769&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Sara Burgos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6xmd47l2l12B1ouWnjdGOpnMXdzhk9mN83lGGC1SfLqvSjxgq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a busy little cafe but the coffee was really good. The location was centralized and an easily accessible spot. It didnt take long to get the coffee.
To see the full review, check out my social channels
YT: theelite_listyt
Tiktok: theexecutivelist
IG: theelite_list
FB: The Elite List","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBp8VI_EojWDDC9sGEm34kt&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"K A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKaMr8FpKvVyQ0S9AMzEkWRuVTyZPa4SUVcuSMkkhxnzRZi5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great service experience!
Great feta avocado toast. Fresh, zesty and an explosion of flavor. But especially grateful for the help I recieved from one of the cashiers, Esther. Her lovely smile and generous advice really made the wait worth it. This store is lucky to have someone like her.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOIlewYmfsfyD1IA2LbwGCvDf6UbgxW4ZKEw4lWOSfN0L-vA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a delicious feta deluxe toast and black coffee the other day at Better Buzz. The whole morning crew was so nice, and I'm looking forward to coming back again. Thanks Emily, Morgan, Karen, and Tori!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCydVue2cDVAeU3UZartB86&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Es Boss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILInh2Dlz7vYf2NKdVaefdulBVmAGI36eN_whDxGVwFHEssA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing staff. The sandwich melts in your mouth — easily one of the best I’ve ever had. And the latte? Insanely good. Hands down my favorite spot in San Diego.❤️‍🔥","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGL2WA8vcQ92IPAKyOdI8m&fid=0x0:0x5bd675529c1e9c37"],"When":"2025-7-22"}]

Nevertheless, the dish is outstanding.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9XHBJbgkiVLwTzx-GM_GV&fid=0x0:0xfa0c9f26c9f45021"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Michael Sullivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMLUFbG7W5aki4m0t1AZ2NsxiUUYszw75TsWBZ2XRaI5DFdas=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Previously had been to the San Marcos location, but while in La Jolla visiting Pearl St. Do glad we did. Amazing the food and dishes are the same amazing quality and flavors. For a chain restaurant that’s not easy to repeat across the board. My new favorite La Jolla restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJ_n3MCRyuX1owE&fid=0x0:0xfa0c9f26c9f45021"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"yupin kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0k6tkWJiMS75xv4t9WYjvaoY1GaDPJtmfFyj8QhgXfYlXz8D9BQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mandarin chicken is pretty sweet. I’m goona do spicy level 4 for next time.
Also the chicken is pretty much crushed. There is 5 tables only, so you should make a reservation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBu2FYAOBAC6A-V_crlZVW2&fid=0x0:0xfa0c9f26c9f45021"],"When":"2025-6-10"},{"Name":"Scot Fishman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcIhgXWNRPN_qp6MiWsZuwn8iChBbm2vonK7h1IRbuI38J29eNnw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was skeptical about a "great" Chinese spot in La Jolla, but Chin's delivered in a serious way.

The service was very slow to take our order, but once we got started, the service was great the rest of the night. The staff was warm and inviting, and they made sure we had everything we needed.

We got the pan fried pork potstickers (solid - more dough-y than I prefer), tangerine beef (a little too fruit-forward with the glaze), Szechwan crispy pork (delicious), ku ting shrimp (a hit across the table) and spicy honey & sesame chicken (the crowd favorite of the night). Not pictured: crispy wontons and seafood fried rice (the table liked both).

The space is small, but the portions are HUGE.  Four of us were eating, and we took home at least half of three entrees. I'd love to return to try more savory dishes...and hopefully more veggies.

Well done, Chin's!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf1ej0Dg&fid=0x0:0xfa0c9f26c9f45021"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Maya N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJmutMHdKF_qO7owbB7egWGDdjSAlNsqW0C8PX3_jSTbPJQguw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a great takeout place we got the tangerine chicken (A MUST), the spicy eggplant, mapo tofu, and chicken fried rice. They didn’t pack utensils both times so just make sure you ask if you actually need them!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADyqdCtaLZpjqie-SCmMN5&fid=0x0:0xfa0c9f26c9f45021"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Jamie DeProspo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW57o6fj1fXPL6KDawv7RumaZlEU9Y_DNArsJ_kp037Z-otuwL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've been here a few times, and today chose an ideal time - mid-late afternoon. Chin's was not busy like usual. This restaurant in my opinion is the best chinese food in San Diego. Coming from New York, it's been challenging to find something really good, but Chin's consistently does it. Today we ordered, Tangerine Shrimp, Chicken and Broccoli, Wonton Soup and Vegetable LoMein.  All really good!  We'll be back again soon, thanks!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Rogers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdCLE_kJZ3DSBVxft7YjvhzJfUOuggJ0k-_afTGQr0_7DvLxFk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really small location but the service and portion sizes were excellent for the lunch price point. I got the spicy honey and chili chicken with a crab Rangoon appetizer. Overall the food was decent but is missing that little bit more to take it to a higher standard, but will still recommend","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9_djnpwE&fid=0x0:0xfa0c9f26c9f45021"],"When":"2024-3-8"},{"Name":"PIKASSO PRODUCTION","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEPITf0B1Ctl1APaQ7RN-v61a55JS-fNeg2LLH230J-fone1m0Sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an absolutely delightful dining experience at CHIN’C Here are the highlights:

Ambiance
Warm and inviting atmosphere with tasteful decor that balances traditional Chinese elements and modern style.
Comfortable seating and a pleasant background soundtrack that enhanced the dining experience without being overpowering.

Service
Attentive and friendly staff who greeted us with smiles and were quick to assist.
Our server was knowledgeable about the menu, offered thoughtful recommendations, and ensured our needs were met without being overbearing.
Timely service with dishes arriving hot and well-paced.

Food
GARLIC BEEF Described as GARLIC BEEF , with perfectly balanced flavors and tender texture.
TANGERINE  A standout for its  crispness, aroma, freshness
Note-worthy for its balance of sweet, savory, tangy, ] and generous portion.
Vegetables were crisp, sauces were rich yet not overpowering, and the presentation was vibrant.
If you’re into spice, the delivered a satisfying kick without overpowering the other flavors.

Drinks and Extras
[Drink/Tea] was the perfect palate cleanser between bites.
The [dessert] was a delightful finish, offering a harmonious blend of textures and flavors.

Value
Generous portions at a fair price, with clear attention to quality and consistency.
Clear care taken in sourcing ingredients and presenting an authentic yet approachable menu.

Overall
A truly enjoyable experience that left us eager to return and try more of the menu.
Highly recommended for families, date nights, or a casual meal with friends.

If you’d like, share some details from your visit (name of the restaurant, dishes you tried, and any standout moments), and I can tailor the review to be even more specific and compelling.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Joaquin Lippincott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJWmjOXs5eL2sT1vWv_Adr00mpBAnsh2UlNPEjWJMiEEdDDPE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For those who (like me) love a good rooftop bar, Birdseye is a hidden gem. Perched right off of Prospect Street (the main drag in downtown La Jolla) it offers a killer view of the waters of the La Jolla Cove. Open for brunch, they don’t offer drip coffee but you can get an Americano or espresso and their brunch menu covers not only the basic (all American) but breakfast burritos and chilaquiles (brunch served until 1pm).

They DO take reservations, but I also had no trouble finding a seat at 11am on a Sunday. Do be advised: 100% of the seating is outside, and the wind does blow in off the cove, so dress warmly, especially in the mornings.

This place is super easy to miss, and requires a walk up a long flight of stairs. Maybe that’s part of what has kept this spot a hidden gem, but now you are in know. 🤫","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHZZwjVQMPQ7r97o_1vFpS&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Lillie McMullen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6ELt20QYEb1rNWH1-PRfpMGoFRHzSfoXnmxHIc0qCenlKLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food and view were great. Cocktails were a bit pricey for what we got, but interesting options. Small area for seating so space runs out fast, but really cool view of the street below and the ocean. Fun place to hang for a little bit and catch up.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9ZI781oSVxuaA5H8kXgYV&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Yoan Bourgoin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViGnD_UOoPGrt1OKZ_n_MGsyWwxnZhQ-RvlaNiAWctmGynqv2Byg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Birdeye is an amazing spot in La Jolla! The view of the ocean is absolutely stunning and makes the whole experience unforgettable. The food was very good, with great vegetarian and even vegan options, which I really appreciated. On top of that, the staff was warm, attentive, and genuinely friendly. A perfect combination of delicious food, beautiful atmosphere, and excellent service. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaQR8BzWo5F9sQRxDl8qOP&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"marklaw9999 lawrence","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9jx7zq6Dlrc901dSrl1pU2AEj5aQZ_zO_QE9Ed14VnICFWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So fun to nosh and imbibe after visiting the Sunny Jim's sea caves! If you're adventurous try The Empress drink, it's crazy and crazy great taste. The servers are so kind. Rafael A. was a delight and ensured e drything was right. The view is $1million and we'll get back next time we're in La Joya!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBm8oMIqEXhUwdldt_xeXWV&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"jane doe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfIXm2pyt-sP2U3UiAhKWX38A7s2jrV3Xik_i0HLsZycujxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We had 10 items. The food was overall OK.  The Carne asada fries were good.  They were served with fried calamari which was luke warm and very hard and crunchy.  There may have was some miscommunication regarding beer service. I think the service was  good. I think the food needs some re working or better execution. One only of 3 appetizers were completely finished,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Nillaga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6TWFHJbBTwXeLQORoAaJJchTuQF3SdCj3Vl2R66zWcQjjgUppDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! The view is awesome! Such a cool spot to enjoy La Jolla for an afternoon.
We had sandwiches! Wagu burger was perfect. Buns are soft. Fries are delicious! Chicken Ranch was amazing.
Service was so nice. Angel is a sweetheart! Thank you","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_1rCbbw&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2025-1-15"},{"Name":"Kristina Bolt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMFsniVvsxegEVukJoMzDMBXXEkHny1tjfusXrmSxsYsSgtc1tSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really like the intimate atmosphere of the rooftop and they had such a great view of the water. Service was really nice. Drinks were really good. We liked everything we got and the food was also really solid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID70puiBA&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2024-8-23"},{"Name":"Krystel Alston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXLPYalE3WFIfId_e-HRO1wiEW3uxFplz7Dm55n4FDJDmwZY7_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"As my friends and I looked for a brunch spot the day before, someone found the Lovebirds Mimosa Flight and it was decided from there!  Two different places online had hours, one said brunch was at 9am, another said 10am, so of course I called and their recording says brunch was at 9am on Sat and Sun.  Check out for our hotel was 11am, so 9am was perfect...until we got there and it was 10am!  We were 3 minutes walking from our hotel, so no big deal to go back and we just loaded everything up.  That was our only issue at Birdseye!

We were greeted and sat immediately since we were the first ones there, which is odd for a Sunday morning.  We ordered the mimosas and they were cute and very good.  Mostly champagne, but that's the way we like it!! LOL

Our party ordered the breakfast sandwich, the breakfast burrito, steak and eggs, berries & cream toast, and scrambled eggs.  For the most part, everyone enjoyed their meals.  I had the steak and eggs.  The steak was a thin cut steak, so of course they cook in 2.7 seconds, so it was over cooked, and it was salty.  And although my friend who ordered the berries and cream toast THOUGHT it was french toast (it was not LOL) she still enjoyed it.  As we got ready to leave, it started to get busy, but the service was great and we definitely enjoyed it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMCO9u3WjrbKdg&fid=0x0:0x52410caff5ce0991"],"When":"2025-5-5"}]

[{"Name":"Amy Everson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkBGJsmHjhqmHcQLUTaijDoih6CZyBZIUlZPTumMPO6YVXnpXt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here for a lil happy hour drink and snack
Really enjoyed the huge dog friendly bar with a great view. The flautas were very greasy but for 6 dollars happy hour price that isn’t too bad
Really loud reggae music playin outside but the staff was nice
I will come back for 5 dollar margaritas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXCvtuu1cTX05gBy46qn85&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"James Gockelen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViG49xhD16QBr02b1k8DnkKZpSU6BIsyHdP3RB1x6bhQei29lx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Looking for a lunch spot on a sunny Sunday afternoon. We wondered up the hill and found a table outside Jose’s, which had great views down to the sea.

The service was warm and welcoming, and we really enjoyed 90 minutes with a cool beer, tasty food and watching the world go by.

The food was simple authentic and tasty - not setting the world on fire - but really can’t complain, tasty comfort food is what we wanted and what we got.

Would recommend - so do stop by if you’re in the neighbourhood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAniY3OXGV415l7wDhGFNhV&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Laura the Explorer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXT-N_g8qH-t5g2L9xktC0dA2FbFMrjb0jJeuenB4VaAm2c-Tar=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Not the most amazing Mexican food ever but perfect for what it is. After watching the sunset, we wanted to wait out the traffic, so we decided to enjoy a drink and a couple of tacos on the patio.  Our server was Abby and she was a DELIGHT! The frozen margaritas were strong and excellent. The salsa was fresh and VERY GOOD, the tacos were satisfying and the breeze was lovely. Prices were quite cheap too for this part of the country!  We were very happy when we left.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX07JenIwnRNWREuEseQBt7lHS7zq8lAcH8IlSKpWd4NWAiR-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"awesome happy hour...$5 margaritas including mango and strawberry flavors! the nachos were amazing and very loaded with steak 😋 their green sauce was killer on top of the burrito 🌯 cool vibes. Great view of ocean. highly recommend 3-6p happy hour for late lunch or early dinner then walk along the la jolla cove. 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhwSKZkkWWmcusdZxIomOv&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2025-7-18"},{"Name":"Queenie Quynh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3xrAZZw6Xd3sVxtv_FBivbJeisOV92iHlGgB8UWWf9cjsEKhwHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best Mexican food in town. The place is in great location and chill. Staff are beautiful and great attitudes. Food is amazing good in taste. Portion is big so when you order, need to be aware.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbyQZCG7ea6x9wI6DAv6ZY&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2025-8-26"},{"Name":"Abby Spitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0Sh6_RTGiO5XRJhbD34oZc22jLzL_-QdGxAVNU18pX9Aufw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing. Where else in SD area can you be FULL and DRUNK for $80 for TWO people. The pitcher of margaritas just regular lime was incredible. I had the enchiladas, bomb, my fiancé had the burger and omg… immaculate. 10/10 will be here again!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9DEZY4LAPSr9tQ-77DmD7&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Non-of your business","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWhrrO-7kHRCckCaUVfqLmCbvjNJwG025VvhVeZ_7kJ_hHa5f0nw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was our second time visiting this Mexican restaurant, and overall it was a good experience. We sat outside and the weather was sunny and perfect — the staff were thoughtful and even brought us an umbrella for shade, which we appreciated.

I ordered the mango margarita, and it was refreshing and delicious. I had the fajitas, which came with rice, beans, guacamole, sour cream, and tortillas — not my favorite, but still decent. We also ordered the Three Amigos Burrito, and it was a hit! Huge portion and super tasty.

One downside: we were charged for extra sauce without being informed, and there’s also a surcharge fee when paying with a credit card. Despite that, the service was nice and we’ll likely come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDISRgXlXdOc-jxSa5fsSg8&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"Daniel Mueller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvP3FMy3RGIstRWhegUa6D79f5fF3UA1lzeoY_zQSd4Aa0LVhhbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We looked for a fun place to get authentic Mexican food while visiting the La Jolla area and this was top of the list and it certainly was as recommended. We had a variety of burritos with the three amigos, California, veggie and surf and turf. All of them had something special and each person was very pleased especially with the wet taco green sauce. Service was equally good and the atmosphere of the place was equally good knowing this was the old courtroom for the area. Definitely check it out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPn6K1kwE&fid=0x0:0x71f3aa44df314542"],"When":"2024-11-28"}]

[{"Name":"Kai D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJa1Lfc86QAZJXx0sGdRNon9sO3tUHNWb-ggE4XOs-wRToEOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered the green curry chicken and Tom Yum soup, and both were delicious. The food tasted fresh and looked very clean and well prepared. The flavors were authentic and well balanced, especially the curry. The service was also very friendly and attentive, which made the whole dining experience even better. I’d definitely come back and recommend this place to anyone who enjoys Thai food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCd1yC75vm8GE5ZsOcUj4fz&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Sky Thai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkM0XclyWWPsxKzhOY0MQuiB-HDwZc99L-sWHTod7RE9hrsGAgcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great Thai food with friendly service in a humble setting in La Jolla! We came here for lunch and were able to get seated immediately. We got the combo platter and everything had good flavor and was perfect to split amongst our group of four. We also got the Papaya Salad and it had a good salty and sweet taste that was balanced with a mild heat. For my main dish, I got the Chicken Khao Soi and it was fall-off-the bone soft and perfectly cooked! Lots of good curry flavors and the noodles were tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAU6dzBRBiAUT3wgFNBP58L&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Laiyi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5RLC_TNFBPav6wWSoWIo6EsUHi-_3CFSYWcjJNBz1iyPgDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered the Beef Drunken Noodles and they were excellent. The wide rice noodles were cooked perfectly—not mushy at all—and well coated in sauce. The dish tasted very authentic, not overly sweet like some Americanized Thai places. Portions were filling, and the food came out hot and quickly. Thai iced tea was classic and refreshing. Overall a solid spot for Thai food in the area, and I’d definitely come back to try more dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPip-tcQ6n6FZqeNb2Z1Ci&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Priya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1mnyxfPPPuCWjM2Q2UhJbQ3RGHDeyKKew-JQj9o6bY4MBj0Hy2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"They have happy hour all week long.

Their portion is good aswell. I would recommend.
But the friedrice is little dry, i would still give 4/5.

Staff was super sweet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDSbxE8ogiCyqowlPdZF0CE&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Jocelyn Zhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKK4a4rX0j4p8n3W1CaTrKvWzJUyi0BwwrFUmaghinNrpOsyg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really love this Thai restaurant; the flavors are very homey. When I'm not sure what to eat, Pad Thai is always a safe choice. The kids really enjoy the mango sticky rice. I also saw a beautiful sunset at the restaurant. It was such a pleasant meal!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9kQr_mEstx5WVfc3Q7pyF&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"milcah kres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUg4n7yt455V6a7tdE-deGxCo6y9GKuy31i6lI_VsEcfy6cedU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pad prik khing was sooooo good. Definitely recommend. The chicken pad gra prow was a little more tough than what I am used to, but still quite tasty. Love the thai tea","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXTgDD9yktFzLwGCgubI0A&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"黃聖覃","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0Zo1ZqWvREEAEozgaXuRlPTDcr3fu8IiQYx6XV7RoNlisEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a good experience here.
I had the green curry with jasmine rice, and it was really delicious. They also let you customize the spiciness from 1 to 10. I chose medium, which was just right for me. This is a restaurant I would definitely like to revisit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLsKaPtjd9aR8eIUuKBF2q&fid=0x0:0x6239d9083a9d93fd"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Hanna He","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhiicVhcwfkN02TJZ4QWzBLMYTqssTe9w9z5sl_BOCeG60kNE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of the best Thai restaurants I’ve tried in San Diego. The food is flavorful and authentic, with well-balanced spices and fresh ingredients.

We ordered the Pad Thai, curry, and Tom Yum soup, and everything was delicious. The curry was especially impressive — rich, creamy, and full of flavor without being too heavy. Portions were generous, and spice levels were customizable.

What really stood out was that the restaurant is pet-friendly. We brought our dog and were welcomed warmly, which made the experience even better. The staff was friendly and attentive, service was prompt, and the outdoor seating was comfortable and clean.

Highly recommend this place if you’re looking for great Thai food and a pet-friendly spot in San Diego!","Images":null,"When":""}]
