[{"Name":"Al Aguirre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJh_qilMvV0gGg365vY-G2iDvXsDphVgoRgmdIUIZg52VGi1A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a terrific experience at La Jolla's Lucien for NYE. Great new addition to the San Diego food scene. This is one of perhaps less than a handful of restaurants in SD offering world class ingredients and innovative cuisine with impecable service (Lilo and Addison come to mind). The food was extraordinarily creative with standouts including a light and silky risotto with a soft poached egg and white truffle; a delicate wild turbot with celeriac and a hazelnut sauce; and a wonderful uni dish flavored with fennel and light flecks of Espelette pepper. Another standout was arguably the best buttery, laminated brioche I've ever tasted with impossibly fine layers; a viennoiserie love letter. The palate cleanser was also a triumph, somehow preventing a truffle sorbet with shaved black truffle from overwhelming after two earlier dishes containing truffle. On the pastry side there was a terrific Mont Blanc with the traditional chestnut vermicelli and an exquisite chocolate tart.  There were no outright misses, though a lobster dish with a wonderfully flavored dashi broth felt a tad underwhelming on the lobster front, given the presentation of the beautiful blue lobster ahead of the dish.  Service was on point; far from pretentious, it was warm, welcoming, and efficient. This felt like a professional group of good human beings who love what they do. The Sommelier was approachable, engaging, and knowledgeable; and the wine list is interesting with some non-obvious gems, but, as one could expect, a work in progress that still needs some breath and older vintages. All in all, we could not have asked for a better experience on NYE and look forward to visiting Lucien again. This restaurant is worthy of Michelin recognition and of customer support to ensure it remains a star in the San Diego food firmament.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBBj6iIuTN7g594XEK5_U3&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Bernard Kok","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIulXEL76NWFkqQKVr6-5-9TvkwaRqKTjvQaGPGY1XtDEkw4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic new restaurant, it has a lovely little sitting area prior to starting your experience and it was beautiful sitting under the calamansi tree. The dishes were inventive and delicious, and beautiful to look at. One of the most memorable experiences we've had eating in San Diego. Everyone was lovely and very friendly, and it was great experiencing the restaurant tour. You can tell how much thought, pride and love Chef Elijah, his family and team put into this gem of a restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVs9XfuWnTR3G0dvB09vCu&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Alan Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmkaDh8pR6uAux9p7YyyGkVF1hOezetqIW4TjmzHAoUw7DhmfM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I had an incredible evening at Lucien.   From the moment you're seated in the courtyard, you're greeted with wonderful hospitality and creative and delicious bites.  Their is nothing like it in San Diego.  The creativity of the cuisine is akin to something you'd have to travel far for, nothing is derivative and everything is unique but works so well.  Chef Elijah and his team are super friendly and accommodating to allergies and dietary preferences.  The front of the house is super friendly and knowledgeable; Brian, James, Joey all took the time to explain the various drinks and dishes to us and answered any questions we had around the cuisine and restaurant.  While it is a special occasion type of place, the evolving menu makes me want to come back often.  They also have a nice bar you can pop in for a drink to try their cocktails, which are also seasonal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDG6OGrXgCRtkfo-VqLauDU&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Ankita Aparajita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIe9dtc_m_Pr4PMNR4e2gsnXPACIDKSRxIx3PapjbGvBq44iJKcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Classic, Exquisite & Extravagant Affair is all we needed on our anniversary.The Japanese-French fusion culinary plates, New York professionalism, top notch service, classy ambience - Outstanding!
What made our experience top tier was them giving us a tour of the kitchen,goodie bag and also clicking a pic with all of the chefs making our day Extra special.The owner himself came and introduced himself and had a delightful nice chat…A gentleman! Must Have experience, thank me later!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxvC1FfOU91XZC6DxOIIdM&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Allison Koo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeqc9BglHU5z1jC7kK1j3XbQTfzIVs3BIUjHtCMkP0vofKpoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful family dinner at Lucien. The food was inventive, cooked perfectly, and presented beautifully. The atmosphere and service were immaculately curated, but managed to have a laid back California feel that was never too stuffy or formal like many fine dining restaurants. The staff also easily accommodated dietary restrictions without making any of the dishes less special.

It was a really enjoyable experience all around, and I highly recommend this restaurant for a special dinner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzoQiTEkNoP3XY6Vl-S3bc&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Anthony W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwPJmX46LLcnwuVwZ14xExoWXdBGiXMtXRLePjaX0cEXctAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at Lucien last night was a unique and amazing experience! The food was incredible, with each course being thoughtfully presented. The restaurant staff even introduced each course with the finest details. The service was impeccable and beyond comparison. Throughout the evening, there was plenty of interaction with the chefs and restaurant staff. We were even invited to tour the kitchen. The price was definitely worth the memorable experience. We will definitely be coming back soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdocR0gKz0iKLXQdpXtroC&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"L. Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQjEcvHPHLea_ZmKKGnlMEK38DTUbIbPgSsNvogEADZgNqNEM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment we arrived, the experience at Lucien was exceptional! We were warmly welcomed and began our evening in the garden with a beautifully balanced welcome cocktail and amuse-bouche. It was the perfect prelude to what was to come. The transition into the dining room felt almost secretive and intimate, like stepping into a modern speakeasy.

The restaurant itself is stunning with the walls reminding me of the blue ocean, warm stone finishes, and soft, intimate lighting. Our booth had a great view of the open kitchen, where you can watch the chefs working over the hearth. Every member of the staff was genuinely friendly, knowledgeable, and attentive without being overwhelming. A brilliant team!

As a food and wine lover, you must get the tasting menu with wine pairing. Chef Elijah curated such a poetic menu. Every dish was thoughtfully composed with vibrant colors and flavors, textures, and bites full of depth. So flavorful! James, the wine director, curated an incredible pairing that elevated each course.

One standout was a course featuring Iberico pork paired with Château d’Yquem which was an unexpected twist and absolutely mind-blowing combination. I’m still dreaming of this pairing! Oh! And uni ice cream with purple potato foam is the die for and also my favorite… I can go on and on… the whole menu is my favorite! It’s quite a memorable meal.

The bread with the seaweed butter was so tasty and nourishing and didn’t make us feel bloated at all… we ate the whole loaf! The progression of the meal felt perfectly paced, and I loved the generous use of foams, caviar and uni, my personal favorites.

Each dish had a sense of story, showcasing the best of seasonal ingredients and their relationship with farmers and vineyards. I like that the main ingredients were highlighted/enhanced and not overwhelmed with flavors.

It’s refreshing to see Lucien in the fine dining scene in La Jolla.. sophisticated yet welcoming, creative yet grounded in exceptional ingredients. I can’t wait to come back to experience their next menu.

You can also have a more casual visit to their bar which looks like a great spot to drop in for a drink and a few plates.

I’m getting hungry typing this review and excited to come back for more!!! :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiMgFZe0tg3r3zEJe62c8C&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Andrew Sartory","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgz-SRN8FfPA0_V-vOlQikx3a0-ye4gHqzqllbbO1HSZusbsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Most Luxurious and Heartfelt Dining Experience of Our Lives!

My husband and I both agree that our first evening at Lucien was, without question, the richest and most luxurious dining experience we’ve ever had in our lives. And there is so much to say about the magic we experienced.

⸻

Arrival & Warm Welcome

From the moment we arrived, we felt immediately at home. The warm and inviting hostess greeted us with a radiant smile and playful laugh when we asked, “Is this Lucien?” She replied, “Yes, this is us! Are you Andrew?” — and from that moment, we knew we were in for something special.

She led us to a charming courtyard under a majestic tree, where we began our evening with a welcome beverage and first bites. It felt as though loving friends had invited us into their gorgeous home to share something deeply personal — a night of art, surprise, and joy.

⸻

Atmosphere & Ambiance

When we moved indoors, the setting became even more intimate. The minimal seating and warm design made it feel exclusive and serene, almost like we were part of a secret experience few get to witness. It felt very VIP!

Each of the 15 courses felt like a chapter in a story — full of creativity, elegance, and delightful surprise. With every plate came something unexpected and beautifully executed. The pacing was perfect, the transitions seamless, and the attention to detail was immaculate.

⸻

The Service & Staff

We were celebrating major milestones in our marriage and life, and Lucien could not have been a more perfect setting. The staff treated us as though we were royalty — warm, kind, and effortlessly professional. There wasn’t a hint of pretension, only genuine hospitality and passion for what they do.

Natasha, James, Keira, Jeff, Brian, and others whose names I wish I had caught were all a tremendous delight. Their depth of knowledge, professionalism, and heart elevated the entire experience. I asked a whole lot of questions about the dishes and ingredients — and they were always happy to answer and elaborate, helping us savor and understand the artistry behind each bite.

⸻

Behind the Scenes & Chef Elijah

We were blessed to receive a tour of the kitchen and meet Chef Elijah, whose creativity and passion are palpable. We learned that he loves evolving the menu several times a week — which makes me even more excited to return. It was inspiring to see the staff embrace such innovation with grace and enthusiasm.

We were there for almost four hours, and not once did we feel tired or restless. In fact, if they had offered several more courses, we would have joyfully stayed for another hour!

⸻

Intuition & Discovery

When I first saw Lucien on OpenTable, I hadn’t heard of it before — but the photos caught my attention, and I felt an intuitive nudge to book. The tasting menu was beyond what I had initially planned to spend, yet the moment I felt that call, I knew it was meant to be. I’m so glad I trusted that intuition — because what we received was easily worth twice the price.

⸻

A Living Work of Art & Experience to Remember

Dinner at Lucien was far more than a meal. It was a journey, an immersive work of art, and a theatrical experience where each course played a unique role in a living, breathing masterpiece. Watching the staff orchestrate each moment was its own form of performance — filled with heart, precision, and love.

Getting to know the team was one of the greatest highlights of the evening. They now feel like new friends to us, and they turned what could have been “just dinner” into a sacred memory we’ll treasure for the rest of our lives.

Getting to share in the entire experience with my husband, the man I love more than anyone, was truly a great treasure. It was a great space and setting for us to have quality time with each other and have a night we will cherish forever!

⸻

Truly worth every penny — and so much more.
Thank you, Lucien team.
We love you all so much and are grateful for what you have created.
Can’t wait to return soon. 💛","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuPIP2DecO8ZV3rgCAm4HE&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-12-5"}]

[{"Name":"Gary Giffin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6cPhj4NoATy-dNMcRV3pbKhjrkoliPTKBHK4vdvMugvSwlz99=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was 5 Star! Great place to take your family who likes variety. They have a little bit of everting on their menu. I tried the Tr-Tip steak and it was delicious. I like my rare and that’s not an option. The French dip sandwich was full of meat and they really packed it! Not many choices of all around good American food in UTC area so this is a great place to find something for everyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtnbJPTXB5QJektAxXyrgd&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Edna G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9wxr_9VeIoYYVc4hGcextKYAGGCarFmH7j_z3CdRYu4geOwX8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"BJ’s is always open late and we came here just for that since we arrived in LaJolla late in the evening and was hungry. We also have this in the Bay Area and it’s pretty slow service though. This place is a little faster service. Food is good. Good for groups or just to hang out at the bar to watch sports.

We shared their BJ’s personal pizza and new sampler platter. The sampler had bbq tri-tip sliders, mozzarella sticks, chicken wings and spinach queso dip. Everything was good but I really liked their pizza and chicken wings the best. Oh I chose the lemon pepper flavored wings with bone-in. We also had blue moon beer tap. Would have loved to have Pzookie dessert but I couldn’t fit anymore food in me. LOL. Those are a must have!

Inside the restaurant was decent and seemed new but so dark inside to see what I was reading on the menu or trying to eat my food. Servicer was good, friendly and she tried her best to accommodate us while waiting for our meals. Would come here again","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlHlJs7drdIWqjHECrZNZV&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Charlene Hsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYm2AHqPn55t7qWiTX-2jJPaSqRQ1FgAB05oWwYNtsBOfWLFN_Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"THE MONKEY BREAD PIZOOKIE IS SO GOOD! It’s honestly the best one and its not too overwhelming in sweetness. I like how it comes off into basically already bite size pieces. Super yumalicious! The dubai chocolate one is alright, nothing too special honestly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCa5OU6sY0AaOpi2KLDisSv&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"susu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJk-6wr28tj7HM7bBpn5_OatuJJP76DaWCKkkrbhhiQbxSdwBE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Never Get a steak from this Location and will never come back.
I person love Bj's steak . Always cooks it perfectly and not too seasoned usually I love it. However, when I got a ribeye steak it was straight up pepper and salt . The cook was good tho but the taste I couldn't eat it all.
I even let people from my party to have it they all agreed and couldn't handle it. I asked the server she did go ahead and helped me to get a new one.
I got a new one about 23m later. It was not as crazy salty as before but it was still super salty and yes my party also agreed with it. I did tell the server she asked for either a togo box or to just give it to another person. I just said togo box bc who other person will eat it if everyone agreed it's salty?
Maybe if I boil it in water or eat with something else I could bc it has that much seasoning in it. even the togo box I got was a pizookie box. Very confusing and disappointed.
I like Bj's but I will never be coming back to this location. The mash potato and the soup coming with the steak was good and my party got a burger it was really good too.
I guess they only suck at making a steak.
The photos are from the second steak. Imagine the first one","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEkq8LTkTlzcC5AUDc9Mzp&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Zachary Mandel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUC_2gWAcGN7U5yDe5ii3ZOQTj_ICjOy8Zavce5h9LxBxO4fDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t even know where to start. Tonight’s dinner at BJ’s was one of the most disappointing restaurant experiences I’ve had in a long time. We sat on the patio, where our waitress (who proudly mentioned she’s worked there for 2.5 years) somehow managed to make every part of the evening worse. It took her over 15 minutes just to come by and ask if we wanted drinks, which she never refilled once during the entire hour and a half we were there.

We specifically came for the limited-edition pizookie, so we asked to order it at the very start of our meal to make sure we’d get one. She said she’d “put it in right away.” Spoiler: she didn’t. After waiting through our painfully average food (which honestly tasted like it came straight from the Sysco freezer), she came back and casually asked if we wanted dessert. We told her we’d already ordered the special pizookie, and she hit us with, “Oh yeah oops we have none left.”

Meanwhile, we literally watched three other tables around us get served that exact pizookie after we’d ordered ours. The complete lack of attention, honesty, or care was ridiculous. If this is the kind of service BJ’s keeps around for two and a half years, I’m genuinely concerned for their hiring standards.

Save yourself the frustration and go anywhere else. Even a drive-thru would have more professionalism and better food quality than whatever that was.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDK9RTpeTIRu4JC4mDjbgu&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"maggie yu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwyCFJdkZ6LzxYYNqIVQ-WHUXAh9qjKE6B2lTJAQTOcaMX0Io=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Strawberry Shortcake Pizookie was the best out of the three (Salted Caramel and Choco Chip). Very rich and Crumbl like. Mini were a good size. BBQ chicken pizza was also pretty good, crust was my favorite part","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAB65am0iBQT9ToV1d3tYQH&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Ralisha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVTcG0hCRtnL9R_4jxGnHYb9le-f_t22YBUYNmBtdYpDuRow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Katelynn Rose was an amazing server! Super friendly, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect. The food was great, and her service made the experience even better. Definitely a reason to come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadia G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-9FH5CD65x7R-y_1nIEScHiCzc2FB6VhbK_gGt5-t7gFLnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We took advantage of the $13 Pizookie Meal and Happy Hour - such a steal. The service was fantastic- thank you to server Lihi for your speed and great service, as well as server Kate’s help.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ6pv8IBxzP9YmF-6SWCqA&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-11-11"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carol B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6eRfZkpiRTc4dPnwhnedvnr1iDJuZqML8xBc2fCoE1PWxhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"First of all, Don’t let the pictures fool you. We booked the New Year’s Eve 5 course dinner to celebrate with our family (5 people) and were extremely disappointed, especially for a meal that cost over $1,200 While the dishes looked good visually, the flavors were very poor and inconsistent. The halibut was either overly salty or had no salt at all, the short rib did not taste like short rib and was served barely warm, almost cold, and the scallops crudo was not flavorful and did not taste fresh. The cheese course was very basic, with cheeses you can easily find at a grocery store. Desserts did not save the experience. The cheesecake was bad and the only reasonable item was the lemon tart. We brought our family expecting a special night, but most people barely ate. For the price and the occasion, the experience was unacceptable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDipeAsaEZtOrxEGRu16dnm&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Danielle Coleman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURyH6AnYwZVlN5hZszatFaZN0wKw-dZkKay79OyS9Bsm5S__SGyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The atmosphere of this restaurant is beautiful, however the service is mediocre. At one point our waitress disappeared for a good 45 mins. It took a long time to receive the food which did not taste fresh. We had the shrimp pasta and chicken plate. They give a very underwhelming amount of flavorless chicken with beets on the side, a very interesting combo. The shrimp pasta was a good proportion but tasted like frozen food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqWqb6CQp_Qk65AD0stajL&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Pasha Javadi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqF2Uh5tyxwzPruAk0S_RIavhf8ZEx_Sa--oPc9XoH6y4GhRey=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited this restaurant for the beautiful terrace, and it absolutely delivered—spacious, charming, and perfect for a relaxing evening. The atmosphere was lively but not too loud, making it a great spot to unwind. The staff were friendly and attentive throughout the night, which really added to the overall experience.

The starters were a pleasant surprise—flavorful and well-prepared, with the Brussels sprouts standing out as a real highlight. Unfortunately, the mains didn’t quite live up to the setting. Both the filet mignon and the chicken were overcooked, which was disappointing given the quality we expected.

Overall, a great place for drinks, light bites, and a beautiful terrace evening—but if you’re going for the main courses, you might want to manage your expectations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYpKOnZQ&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-5-1"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Magical dining experience at the stunning Mediterranean Room in the La Valencia Hotel in La Jolla. Sitting on the dog friendly patio you can see a beautiful view of the ocean and downtown La Jolla. We enjoyed the red wine, Oaxacan Spanish octopus, striped sea bass, and coffee crusted lamb. The service was friendly, quick, and accommodating. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRV-rdvSSsOL1-2-tSZwq9&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Carrie Glad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP7sszhdTDZGzuZ79XROVWW0pzJzavmKrPGYYHCl0t7MmC-rD8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food with stunning views of the ocean. Easy to get seated, service is top notch and quick.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXTxkG4aBVgqOoOrGLRrng&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Janelle Radak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaAx1fJzjm8s21fMS1sIg9evQN7DZEQKnQWaSLP5lpC_TQG_8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I attended the Holiday tea on 12/19 and it was one of the best Teas I have attended!
Ashley and Aaron waited on myself and my mother in law and they were fantastic!

I have a nut allergy and had mentioned it when I made the reservation months ago and they took me by surprise when they brought out a fully separate plate with all the items that they knew there fully nut free and did not mix with any of the pastries that had nuts in them.
It was such a nice touch and made the tea less stressful!

We plan to return to the Spring Tea as well!

The only “issue” was that as we enjoyed the table and food so much that we sipped our tea slowly and the tea did get cold after 1.5 hours since there was not anything to keep it warm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Midilee D. Limsiaco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt-2jlCJvz2ut5_B-jal7bSIh73ZBbkAiI0Aaqr__FqjatZKnr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just enjoyed an excellent meal at the Mediterranean Restaurant at La Valencia Hotel! The chilaquiles were rich, delicious, and incredibly filling. The laid-back vibe and stunning ocean view made it the perfect spot for a relaxing and tasty brunch. I highly recommend it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBpIGt2UacMdhJDozeWagHm&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Marina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaSeI3ACml6nYrxeNOk3jrKx1z5lMoF_yTLZz7eG_76y7H7rru7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Come for drinks only. I love this place for the romantic vibe, flowers, and sea view. Atmosphere is great. The drinks are not going to be up the the standard of speakeasies in SD like Youngblood, Mothership, Remedies, etc., but close enough. I am quite disappointed by the food. The burger/fries was cafeteria quality. The sandwich looked like something I'd slap together at home. The side salad was a pile of greens, nothing else. For those prices, they could fix whatever is wrong with their kitchen. As for the wedding venue, from what I saw of it, it's also overpriced and overhyped unless you're really all in on that slice of ocean horizon. To each their own.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"TM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX35uu8fEVYC5m3JL9YhQ9HpzVu0pvqY8VM9roJ51hLV2PRHlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was sooooo good! We come to La Jolla all the time and I don’t know why we didn’t eat at this restaurant sooner. We have walked by it a million times and finally tried it! The food was incredible- we had the chicken skewer platter and gyro fries. The chicken and meat were very good, the pilaf was delicious, salad, veggies, tzatziki and hummus too- all 10/10. Highly recommend this place, we also sat outside by the fire and it was super warm. Service was fast and the atmosphere was great, not too busy for Friday night. The prices are great for the portion of food you get.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbLbxFQhgtelQma_R8RFPJ&fid=0x0:0x49b11ae76a8dfe9c"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"M D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFnh1bJoQvRPXFJAUHZaogJ3l4hymW6NwjbQkiy0mU448FNaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend and I split the gyro platter (beef and lamb). Had a good amount of meat (crispy) with a good amount of fries and pita bread. Ask for a little less dressing on the salad if you prefer it not so wet.

We had three girls with us and they all got the kids menu with chicken nuggets and fries. Less than $10 each.

The happy hour wine for $7.00 was pretty impressive with the selection and their HH choices looked pretty good too.

The ladies behind the counter were very nice and helpful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIL-t2oxSgOujhgAj87dwN&fid=0x0:0x49b11ae76a8dfe9c"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Austin Siefken","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXakrinm1ZAVR7k4etNLnowoMyOOZaqBkXtTiOpfX5wxTmmYS4-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Went to Spiro's twice, once about a year ago and once today. The first time we went it was very good, had an inviting atmosphere and the food was tasty. Compared to today there are noticeable changes. The service was not as welcoming or helpful and the food was not nearly as good. I had the chicken kebab pita, which was drowned in sauce and had maybe 5 pieces of chicken. It was very underwhelming. However, the lamb and beef gyro was delicious and came with plenty of meat. I do appreciate how they have free water and a clean bathroom. I feel like today was an off day and Spiro's is hit or miss or the quality has declined over the past year. Overall, I would still recommend it for a Mediterranean lunch if you are in La Jolla, but generally there are better options nearby.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luciana P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVl15cAFgZjrlqF99-4kC4WsVZpG1xt17NIVrImSWfd06t5xUlz3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were walking around La Jolla and found this spot. The person serving was very kind and I don’t think I’ve ever had a gyro that had so much filling/meat! The Gyro fries were amazing too and the restaurant had calm vibes. Our food was served very fast too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQ8bT0mQE&fid=0x0:0x49b11ae76a8dfe9c"],"When":"2025-3-11"},{"Name":"Robert Heath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0oAs-MWj5ghgqM3MeTfzyo5NvAmgG2KI11at5wZaO9HWSB2H7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Nice location with average food. We ate here one afternoon during happy hour. We got a couple of the happy hour specials: beef kebabs, meatballs as well as a platter from the regular menu. The location is nice. They have a convenient outdoor patio. The food was not very good. The beef arrived cold and overdone. The platter was ok though on the small side. I was hoping for more carefully prepared food to match the location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICz3OzXPw&fid=0x0:0x49b11ae76a8dfe9c"],"When":"2024-5-31"},{"Name":"Adriana LaCorte Maher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCRPp7fmbckj4P3UKgm4PU0pMgVBsLgGHFJwehVvkV__qGXM6p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was drawn to check this place out because it’s absolutely beautiful, and I loved the nostalgic Christmas music they were playing. It was lovely, relaxing, and I needed a place to get a bite and relax for a while. The menu was varied with multiple options, and not as expensive as I’d expect for downtown La Jolla. I got a bowl of Lentil soup. I took off one star because the soup was REALLY salty and the tzatziki sauce was not as good as I’ve had elsewhere. But I would definitely come back to try some other menu items. The lady behind the counter was absolutely lovely… friendly, warm and professional. She made me feel at home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPuZrcJA&fid=0x0:0x49b11ae76a8dfe9c"],"When":"2024-12-3"},{"Name":"Lori Toskin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVS0R5j01tGu_PYxH7NgP4efvF9S1RbB5ItyrPbmGOSAhPld9yO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A nice little place in LaJolla with delicious Mediterranean dishes. We were unsure about a few items on the menu and the young man who took our order was so nice and took time to explain them to us. We all loved the falafel pita!! Definitely would come back here again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe_GrQCJA8u0-7Ug3FM0VqygNRyZBYVi_to8mEa8-mM4mx-QKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice location, quieter than the other restaurants in La Jolla as it tends to be crowded usually. The food is good and customer service is great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqQy9KyMzRXkOjmySLivVD&fid=0x0:0x49b11ae76a8dfe9c"],"When":"2025-8-12"}]

[{"Name":"Kimberly Ransom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUk5c3vZD2iWeiyf_TdS3fc1kpiMK1VwpmAz6yux_TeDVWfQEG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"1st class service! Delicious dishes! Super clean. Stunning decor! We were welcomed right at 5pm, opening. Dolma was yummy, Cherry Blossom tea with whipped cream was superb!! Had it cold. We had chicken & the rack of lamb. Baklava for dessert. They are doing everything right in here!! You will enjoy!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAA0IWnWgYmi-5PK-ETlrGS&fid=0x0:0xadff762cb38c2bf6"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Marie Hold On","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKz5Q0IfUv0Mos9_QunUos4TGZuCp27memLD9MyDwZE6YBerw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful, inviting restaurant!  I walk by here all the time and stopped in for lunch.  I was worried I was underdressed given the cloth tableclothes, but they were very welcoming.  We had the lunch specials with delicious, flavorful chicken kabob and kachaloo chalow with chicken!  A real treat and we'll be sure to come back.  Highly recommend!  I am surprised there isn't a line out the door.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sasha moscona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi5977mbc17CBjZNVS8G7SmoX6U4EgnuWhf0rvt_G6IHZl_Jxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly an incredible and authentic meal at Pamir Kabob House. I would highly recommend this restaurant for their large selection of dishes (including a vegetarian section!) and kind service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmFLW8AxiZWET8yIrg1HCj&fid=0x0:0xadff762cb38c2bf6"],"When":"2025-7-7"},{"Name":"Sara Thompson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyZfgRopJ9IiNVQAULPs3IDVjhkufxtZgx7cKw3SD0SatdVKZ5nQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stumbled upon this lovely restaurant by accident tonight (Friday around 5:30 pm). Beautiful atmosphere, attentive service and amazing food! The value is very good for the amount and quality! If you like wine , they have $8.50 per glass  of house wine. That’s extremely inexpensive for SoCal and especially in La Jolla!
This place is great as a family atmosphere or for a romantic dinner. It’s a quieter environment which I really liked. I had the shrimp kabobs- came with a delicious green salad and generous portion of rice (see photo). I highly recommend this restaurant!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv44SOYg&fid=0x0:0xadff762cb38c2bf6"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"Ronnie Calabrese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfiLsDRwnKXAsL5DrGOm2EKTE1w5-AuXvGplsJ6P9d9qYvTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve passed this restaurant many times over the years, but just tried it today. The food was exceptional in its quality and nuances of flavor.

We had the chicken kabob, filet mignon kabob, and the lamb zardaloo chalow for entres. Sambosas and eggplant for appetizers, and both desserts. All were very good. The filet mignon was a great value for the money, especially compared to a steakhouse. The zardaloo chalow was extremely good, especially if you like sweet stews. The lamb was excellently cooked and really melted in my mouth. I’ve had lamb at other places where it was chewy, this was not.

The server was nice and attentive. I’d recommend this restaurant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Omid Skinner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3_MKZ49ODqUhMZaL-kWVlwxg1aQlFJ-OQ9SKOS-2m1krwqR4J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is PHENOMENAL. Service is excellent. My wife and I loved it so much, we went out of our way to come back and eat here again on our way home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAouiSHmrq3zMtPa-XRRgY-&fid=0x0:0xadff762cb38c2bf6"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Jennifer St.Clair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcPmLSjkPEwYwKarE6NCScUV4fULRKurMZMcQ8HAg3pmG6-3Xt-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"F i met a friend here for lunch and it was quite delicious.And I wish I could remember the names of the dishes that I had but here are some pictures of them! You can generally find parking on pearl street but if not you can pull on one of the side streets in parallel park there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC65uVcbWC8uDCTNG0PGGqJ&fid=0x0:0xadff762cb38c2bf6"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"Ryan Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIgbRgwg2kr1Gxz4HsoweoAdYFVqcPdgsuIa60oHcOg82ieA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Omg I found this place again. I used to live in Temecula and I used to eat at Pamir ALL the time! I moved to OC and miss it so much. Unknowingly they moved to La Jolla and here we are I found them again. All the delicious flavors are still there. The kabobs, delicious unique stews, dumplings, sauces. Love this food and the warm welcome from the husband and wife owners   Def highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sadda Shaker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXV4KlZh0UoRplTr_1Y_8yWSxeesoB4f7wO3riDju2YDKWzu81b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute little Ice Cream Shop 🍨🍦☕️
I love that they can do half scoops - i tried Mango Sticky Rice: smooth creamy flavor 4 out of 5.
Also tried Sweetcorn & Blueberries: chunky with blueberries, smooth flavor and rich. I liked it.
The girls were nice. Place clean and well put together.
It was a nice break after walking around La Jolla Cove!
😁😁","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBT8469e1VA6CtDrV_Q9yHL&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Sky Thai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkM0XclyWWPsxKzhOY0MQuiB-HDwZc99L-sWHTod7RE9hrsGAgcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great selection of ice creams in the beautiful La Jolla neighborhood in San Diego! They also serve crepes and shakes as well. I ended up getting the Cafe Latte Swirl and it was very creamy with a light coffee taste. The crepes are made fresh so can take a little bit of time if it is busy. Good service and nice spot!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpdCDo7zCfBZcTMX0tNZyK&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Sruthi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2Jqoz-dGt2ySElY9qyMGaPZNoHJi5wk5I4DYcLXHJF6L62YUKzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful shop with soft and tasty crepes and ice cream. We were visiting the city when happened to drop by and loved the crepes so much that we came back the next day just to get the crepes though it was a 30 mins drive for us. Friendly staff, pleasant outdoor seating area to enjoy the freshly made crepes with the ocean view. Highly recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAEY4KOwBV3aSvl54Xwu7Jn&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Stella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUYMabqNGcfw9rin1JGvxRy0_l-9ZgqmpA9D5ZMSzPRrJELYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute ice-cream shops! They have some table and seats inside and is not very busy, good place to grab some ice cream and take a rest! Ordered Italian hazelnut and earl grey, surprised to find they have real hazelnut inside. Ice cream is soft and sweet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFnwMczlpz6K8iMw6dtC-v&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious ice cream at Scoops! We had cups of pineapple blue sorbet and chocolate fudge brownie and loved it. The service is very friendly and quick. They have some dog friendly outdoor seating as well. Great place to stop for some dessert while walking the busy area. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr6vOr7QE&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2024-7-6"},{"Name":"Savannah Bullard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGyCrM9kh8xoBWvuzqyTYOyYvIcIZ0S7ASMjVM6Qb8k3YmZ5MuWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing ice cream, until a seagull brutally attacked me down by the cove and stole my entire cone. I was so sad please be warned at at the shop not the cove park. The pistachio was fabulous but sadly I didn’t get to eat the coconut sherbet. Totally recommend this shop!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8jMfvMBS5xfMWKXmMjjlX&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"Jaycee (CeCe)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1W1rNS8DQw-W7700WO-pcD3Wq9w9HNucKd-DdnEapv1EPZUjl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute ice cream shop. Great customer service! Got to sample different flavors, and there is also treats for dogs!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAXQyTatNGF3h9t7aGixDg&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Tanya V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXa8lEktjwjLkRD_ay7teMFdHmv07y34LxywmlrqOSozvqzBixJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was so pleasantly surprised by Scoops La Jolla! Not only do they have delicious vegan options (and plenty of them!), but the two girls working there were incredibly friendly, knowledgeable, and helpful. They explained everything in detail and clearly understood vegan needs — which is rare and so appreciated!

The ice cream was creamy, flavorful, and honestly some of the best I’ve had.
Such a great find in La Jolla! I’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA58Uk-qoEN5bbtcleFoxIS&fid=0x0:0x7d00b65b8131306d"],"When":"2025-6-3"}]

[{"Name":"Ali Marjaninejad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcLtrvAoMJTzG5z3xDmqFfUaQNPmv4x8Y8moMX2NROGWK03iqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is one of our favorites both for their food/drinks and the vibe!

The food here is really tasty and served with attention to detail. We have tried their drinks, main entries, desserts, etc., and all were great!

The atmosphere there is very nice; ideal for dates, professional dinners, or friends’ gatherings, and the service is professional.

There is plenty of parking in the Westfield parking (first 2 hours free), or if you are in a hurry, they also have valet services at the door, which is a great convenience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxZuj490PrjKbd0MgUTF7d&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Joe Camarillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtc8FvF_3skMS-f3ctvCoiZIVwUQ2cbQ9ZkGn5CZxvP_UOXxSHFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got to celebrate my birthday in style at Javier's Restaurant in La Jolla, and it was truly unforgettable! 🎉 The food was absolutely on point, with every dish that hit the table being a flavor explosion. The service was top-notch, with our server going above and beyond to make sure we had an amazing experience. They made my birthday evening awesome! If you're looking for a special spot to celebrate a milestone, I highly recommend Javier's!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz1wGHICIXCSDOetvg8Sb6&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Valerie Upham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVMIEwuT8wpVAst6vUEmzc-hzBmdndrdTfZ1N5440eD_VWRQprJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food at Javier’s is delicious. It’s pricey, but worth it for a special occasion. Alcoholic drinks are around $20 each. My niece ordered the taquitos (see photo), and I ordered the Trio de Enchiladas del Mar. The crab and other ingredients tasted very fresh, and the salsa was excellent. We chose to eat there for the atmosphere and the food, and it delivered. That said, it was louder than I remembered. We had a group of eight, and it was hard to hear the person sitting next to me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwayXOHUW37YE7sfe6HUc1&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Adriana Urbina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-avhcHAioOaXfgwWoGA_DaxUtZK8tQIZW320XkTrAoMCNzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"You are paying for the atmosphere. The presentation of the food was nice, but the flavor left much to be desired. It is overpriced and subpar: the mole (pictured) was thin and salty. The tortillas were not freshly made and tasted like the cheap store-bought ones. An $80 meal of steak and shrimp included two shrimps and a small steak.  The carnitas (pictured) were good, but the beans that came with them were very salty. Overall, the price did not match the quality of the food. The one thing that was up to the price standard was the service, which was friendly, cordial, and attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBZoCbKP--urVNPVAwmKkZ&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Amy Thurston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMrFpKaVlo0ac0Sf3Syw6ADYv1-EsjMQDp2bLIPeL6rEOE3Sf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food, excellent service and beautiful building. Waiters were attentive and regularly refilled water and snacking chips and salsa. Everyone loved what they got. I got the house salad (which was delicious and light) and the 3 fish enchiladas: shrimp, lobster and crab.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAesy7WUHuzJsU1OeNkpKBq&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Mrinalini Mishra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUg5Va6ivy2mu4bLfDlyRphh_69aTa5yHRp1qfqrGxI0GK0Zsfz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here to celebrate our anniversary and had an amazing experience!
Absolutely loved the ambience and the food. Our servers, Gio and Juan, were fantastic — Gio was especially attentive and friendly, making our evening extra special.

I ordered the vegetarian enchilada, which was delicious, and their esquites are hands down the best I’ve ever had!

Pro tip: Make reservations in advance, especially on weekends — they get busy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA9MBOkM9Sfa72flV4yDR4&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"philboytano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlVGjs9jpLQeh4CWCahN1lY8r-XsO08T_jyFXLWA9PQQ-w8c3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here with my gf.  My first impression was the interior design of the restaurant, very classy and beautifully decorated.  Was expecting the menu to be really expensive but to my surprise it was fairly priced and the food and service were 👌.  I give this place an A+.  Our total meal with alcohol drinks totalled to less than 150 for 2 people, not including tip.  Not bad at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuMQDT082fri-a_QfJ2AH4&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Jajjj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIh8CbvwsdeGKmxmUe5x05Q_IwRGk6iKVEX9ThW92KWY-5XSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Why is no one being honest about this place? I came here yesterday for a birthday dinner and was completely disappointed. It’s a really loud atmosphere (think club music in a fine dining setting) you literally have to shout to hear each other speak. The overall vibe was confusing - one part of the restaurant was like a sports bar with TVs, another was like a networking event with people in suits & the other part had people in sweatpants? The decor is beautiful but the food was below average & certainly not worth the price. I ordered lamb chops medium but they came out rare. The steak was under seasoned & the chicken in the taquito was dry as hell. For a $250 meal it felt subpar at best. Overall would not go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwvG_NV8nliku7rkh97f76&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-29"}]

[{"Name":"Char","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzlFe0iYrQTRDh9VGXwBY47PIFUSLwJRNrHtDziDjgb_5RJk0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cantania in La Jolla was a great experience all around. I really appreciated that they had veggie options that were easy to make vegan. The kitchen was happy to work with me and put together a spicy veggie vegan pasta using in season vegetables, and it tasted great. Fresh, well balanced, and exactly what I was hoping for.
The rosé was fine, and the wine and drink selection overall was strong with plenty of good choices. My date ordered the duck ragu and said it was awesome, rich and full of flavor.
The atmosphere really stood out. Very inviting, romantic, and just a great place to settle in and enjoy the evening. The staff was attentive, friendly, and made everything feel smooth and unhurried.
Between the food, drinks, service, and vibe, this place checks a lot of boxes. I would definitely go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVD0Gx5NWe2Ov0gpfpoGUl&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Stephanie S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeicU2FkWgX0eLDThIvEumQpzQoV_LtpVtRN4pL5k4-i1wXzs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic dinner experience with my parents, husband and friends. I was able to make a reservation for a party of 7. We all enjoyed appetizers and desserts along with dinner. Tried the branzino, duck orichiette, tagliatelle, and rabbit gnocchi. Panna cotta, Nutella mousse pie, chocolate cake. Not photographed, appetizers: meatballs, crispy octopus.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCG2xXseEtnJOfH9_jKSntA&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"K C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeSyuoKqEZWBBVrOtY7n43oMvCCBVQtxUnHyER3kAl0ZjOyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an absolutely fabulous meal!  Came here with my foodie friends and they said I hit it out of the ballpark with this find.  The ambiance was great, food was BEYOND delicious and the service was extra awesome.  If only we could have servers like Russ everywhere we dined, life would be perfect.  Definitely need to come back with I visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2UVVAFP0Jt-FxHZuO0zfB&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Roberta Sweger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU93wtOAVH3DbuPzyjLT3wNhCIFLdqU0NZKoppZZ0xT2M282kQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We absolutely fell in love with Catalina! Yesterday we tried the shrimp risotto, octopus, and kale salad, and they were so incredible that even though we planned to come back tomorrow, we just couldn’t wait we had to return today. That’s how unforgettable the food is here.

The shrimp risotto is perfection, the octopus is cooked to absolute tenderness, and the kale salad is so fresh and flavorful. The espresso martini 🍸deserves a special mention it’s hands down the BEST we’ve ever had, anywhere. The wine list is excellent, the drinks are crafted with care, and every detail makes you want to stay for hours.

The service is top-notch friendly, attentive, and welcoming. The staff (both waiters and bartenders) go above and beyond. The vibe is perfect, with great music, a clean and beautiful atmosphere, and the kind of energy that makes you excited to come back again and again.

Catalina is officially the highlight of our trip. If we could give more than 5 stars, we would. We’re already planning our next visit probably tomorrow!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCl9d_e_ARxOJMc6UkLvZrj&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Zan Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUN5C3H72aGGcR8PtqR1l-OglvxT_md2x261gTi8kiOsK2nOLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I grew up in La Jolla and my family has been in the Windansea area of LJ since the late 1980s and I would say that Catania is one of my favorite restaurants that’s been in town over the decades. I dined here 6 years ago and had a wonderful dinner and did again this past weekend when I was in town for Thanksgiving and I, as well as the rest of my party, all had a fabulous dinner. It’s right in the middle of The Village (also known as downtown La Jolla) on the top of a small shopping center where World Core and Bessel surfboards used to be. It has great views of the Pacific Ocean and downtown La Jolla. It’s especially nice if you go at sunset. They offer indoor seating and heated outdoor, plus a bar. Our server was extremely polite and everything that we ordered came out very fast. We also dined outside during a cold November night and they did a great job by keeping the heat going so it was nice and warm. None of us got chilly at any point.

For this visit, I started off the meal with a Green Salad and thought it was a really nice light start. I enjoyed every bit of it and felt it was a good choice. I would like it if they would have a sliced heirloom tomatoes or Caprese option but I still enjoyed this. For my entrée, I had to get my favorite dish of the restaurant which is the Whole Roasted Branzino. I had it 6 years ago and loved it then and loved it again this visit. It has a great lemon caper flavor to it and they really do a good job removing most of the bones. I also love how they add clams and broccolini with it, which are also two of my favorite things. Overall a fantastic dinner and it’s consistently good which both of my reviews will prove. I highly recommend and will be back again many times in the future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3-jJBoN1m1qK5nffDrlDG&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVp1uWCwsdNnMzX9JeMnIZGo_W2ucPq1EZ04lwTuNr_nV60ltwC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve ordered from here many times and have always tipped well, but tonight’s pickup was really disappointing for the price. We paid about $60 and the pizza had noticeably fewer mushrooms than previous orders—this seems to happen more each time we do pickup.

The salad was also not worth $20: it was mostly lettuce with barely six pistachios. We specifically asked for extra salad dressing and did not receive it. On top of that, the dressing container took up a significant portion of the salad container—overall it was only about 1/3 full, including the dressing.

I’m not trying to be difficult, but the portions and value were far off tonight. I’d appreciate a response and a make-it-right solution.

We have ordered many times and this was super disappointing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWlKF6aoV-lyWhuGn14aok&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Ayman Alfar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe2gCZjoTtbNLmbME_4kVcF-DkvEZJbP8pu8379R8FS-Sewy1U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an excellent experience at Catania in La Jolla. Great food, beautiful atmosphere, and truly amazing staff. Russ. And Sarrlia gave us wonderful recommendations that made the meal even better. Highly recommend this Seafood Restaurant","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2KU19fRACJhSJWR_kJBAx&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Eric Broockman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs8ORhKHeGX_WjEh519DaCiP8-B4M7e37EZ_VmWAa3ufRA9XH-3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just back to La Jolla after long absence. Catina is now a Michelin recognized restaurant- but still as authentic, welcoming and delicious as our many visits in the past.  Nice unpretentious place with a variety of seating choices for all tastes. You will enjoy it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcpKYDGWi3qOlpWAq-QOqH&fid=0x0:0xe0326138e8927094"],"When":"2025-12-4"}]

[{"Name":"Foodie Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_EnSgIrQhgBkeuZgrKVfWLInLVZCAISjuEHNei4jRf7t78N4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is definitely different from your typical boba or dessert spot. They offer unique flavors made with healthier ingredients. For instance, they have Thai tea slushies and chili mango drinks that can even wake up even the sleepiest of summer beauties. The staff is friendly and welcoming. Parking was easy when we arrived, but I could imagine challenges during peak season.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdsmoVIX7ma1SXm9G8G3aR&fid=0x0:0x35a8710a89cd8fcc"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"Danielle M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8lSlC_bxN65qsv2GFpoGWdJihYz_n0JDEd6Jv0j0i44tJoQtB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A lot of positive reviews here, and I don’t want to discredit them. However, I am posting a list of store policies which I find slightly offputting. [{"Name":"Jimmy James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmXx74DBiW21UvIg3W2pj2piXHy4kQAhzXdbhX38dzyMOnriiitA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The only open from 5:00 to 9:00.

Great food, May really took care of us. I like how she wrote the names of the dishes on her to go boxes. The restroom was nice too.

Though we had reservations at 5:15 we got there at 5:00 and they made his wait 20 minutes to be seated, even though the place was empty.

We had the bone marrow, some awesome bread and king crab raviolis. We paid $72 for a $25 bottle of wine. Some wines on the list were $800. Crazy!

Nice place, and decent decorations for the holiday even though no Christmas music. I thought maybe it was because it was in La Jolla but the place next door really decked out their place with Christmas music and decorations. We'll be going there next year.

The need to clean the patio mirror. Parking was very challenging, even on a Monday.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJag2ec1TqT_Qj1K2wm3vP&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Ann Dakki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbyyOfuiOapV2Ly8cVUqIXD-tyO_G25u_xW22vvGI6Bq5XKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food here was amazing!! 9/10!
The atmosphere was a 9/10!
The drinks were about a 1/10. Me and my sister in law ordered a margarita and I don't think they have ever made one in their life. It tasted like a side of lime juice. It had a big cubed ice as if it was an old fashioned.
The service was ok. I wouldn't say spectacular. 5/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBELTwU31bBvBiLkSDl1EnU&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Eric Broockman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs8ORhKHeGX_WjEh519DaCiP8-B4M7e37EZ_VmWAa3ufRA9XH-3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Marisi isn’t classic fine dining but we had a great visit. I don’t think of it as a classic Italian place - but our branzino was very tasty, our Caesar was fresh and enjoyable, I had a “mocktail” that was creative and delicious. The place is high energy in a good way - lots of peeps enjoying themselves. The decorations and atmosphere are exuberant and add to an overall fun night out. Good times.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-8vSJcrb_M6YllJLV5qSp&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Gabrielle Caplan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOn9jUyDzJ6BP3plzxT2ovDAtq4gpI5TJzirTFB5a-F1e80g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough good things about this restaurant. We came to celebrate my birthday and EVERY SINGLE DISH was a standout and flavors I’d never tried. We had the tomato carpaccio, spicy rigatoni and the prawns. Everything was ridiculously delicious. Also wanted to mention our server Justin who couldn’t have been nicer and more accommodating. He was so kind and polite and lovely. I will 10000000% be back!!!  Also last thing the vibe was immaculate!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6RJ4pJqmMrZCuS0HB50l5&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Lisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwuV3EGx4bBqo9AhsVzcz8-uJsyVZG0W7af7CGgQAoGN6WTXc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marisi may be the restaurant in San Diego I’ve been yearning for! We were lucky enough to get 3 seats at the bar after being fully booked that night and our experience was wonderful. We tried multiple appetizers and cocktails and everything was very good! Honestly though, our favourite… something so simple. The focaccia and brown butter balsamic. I will dream about this bread and dip for a long time. YUM!! The service was excellent and the atmosphere was cozy and comfortable. I will absolutely come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD66r5I90tJgo1SW8ePk6oY&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Jacob Thrasher-Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWadFI3ZVh03hCfybTgfVM8uLwrz19QZXlCVtnL5x-hWhBlhkiGkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Pretty mediocre. Pasta dishes are kinda on the smaller size for the price. Carbonara was not close to al dente, it was almost too hard. Pesto was ok. Standout was the mushroom antipasto and the grilled beets.

Come for the vibes. Service was very good. Better options near by or at Olive garden.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQRpI3y9mrkIpnWDKyHJB5&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Subhasish Bhattacharya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgZNeKU9iSGtXXYXis5_mG6DXbyaXVwMWGnz7QKYPogk3mFAP3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved everything about my experience. The food was fresh, flavorful, and tasty. I loved the ambiance and this restaurant is perfectly located by the Cove. The staff were friendly, attentive, and efficient. Definitely, recommend an advanced reservation especially on weekends.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC43cwHP4_znRw9wvi5ZD5z&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Dan Rawlins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmzm-KDBMBvYx2dllZEo7GqK8w8SY9T7zxNfjz3T8tUWvEnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent Italian restaurant in la Jolla. The wait staff were really attentive and the food was all excellent. Portions are normal sized for a fine dining establishment and are meant to be shared with table, so ordering several is a good tip.  The space is also shared indoor/outdoor and makes for a lovely spot in the evening.  They also have custom cocktails that are quite good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAQOLW8cYfvu11qR-a7joj&fid=0x0:0x22aebbe186f576bc"],"When":"2025-10-6"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Rikav Chauhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwADDznWNAa2PGt1g5I96KP4HcubvTVt7XKJAoDc9rOf_7LdFX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I tried the grilled shrimp taco. Nicely seasoned and the tortilla was nice. High price point with tip + tax for what it is. Wish they used more environmentally friendly products.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdPB51S5xYCm_aoEEUej8u\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Angela Tobin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLTUYhWNDHGfl7Plcm4wn6Bsv1GeZh3xe2VQvJvb_igTllDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fish tacos were awesome. Note that there's no restroom so be prepared if you order something messy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxc2uysERbvH4R5Ex1nqPU\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Tori","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb3SyYP5V3Yxd6T8wpU5SXJxeyZ9LgmzuwC_yDqo_OrBbByvc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quick, tasty, friendly. Great for lunch. Love that they have breakfast burritos all day. We really liked their guacamole, but all our food was solid. Prices were very reasonable. Two burritos for $25.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBob_MjQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2022-12-27"},{"Name":"Joseph D'Esposito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe6HKcx2bs_RLNwp3RMLgMQD6Baw0FGZ9xKWvkCfn6eYdL_QKi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muchísimas Gracias a Raymundo y su colega!\n\nIn the middle of a long trip to California’s coast, all the way from our home in Colorado, our group found ourselves in Raymundo’s colorful and welcoming restaurant. The food left our bellies and our hearts full. The tortas were “gas” the salsa was “hella good” and the drinks refreshed us after a morning in the sun. The food was made well, with care and love you could taste in every bite. Raymundo himself was even kind enough to take a photo with us all. In a world pushing us towards faceless fast food mega chains, local businesses like this one keep our world as vibrant as the walls in this lovely place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAYdfWdFQL4lR5FJghACUw\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2025-8-13"},{"Name":"Bryan Lambert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkA9EREqhTVKNsBdsE_O42b3QgU2ELiF2s03QJJLNDjmzHaIniYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The thing that most taco shops like this struggle with are the beans and rice (bean’s especially).  They are a good litmus for how good the rest of the food is.  The beans are top notch, terrific consistency and taste.  The hot sauce is good.  The portions are generous and the prices surprisingly low for La Jolla, and in comparison with other, similar taco shops.  If you just want some good Mexican food and don’t want to pay Prospect Street prices, then check out Raymundo’s Taco Shop.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR7_jfbQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2023-5-6"},{"Name":"Chris Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJE9N04gZCqiTr1r6248DowvuF-u5iddrFGNPLtUOcheOfEmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"California burrito was awesome. Me my wife and son all got the same thing. My son ate his in less than 5 minutes. He's 15 so. It was absolutely delicious.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"TheHansKranz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_kQ6pkW6tdagjfxb0Td0-gMQz7HunywmXVDoT53qotP3xcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are many tacos shops in La Jolla. But this is the best tacos in town. Shrimp and fish tacos were seasoned perfectly and the tortillas are AMAZING. These are what make great tacos and Raymundo knows that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb46jVUQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2024-8-8"},{"Name":"Hal Jurgensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMeWjn7kJrkhuuuHiK8AIs-KWnMLy3iiAtjVOXDD0orYLywXxpYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite Taco Shops's in La Jolla and it's perfectly positioned right next to work. I've only gotten the California breakfast burrito but it's filling, really damn good, and not greasy at all like majority of taco shops.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRs96_mQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5a609f44d5b30f16"],"When":"2023-5-3"}]

[{"Name":"Ryan M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFmgIjUUTkT1l3D69_qJw-gEcUxH0eIPslYCBU8SPdX166043fgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow… this restaurant ticks all the boxes of a great meal and experience. The food was SO FRESH and TASTY!! The tabouli, babaganoush, and Shirazi salad was to die for. We had the salmon, chicken, and beef and all were so tender and juicy. You can tell that the meats were well marinated and cooked to order. The manager/owner Tony is the nicest guy you could meet who would give you the shirt off his back if it would make your experience better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvD2T6I930QCJIWtNt6wL1&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Sergey Butenco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpKOWUadQauIB-93G-EMAaEdVVAcNvSmGAvSVCLwzE7QZH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is my first time in San Diego and wanted to try a Mediterranean resturant as an alternative to Mexican and sea food options.

I think it exceeded my expectations and I really liked the meat. However, the brown rice was poorly cooked and was oily. I did not like the samosa as well.

Both location and service were okay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC5obm6Jw&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2023-10-14"},{"Name":"Utkrisht Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAfnEMHQbl7sRrN1WQuZnE55Fd8XpQf3MK3KwHuAbdvAGGlk22=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The chicken bowl tasted like sugar less lemonade . We had to go to the indian restaurant at the side to satisfy our hunger . We had chicken wrap which had no salt ,was stuffed with lettuce and we had to search to find chicken pieces. Fries were disaster with no sauce served . Had to go to the counter to ask for salt which was placed to the right of counter. This place was a disappointment but I think they will be healthy choice for the diabetics and hypertension. Ps serve tap water at least with the meals the adjacent restaurants do so","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ4LP9sAE&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2023-7-9"},{"Name":"Ali S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmFuhMrtN3maEszjC3clUJkVoXnPwlC-GlSzdPM1tTwMQIVmM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to Marketplace Grille today for the first time since 2019 and was so happy that it was still the amazing food I remembered. I told my co-worker that outside of my Mom’s home cooked food, this is easily top 3 Mediterranean restaurants in San Diego. I highly recommend the chicken plate or bowl. They cook the chicken kabob on coals, and it’s phenomenal. I would get the herb rice, and always get the side of hummus with the pita bread. It is amazing hummus. Owners and servers are nice, they’ve owned it forever. Great location, very quiet, lots of outdoor tables. This has quickly become my favorite lunch spot in La Jolla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhr9S7mAE&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2023-3-20"},{"Name":"Ashkan Sedaghat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7-EvUpxxBfEDU2AyqMb9_2fuFNjtCv-gxhYaWwofZxMBc7HNp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A phenomenal vibe the owner is such a lovely man and so caring about all his customers. The food is also coal grilled and tastes so delicious. Will definitely be coming back a lot.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Garrett Amos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFco9KDczaWctdmCHNsheAgWVn-MUqwLeQrCG8xX0PwJd0vQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The food was fresh and presented well, however, I was genuinely impressed by the lack of flavor in the lamb bowl. Samosas tasted okay, but again needed a bit more flavor. Some more spices need to be incorporated before I come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9nZP5TA&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2024-3-20"},{"Name":"Yules T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUvaOtgqL2mQYWcxGJk1rcXxgFBwljr9EKeY21i84-KFqCeC5hUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mixed experience. The food was delicious, but a tad pricey and lacking. The service was really great. They brought lots of complimentary pita bread and hummus upon request. The chicken wrap didn’t have a lot of flavor and came with a hair. The salmon bowl didn’t have enough salmon. It was mostly rice and parsley, a bit too much parsley. The corn on the cob was burnt. The chicken plates are probably your best bet, although you’ll be left wanting more chicken too. Overall, the funny and kind employees make it a more pleasant experience than not.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICamperngE&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2021-7-29"},{"Name":"Tony Madrigal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs5X4MVlij2wMFgBWip3TcjTLou1XWLEmca-qvoKBGiKW1rKA16Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best place for Mediterranean food in town, and being that it's in La Jolla, almost guarantees a nice cool coastal temperature.  Always fresh, always delicious. I've been a patron since 2001; my wife loves this place and will never hesitate to make the drive from Lemon Grove for their chicken skewers plate or Greek salad. May I suggest a personal favorite? Tony's special! I also highly recommend their salmon bowls.

Our last visit, just 2 days ago, was to the Carmel Valley location and they impressively manage to consistently deliver the same delicious culinary experience. The same can also be said for the Mira Mesa location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk8ZuFCw&fid=0x0:0xb945c3a7e3c10c13"],"When":"2019-1-14"}]
