The presentation and flavors melt in you mouth. Highly recommend this well kept secret in La Jolla. I'm in love ❤️ 10+ 2 thumbs 👍 up 5 🌟","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwt02ejODgtFKgNn3LCfGI&fid=0x0:0x7562d5e3ca83095f"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Carlos Esquivel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqqa0w5Zxpfzs-V_romifYIenCf3tBVpNsYv-WEzntXtNg7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Big shot out to The Lot employee Tony Provencio! You would believe how he helped me make sure that I was a happy customer. Thanks so much. Grateful for The Lot ensuring their employees provide great value","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chris clawson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtoAqQQxw3IRBw4PPQt6eKFBgGHyfos_wNziZpEABUWAlmAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Been to the La Jolla location a lot but tonight warranted this review. Great theater and experience most the time, but if you’re going for a late night movie on a weekend the service is sub par at best. In addition, our food came an hour later after we ordered it in the theater and it was cold. Considering the idea of paying extremely high prices, it’s not worth it. I would say 65% of the time is a good experience food/service wise.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"R Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7Hk2U6aK31tKqNpM8EJUYZSsKydaA8-6lmBvLzYdQQwjb_n4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was very disappointed with my experience on Christmas Day. I came in with my family to watch a movie, and unfortunately, my son dropped his phone in the theater. When we tried to go back in to retrieve it, we were told we couldn’t because another movie had already started. We decided to make the best of it and stayed at the bar to open presents.
We wanted to order food and drinks, so we asked the manager for a server. We’ve been here before and usually have a great experience, but this time was different. We asked a manager for a server and the server refused to take us we have been here before and I believe his name starts with a “T” Tim or Ty—refused to serve us. Thankfully, the manager eventually got us a server, but the situation left us confused and disappointed.
I understand working on Christmas Day can be challenging, and we were prepared to take great care of our server. Unfortunately, this experience fell short of expectations, and it’s hard to justify coming back. I’ll likely take my business to Cinepolis in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Duchein","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8EOf6il_FpxQ1jYFjjwcH3-97QcKXCwnOmuLCjM5C_cq0NA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful space to hang out and watch a special movie. The food was very good but massive and priced that way too. We got a popcorn, bottled, water, nachos and a beer for $65 when ordering at the seats. Definitely share with a friend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvlZCELw&fid=0x0:0x7562d5e3ca83095f"],"When":"2024-12-13"},{"Name":"Live Well","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyr9CAz5bqr2InvlVWg7L8Z2nezFPFVDCvrYMZwDkgE1l1Y5jJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I totally loved this place! While I did feel like it was too cold and that the sound was turned up too loud, those are my two biggest complaints. We went on a Saturday at 11:30 and the place was basically empty. I loved the food, my friend got wine and a grilled cheese sandwich and she loved it. The screen and the chairs and everything, you just feel so comfy. I could have moved in there. I liked it so much. There’s also a parking lot downstairs, so don’t forget to park down there and get your tickets validated when you go up to buy them. I mean your parking","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christopher Tom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbHfdTcLITlT8v7YweIcFXo3jRY95_Ar43lqXEGX5G4aMVlSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Lot is an interesting place to see a movie. The staff is friendly and the theater where we saw the movie was comfortable; what they lack is built in heating or cooling. I like the ability to order food from my seat.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tami Apland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZprify8w2RJY4n7C5behJWerwm542L_EMKQIfCYXqpnX0mQEC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and service here are both outstanding. The bread was amazing, the tomato sauce was flavorful, the noodles were fresh. The service was divine as well. Fast, welcoming, friendly and accommodating. It felt like we were dining in a family’s home! 10/10 would recommend, and will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlPUXrTh2d-Q1xFPq770Fi&fid=0x0:0x9f1e67852072b00b"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Rachel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxddMm2PA1XtHad_-FW8ssDG2ipaYVcTBOhuUWA8671yVBz6vV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We ordered melezane for an appetizer. The basil was fresh, and the eggplant was cooked well. However, the cuscinetti de pollo (day special, according to the owner) was too salty. The grounded chicken in the pasta had a pungent odor and sticky texture, which means the meat was not fresh. We also ordered a fettucini con pollo, but it was very oily and salty, too. Chicken slices also had the same odor. I was very looking forward to trying the desserts (tiramisu) before ordering, but after eating the food, I had lost all my appetite. Will not return again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzpMBUN6F2qqWXSzEHW_wn&fid=0x0:0x9f1e67852072b00b"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Brian Pacheco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKS_EbvfUui7U0F05ahjGXy8xLEId7yqSN3N4V6O82ShuHLjs6T=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very beautiful part of La Jolla especially for dinner if you sit outside where you can see the sunset off the Coast. Food was very well portioned and fantastic pricing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSd-MULxHgIdRmc13fkvt5&fid=0x0:0x9f1e67852072b00b"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Julie Rowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5PtH9X7R25dLfkvx1SN2eClAerzQuQ7ImZJI7G0LPklOpfFiX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just found this place and we are so glad that we did. We were seated and served by Pasquale, the owner. Huge menu with great descriptions. We had the Mozarella Caprese as an appetizer, along with bread, made daily, onsite. They had several specials to offer. My husband went for the Eggplant Lasagna and I went with the Pollo Francese. My husband's was gone in no time and playfully, Pasquale asked what happened 😂. Dessert was Tiramisu, Cannoli's and cheesecake. We had a glass of Moscato with our dessert and definitely plan to return","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Goran Rajkovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5fkIVjeG0xELfwRxHd2ysqGCg2cZMYDXUSbmW7YOBa3GaJNmO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went for dinner as family, 4 adults and two kids. People who run that place are so kind and lovely. It's like you are in Milano Italy for real. Food was so good. Definitely coming back for more of that delicious food and that Italian warmth.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Ray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJy3ujBYrjfO7Ff4FZ9x801s4Bb4SGnfcBSsE-LYT5qyrsrmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food
- 10/10. Best lasagna l've ever had. Best minestrone soup l've ever had. Excellent Italian wine menu. I could eat here once a week if I could.

Service
- Everyone seems to get a long and work together to get the job done. All servers spoke to me instead of just one. People constantly checked on me. I will say that when I first entered I waited about 5 minutes before anyone spoke to me and even when I sat down it took another 5 minutes before a menu was given to me or anyone speaking to me. However, I contribute it to everyone being busy. Nevertheless, everyone was pleasant!

Ambiance
- it's a very cozy restaurant. I loved how simple but well decorated everything was. It was a warm environment. It's perfect for a cute date night or just a family dinner one Sunday evening. The live pianist absolutely contributed to the overall experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLzeza3gE&fid=0x0:0x9f1e67852072b00b"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Joe Gentilucci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPbb4HXIPiy-k3i15_lI-ywtIEdcAte14_Gyn1N6sIDn3khw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure of dining at cafe Milano tonight with my daughter. As soon as we walked in we were made to feel like we were family. There was gentleman was playing piano and the restaurant had a home like feeling. Pasquale and his team could not have been more attentive and pleasant. They brought out bread with a dipping glaze. The bread was warm and fresh. I had veal Parmesan and my daughter had fettuccine Alfredo. The fettuccine was homemade and the veal was tender. I never touched my knife. It was a great experience from start to finish. Thank you Pasquale and team for a fantastic time. We will be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"F A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0mKQnRLyP3J4PZcOWSI3JdbYUaWWmEn06D2K1KuyyZ1uNXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Racist Owner ‼️
Don’t let his senior age dupe you. We had a very uncomfortable experience here due to the owner’s behavior. I am brown-skinned, my wife is white, and we were dining with my parents. From the start, the owner treated our table with clear indifference—rushing us, throwing silverware down, grabbing menus quickly, and making us feel unwelcome.

What made it obvious was seeing other (white) tables being treated warmly and patiently at the same time. The contrast was impossible to ignore.

He was dismissive and unequal treatment was clear. I would strongly caution people of color and mixed families before dining here.

I want to be fair, this review is about experience and not the food.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jennifer Sterns","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsQOIchSRUgZz5KLT-6zqneQE9-UvdgGSCZR8xBohBH30Ff7VLGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Shops at La Jolla are wonderful!
First of all it is right across the street from the trolley stop for Nobel drive in La Jolla and it is so very easy to get there from the Blue Line or from any of the trolley lines ...  you just get to the Blue Line & it goes straight to Nobel Drive Station and you can shop at plenty of places.
There are small boutique shops, specialty shops like Sephora, fun shopping like Nordstrom Rack, practical shopping like Whole Foods and CVS, FedEx Office, banks and more!
The dining options are fantastic .. with one of my favorite places ... The Melt ... staying open until 2a.m. for those late night cravings for delicious delights.
Also, there are plenty of places in between shops where you can just sit and do your own thing ... read a book, text friends, listen to music (headphones of course), eat a snack that you brought with you or bought there, or just kick back and relax
Definitely go and explore the whole area of the shopping mall, it will be a treat to visit!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lexie Nørgaard Petersen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZ-gka0kWPVGO1n7U4YHM1zs36cotluSvcOPRROaWFCPAZ8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the WORST shopping center I’ve ever been too. It is SO poorly designed it’s almost comical. I’m shocked it ever got approved. The parking lot is absolutely horrendous and you’ll get stuck in one parking lane for 30 minutes with no where to escape. Now add in the modern day idiot behind the wheel and you’re bound to want to bang your head in the windshield. I would rather drive 30 minutes to the next closest Whole Foods than ever step foot here again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dr. Andy Mraz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHFKXYOFqXICLn0QIVrsVWrxKNfSjGbvqc2paArRt-VRoKZh4OtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nordstrom rack has every single thing you need!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD131XcLt34NNbU9LnkubGi&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Shondra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlP8-654JlqP9dC91EAB4gK741k6Gfq_y_rxQMR-m6C7KjaSyU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are a variety of stores to include places to get grocery items, clothing, housewares, and electronics. There are multiple selections for  food also. Dining options include Chipotle, a greek kebab place, a place to get poke, and a Crumbl cookie store. The AMC theater is an all recliner theater. The common areas are well kept and there is lots of parking available.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICev6DsMA&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2022-9-28"},{"Name":"Hesam Abedini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqV0t7ifXKCVdnP1hk4ckgBTeIK83opkd_Fq4Cr4U84Mh1W5Z7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice shopping center with good restaurants and shops! It can be crowded and takes some time to get in or out of the parking but it is okay! I wish there was a water fountain somewhere and more trash cans!
The CVS and the Wholefoods stores make a perfect combination for shopping.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICum-G-XA&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2022-8-6"},{"Name":"Eileen Swanson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQcgSnqJXjGHjlDZ7Ghe9H7EbPCzvqF3rF-p4gM-7bJpyjRhY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Convenient to the 5 on the way back north from Padres games! Lovely and clean shopping center. Traffic always heavy in parking lot. If we got there earlier we would check out something besides Whole Foods!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDUr9P_zgE&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2019-9-8"},{"Name":"Mr. Solo Yolo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrva8VHBD-76812gYCLzpuPUvhu2x_OtmMQ5Ihjp7RIjIdO4pbVA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love coming here because they have very good restaurants n groceries store (whole foods) here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbyYWw7gE&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2024-7-28"},{"Name":"David Temple","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXW_pdxcsEqIvgzYn5s0zHm3S9WBmyOLIy-YGlEB9JypVNnU38=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just about anything you need you can find here. Good restaurants, a fantastic grocery store, coffee  and wine shops, clothing stores and a really solid pet store. Do yourself a favor and spend an afternoon here. Just note: parking can sometimes be a bit of a wank.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Samantha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYwoapc0mYl3SFWR9ynmyYSGKqWXy-XPn2mS9glK7BtYdYwD3F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We absolutely love this place! The staff is super friendly. They have the best and most fresh pizza toppings. The crust is phenom. We have tried the pizzas and salads and have never been disappointed. Looking forward to trying other things on their menu and going all the way with a bottle of wine. Also our favorite valentine's day tradition. No going out, pizza and wine. The best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Todd French","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnXs6j1og4q6f2KR7kUHKKmVm_fcoJa37F_CDcLdhwXQy5EtHV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LOVED THIS PIZZA! The owners are so kind, and I love how they make the pizza fresh after you order it and you can bake it at home - such a fun concept! Highly recommend. Get the ranch too!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"McKenzie Koval","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcB9Zo2iBty5VsOrUKPlCT04HBYR5Ef_gt0HCRN_cIi8yEsqHeFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious pizza. Extremely friendly and helpful staff. Concept of cook-at-home pizza is cool!! Worked well for our family on vacation.

“The Levi” pizza was a fan favorite (even with Cauliflower crust) Garlic Knots as well!

Gluten Free Options for pizza - Cauliflower Crust","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOax7JXPgencWg&fid=0x0:0xa0137b69200b0263"],"When":"2025-5-22"},{"Name":"RobynandByron O'Berry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfHNozJKjDM5BzxTdTe5_j9urzMB4ZYWiEm59d06W3xSnAHX8P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Must Try! American Pizza Mfg is a Take and Bake Pizza establishment -you order one of their signature pies (or create your own pie with whatever ingredients you want), it is assembled, and shrink wrapped fresh to take home to bake at your leisure. These pizzas are not cooked, just assembled with the ingredients you love, and packaged with instructions to bake at home. It’s like your own refrigerated pizza from a local grocer, but without the preservatives and freshly manufactured on-the-spot especially for you. They also have nice dessert options - we ordered the take and bake chocolate chip cookie, but will try other dessert options at a later date.

What we especially love about American Pizza Mfg are the extensive veggie offerings, the goat cheese option on the menu, and the Cutie Pie Kit for a kids pizza party. As a vegetarian, it is nice to find a place with plant-based options, and to be able to create your own vegetarian pizza or vegan pizza is not an easy find. We did curbside delivery for our order, and Andrew had the best customer service and common courtesy with the delivery of our order. We are a military family of six and we appreciate that our sacrifices are appreciated with a 15% military discount offered (military families need to call in to receive this discount or show military identification before payment). Thank you Andrew and Thank you American Pizza Mfg for being military-friendly! Our family plans to make American Pizza Mfg part of our weekly meal rotation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnhfbeFA&fid=0x0:0xa0137b69200b0263"],"When":"2024-10-7"},{"Name":"Heather Whidden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWeI_sUX4fND_wTpRdZeX14ZQsq1inBuLOYdAgh_jbpy7wrg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really good food! Based on other favorable reviews, we decided to give this place a try. We loved the fresh ingredients for both our pizza and salad, and we'll be back whenever we're in town.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nika Sedghi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpB0SS5uptoWoUhB-UMWDRSF2BHJPdtAizu2LJHnIjC7Y5Hi9S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is so freaking cute! The owners did a great job designing this place and you can really tell they care about every order that walks out of these doors. I enjoyed my pizza last night and can’t tell you how delicious both my pizzas were.

FUN FACT: I ended my dinner with the cookie & it truly grows to be as big as your face!!!

As a certified personal trainer and nutrition coach, I really like having an option that doesn’t have all of the extra preservatives and additives as a traditional pick up frozen pizza. You could really taste the difference in their high-quality sourced ingredients & I’ll forever recommend this as a healthier alternative for all my clients!

In summary:
- they don’t skimp out on quality ingredients
- their customer service goes above and beyond.
- you can peek in through their window and watch every step of their transparent and open manufacturing process (nothing to hide!)

@neeks93 on insta & I APPROVE!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-v8KCRw&fid=0x0:0xa0137b69200b0263"],"When":"2022-11-17"},{"Name":"Bridget Farhat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMNKtpUzFH6Upi-BAJZ4z-May5QgDQ_xAlTBDEnPiOBiXCMd04=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have always wanted to try this spot and today was the day after 4 years of passing it so often! I have to say I was impressed and when I say I love pizza… I love pizza and have pretty high standards. This place definitely brought it home!! 10/10 recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC72a3esAE&fid=0x0:0xa0137b69200b0263"],"When":"2024-8-17"},{"Name":"Jay Schimke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJmzXTu7UsbPyGIiDGt1h6F4nSdq1hpfdPiQmRJxnwcTLONm1U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Instead of getting a pizza from Costco, consider swinging by American Pizza Manufacturing and take home a fresh pie made to order.  These guys rock, they don’t make your take home and bake pizza until you order it. You can phone in, use their webpage or just walk in and they will greet you and make you feel at home while you wait for your pizza to be made. Their pizza is delicious, we have tried almost every one and we love them all.  Just set your oven to 425 and cook for about 10 minutes and you are done. Nothing better than a fresh hot pizza out of the oven.  They have classics like pepperoni and Margherita but they also have some signature dishes which use top quality ingredients including caramelized onions, prosciutto, burrata and Italian sausage. Their pasta dishes are also awesome, we love the lasagna and macaroni and cheese. We always get a salad, our favorite is a palm desert, with candied walnuts and grapefruit slices along with Gorgonzola, delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOuMCquQE&fid=0x0:0xa0137b69200b0263"],"When":"2022-6-27"}]

[{"Name":"Christopher Walton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYnE43je6IvBBH9w53CYtl-sA3_EMCQdy8-6ihJd5W_J6ZyT8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You ever have a place just call to you? It was almost 10 years ago I was with family and I was just standing outside drawn to this store. The nicest person came out and started talking to me. Little did I know this was the owner and I told him I was unusually drawn to this place. He made his recommendation and that was history. Any time I am on the west coast and I have the time to get here, I make it my soul mission to get a sandwich, and those awesome world famous oatmeal cookies. If you're a local, stop here and support your local business. If you're from out of town, come on by because you will feel welcome and the amazing staff will not lead you in the wrong direction when it comes to an amazing sandwich for you.... and don't forget the cookies!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDATy0WAMrSmCBNWCYUsU6-&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Erica Trittschuh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcGmZ7xAmKxa6VmA9FpYrcfzWdLLf1PTivDzme5Lrc_7xTO7rlkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious deli sandwiches! We got our sandwiches, chips, and cookies to go. Tuna, turkey avocado, pb&j were all really tasty and fresh. Not too long of a wait to order, or to get our order. They had lots of candy for sale, too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAc4PNVyRe5N73Oa7E5XoBh&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Lexie Edwards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXET0uWhURam9G1PEFyqOmwTSQRSPFD_iw1uV_8wvHLIX_4lkS5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered ahead so we could pick up and go to the beach. The staff is incredibly friendly, and you have to get the special green sauce when you go if you enjoy some spice. We had the egg salad sandwich and the evergreen on Italian rolls. They were so delicious and filling. We will absolutely be back!! Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQLgW7wzpho94kQrbZXH3S&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-6-14"},{"Name":"Gaby Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKLEXITTIBPlhJkV9UL8Q7CsbjzCLxoIxHODAjW30WKMjAkOj9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"horrible service and food. don’t order the breakfast sandwich unless you like an insane amount of pepper on it. Made the whole sandwich un edible. Waste of $8","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0tYMSe6qWGnur-w48o_Tj&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Eva Pruitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEUafDm-L-TeGr51u9HT7UuDF3DwyxnkA1DOQYfvdiymqjMmqi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Literally the best place ever. Dave and Dan are so sweet and the food is so so good! They have gluten free bread too for any allergens. If Dave is making his homemade tomato soup, you HAVE to try it (dairy free!). Perfect for a beach day or quick lunch and super friendly atmosphere!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELebuKXs5PrglAE&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"C Violaris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzW1CJ2JIUzN801RHuqw_V5tpwZWlCU2JfVBXoVz0bk_6CgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice spot to get a break from the beach.  Sandwiches are good.  Only drawback there is no bathroom to go to, so you use the next door restaurants which is not fare to them....so either you go to another restaurant or take your sandwich to go and don't sit down.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCI8BEQRe8cH-O9GXSCt2E&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"gabriela barajas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk-P0g6oezg9xpR0tKInED5kAQxTCK10vG-2dfeEjc36fx0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Cheese Shop is a hidden gem that truly impressed me. The roast beef sandwich on sourdough was absolutely delicious. It was one of the best sandwiches I've had in a long time. The flavors were rich and well-balanced, with perfectly tender beef and fresh bread that made every bite memorable.
What really stood out, though, was the exceptional customer service. Dave went above and beyond, offering my friend and me generous samples of their house-made roast beef, vegan tomato soup, and creamy potato salad. All of which were flavorful and thoughtfully prepared.
For dessert, the oatmeal cookie was a delightful surprise: sweet and chewy with a crisp, satisfying outer layer that made it uniquely enjoyable.
This spot has officially earned a place on my list of favorite food finds, and I’ll definitely be returning soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDovb2TmwE&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-4-28"},{"Name":"Hayden Ogden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWm4RIdchWDbu7gxq8vm5MkPFWeoY3FcIMnaKO8NdQAKrBnrHfhQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing food, get the oatmeal cookie trust me. It’s amazing. Dave the owner has worked there since it opened and is so sweet. All the food is fresh, made the order and you can’t go wrong. I got the Italian grilled cheese and my friend got the famous turkey avocado and  goth were amazing. The hype on TikTok is real for this place. Plenty of outdoor seating and good people watching.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXm6XUSA&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2024-10-20"}]

[{"Name":"Taylor Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb4GAbD9y6nnQZfaVbhnzdZz7d0zW2t9J8Z5042GM25Q_ted4YUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I tried their once monthly Omakase held on Sunday evenings. It did not disappoint.

Ambience was intimate with seven other guests.

The staff service and all cooks were friendly and got to know the customers very well.

Chef Mitsu and his team's preparation was delicious and the non sushi dishes were different yet refreshing. Quality of fish was great and we always appreciate a no soy sauce sushi establishment.

We were unsure of how much food the omakase would provide, but were pleasantly surprised (and full). No add ons needed for us. We will be back for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDWPz3sXO7YetbBdOnMhqBN&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Derek Everett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCUgwkHDiBMVpHTYUDGPhugdiehjFS5IqrjBEBw_pJrau_H6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to Himitsu for the omakase to celebrate our nine year anniversary, and it ended up being exactly the experience we were hoping for. Chef Mitsu and his team put so much care into every course, and you can really feel the intention behind each piece. The whole team was incredible. Everyone was kind, attentive, and made the whole visit feel relaxed and welcoming without trying too hard.

It was a great way to spend the afternoon and mark a special milestone. We left genuinely happy. We’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyaDoGC9Ie3bQ-xvrFkosB&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"John Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWPcHJoDq-g6ld9Dm9kFq7iI3l1pKM8MtHR0FsgDQjWNiubg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"IF you’re a sushi enthusiast I would highly recommend to skip this restaurant. The experience is mediocre at best for this price range. The owner is very energetic and friendly and service staff was very professional, but those are the only positives. I must say the fish quality and cuts were not very good at all.

I ordered Chirashi tokusen and my wife ordered a sushi platter. FIsh cutting was not clean with jagged edges, many pieces tasted bland or flavorless (either aged improperly or poor quality fish), chutoro was full of sinu, ikura was over marinated, crab leg meat were actually fishy and tasted “old”, portions were small. I upgraded to Hokkaido uni which tasted very good, but again for 16 dollars extra for 1 single piece I expected more generous portion for customers. OVerall I have the feeling that the restaurant is trying to squeeze profits rather than providing a great dining experience, especially with respect to the quality of the fish.

There is a mandatory 20% service fee which is not egregious for La jolla but why call it a tip at that point if it’s not optional and proportional to the service provided? Granted service for us was great and I would have tipped 20+% anyways, but having it mandatory I think is in bad taste, pretty much like a price hike on all items on the menu by 20%. If someone didn’t like the service I could imagine this being a bad situation. Perhaps the omakase could be better Judging from online photos but I won’t be returning to find out, especially at this price point.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQ7nKRFpSfMo6yAVqsFUX6&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Frank Bai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwKLlNxILnfKOwwnY3vPKGmgflqawp3ZEGLUPsbXlfaUmpWJOtbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"amazing food, great quality of different kinds of fish; chefs working in front of you with fresh made sushi/sashimi/nigiri; lovely environment but not lots of seats","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAaECaKQdct2Y17a5cr_JJ5&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"TK LEE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjGqijowH5yMMG_PkR0XSRynDe0oqvubjK5FLY2-3_sKtG2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"While the food tastes decent, the pricing is on the high side. The $30 snow crab tempura was especially underwhelming—small portion, overly battered and oily, with hardly any crab flavor and too much salt.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4of-ZPHLs4PG5mnLJGhUj&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Hannah Whalen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0xy4wwXmv1Ik_D6KSVnuy3idsoEnXzGaGyKbilPp2Wxbdp-c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I rarely write negative reviews, and even more rarely come across a sushi restaurant that leaves me this unimpressed—but unfortunately, Himitsu in La Jolla did just that.

From the moment we arrived, the tone was off. After seating us, the host came back to our table to mention, “You know we have the table for you for an hour and a half?” Being greeted with a time limit immediately felt unwelcoming and rushed. Also, how would we know that?

Our server then insisted on taking our entire order, promising to pace the meal. What actually happened was the exact opposite—our main dishes came out first, followed immediately by everything else. There was no rhythm or flow to the meal, just a flurry of plates all at once. It completely took away from what should have been a thoughtful, bite-by-bite dining experience. We were in and out in an hour or less, which is unusual for an upscale restaurant.

The portion sizes were shockingly small, especially considering the very high prices. The food was okay- I liked the miso cod and the katsu sandwich, but the sushi was lackluster. And for a restaurant positioning itself as upscale, the service was not only lackluster but felt almost dismissive. We were seated at the farthest leg of the outdoor patio, isolated from the restaurant itself. No ambiance, no connection to the sushi bar, and honestly, it felt more like we were dining at one of the neighboring restaurants.

To top it all off, we were celebrating a birthday—and when the dessert came out, a candle was lit and dropped on the table with zero fanfare. No acknowledgment, no warmth, just...there you go.

And let’s talk about the auto-added 20% gratuity—regardless of party size.

Based on our experience, I would not recommend Himitsu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhHB5oNZWSClSBj4VWGGod&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-7-26"},{"Name":"E.B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnZr-6urJBFP4WjsC5v9SrljLHOuhPcC031IwyRSH67pWsh3I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Service was “cold” even on a not so busy evening. I ordered a GF ramen, from the 100% GF menu. They assured me my food would be gluten free when ordering. As I got to the bottom of my soup, I found a 3 inch piece of Udon noodle (not GF). I pulled it out before eating, but my soup was contaminated and I had nearly finished it. So, word of caution about that for celiacs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiuQM7F0WoyFrJBtiodJPy&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Tommy Cheng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuFSQ234m2Efa7zOgHE-JnyI7h9r9H7wzIsCpEBwY6FayRmSlU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Himitsu : “C,” with a final score of 60%, meaning “Mediocre. Not coming back, but not yet angry.”

Executive summary: good vibes, but mediocre food and poor value makes me question how Himitsu made it to the “Michelin recommended” status, and in my books, “not recommended.”
-------------------------------
Before the restaurant review, I created a new rating system. Of course there is always subjectivity in reviews, but taking inspiration from Car & Driver head-to-head car reviews, I’m hoping a more systematic way of analyzing different restaurants can help lessen subjectivity. The final grade will be determined by a weighted score of 3 factors - food (70%), vibe & decor (20%), service (10%). The scores will be added, then multiplied by a “value” factor that can improve or reduce the score by up to 20%. See photo for elaboration.

Himitsu, I first tried about two years ago, and had a fairly good experience. So on my wife’s birthday, who’s actually out of town, I decided to celebrate it anyway, but without her. I got a 5:45pm reservation, and excitedly told my daughter “let’s go to good Japanese!” Note to self: never set high expectations!

The restaurant has very limited inside seating. About ⅓ is inside, ⅓ in a “covered tent” and another ⅓ on the “patio” (err…sidewalk?) beside the parking lot. Despite sitting on the patio, the weather Gods cooperated and it felt quite comfortable.

A cheerful waitress greeted us, and shared the “tonight’s specials.” Nothing popped out, and I was quite happy about the standard menu, most dishes served in small plates, allowing us to go for variety. We ended up starting with 6, and I figured we’d continue to order as we ate, depending on how we felt.

Ribeye katsu sando (B ) : This was the meal highlight. Beef was tender, juicy, and nicely seasoned. The breading wasn’t as crispy as desired, but understandable since it was in between two slices of soft white bread. The ginger dressing was a little too tangy, overpowering the beef, but the weakest link was the cold au jus. Dipping the sandwich meant it became cold and soggy. So I only dipped once because I’m a fast learner.

“Today’s special” soft shell crab roll (C ) : The weakest dish of the night. I originally ordered the “regular” soft shell crab roll from the menu, but the waitress mentioned they had “fresh crab” off the special menu, and I simply said “sure.” In hindsight, I should have asked about the price but I never would have expected it to be double! The worst part, it didn’t taste anything special. The lettuce conflicted with the crab that didn’t taste particularly fresh, and it really didn’t taste much better than something from a Japanese supermarket.

Salmon hand roll (B ) : I didn’t try this, but my daughter says it deserved a “B”.

Anago (eel) nigiri (B ) : This was quite nice, very light seasoning, reminiscent of how they’re served in Japan. The good, I could taste the sweetness of the eel. The bad, the eel wasn’t fatty enough, so given the quality of the eel, the North American style with a little more char and more sauce would have improved the dish.

Salmon belly nigiri (C+ ) : It was a generous slice of salmon belly, but not enough marbling and rather tasteless.

Ebi (shrimp) nigiri (C ) : The shrimp was overcooked and rather tasteless.

My original intent was to keep ordering, but even my daughter, especially after eating the soft shell crab roll, said “nah, the quality is not there.” I asked about desserts but they sounded all French based, like creme brulee, and ultimately, nothing appealing. So we stopped, and asked for the bill. At $122 for the quality and amount of food served, especially $39 for the soft shell crab roll, plus the auto 20% gratuity, the value certainly wasn’t there.

Finally score: “C” at 60% or “Mediocre. Not coming back, but not yet angry.”

Food: C+ (65%)
Vibe: B (70%)
Service: B (70%)

Weighted total: 45.5 (Food) + 14 (Vibe) + 7 (Service) = 66.5

Value factor: “Not worth it” so reduced score by 10% for a final score of 60% (rounded).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEa7gW49Wk2kS7TnrikgPP&fid=0x0:0xe6521b675eaa605"],"When":"2025-8-16"}]

[{"Name":"Kytka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFbLxCr0yvAqfHQCyTsjXfQy9R17dE_EQqu_BX8i1OgxMFORH4zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What I absolutely love about Valley Farm Market La Jolla is the incredible selection of prepped meals—they have everything you could want for a quick and delicious bite! Beyond the fresh fruits, veggies, cheeses, and top-quality butcher cuts, they offer salads, pastas, roasted veggies, salsas, desserts, and more—all fresh, fairly priced, and super convenient. I grabbed their roasted potatoes, prepared carrots, and chicken breasts, making dinner effortless. The cold pasta salad was the perfect next-day lunch. Absolutely delicious—highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAqZTDtAE&fid=0x0:0xb8bf8675ee92bd17"],"When":"2025-2-2"},{"Name":"Jonathan Rogers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDiqaG_vA-FTEP4atj8261jW-FoBs3mmReM_naNGzSss9b5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Jolla Valley Farms Market is one of my favorite local spots. Their meat selection is excellent, always fresh, well cut, and you can tell they take real pride in quality. They carry a great variety too, from everyday staples to specialty cuts you don’t usually find at bigger grocery stores.

Beyond the meat counter, the whole store is impressive. The produce is fresh, the shelves are well stocked, and they have a really nice mix of local and imported items. The staff is friendly and always willing to help or make recommendations.

It’s the perfect neighborhood market if you care about quality ingredients and personal service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"BlueZoneBejuco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqgRyor9vM49Wo7LuGEtU73bntB494Hoy2ZIo3ughRHto8UA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place, meat counter guys are awesome! They really give you the local butcher shop feel and the quality is without a doubt the best in town. This is the only place to go to get a good cut of meat in the La Jolla area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marysol Nunez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITozwqg_LfrHwlWyqwWxXoEoLsxuarku0EBE7JvNA4_riRLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is wonderful. Nelson’s friendly customer service and knowledge has made me a customer for life. Definitely recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"zeina shahhal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm9XpnE9SrT1RnLE_i-FML9qG6S3p09BxnM1qlFfEdvUz6eV8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have to agree with the fact that reviews say it’s expensive! Meat department is great but make sure you take out a second mortgage prior to heading there!
Their burgers and fries made in the kitchen are pretty good. Poke bowl below average. The 4 star is definitely for the burger and employees!They are very friendly and seem to love their jobs!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxmdS7eg&fid=0x0:0xb8bf8675ee92bd17"],"When":"2023-5-21"},{"Name":"Sadie Bnstl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGrG8S6MX7IPIGd0MkITsZpCaT2LZ3kKeNoFR--_Gjy67PJ0qkyw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fly infested and moldy or spoiled produce. The place has had a fly problem for at least 6-8 months. They’re even in the refrigerators when you go to grab milk or a salad. Head back to the produce department and there’s a swarm of 10-20 of them between the produce stands. They don’t have proper moisture control on the produce as I’ve ended up with things with mold on them when I got home, on multiple occasions now. I tried to buy cucumbers, the last time I got home and the back end was a little mushy with some mold on it, I was hoping it was random but today I tried to buy some again and every single one I picked up had some mold on the back end that was against the wall. The onions often have a squishy/spoiled spot on them I’m guessing because of the fact that they sit in the sun half the day. There’s an open kitchen and a meat counter but I couldn’t get away from the flies as I was waiting to order so I figured it’s safer not to.
They do have delicious tuna salad (just don’t accidentally grab the one with corn in it, yes I said corn in tuna salad) and some of the salads are good if you get the luck of the lettuce not being slimy.
The employees are always friendly and helpful. But they seem to just be used to the flies.
And no there’s not a fly problem in the area. I live and work in the area and of course there are some flies but no where indoors are there flies like this, they’ve been in there a while so I’m sure they’re just hatching in there on the food or in the drains. The outdoor farmers market does not have this problem. It’s so gross. I recomend the meat and produce.

However, I believe that the food service is not good. The people who attend it are not nice, they are unrespectful.

I'll give it 4 stars onle because this place as a market is extremely good.

4/5.

Been comming back ever since 3 years ago, and the food service has gotten better and the people who attend it are really cool. So, its a 5/5 for me.

When we visit La Jolla again, we'll happily walk the mile or so again from all of the action to this little out of the way gem.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allen Ingling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXco29s5YQNmds3PhgyHQkPQ2k-9bR0hc8kJPoHV-yQBiovItzd7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was decent, service was friendly but could have been more professional.\nWhen we arrived, we were told to sit anywhere. Shortly thereafter they asked us to move because a large party was coming in, who ultimately sat elsewhere because they didn't know how many people were in their party. Entrees came out within 5 minutes of our appetizer which we hadn't finished.\nFirst world problems but these are restaurant 101 issues which could be easily avoided and lead to a better experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgg4THTg\u0026fid=0x0:0xc71df262e7d114ca"],"When":"2025-2-26"},{"Name":"Mark Engel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5cK4Ch3xEE52OmD7XV5LzHXteEvrdI1uvmK9A4egEAUFDI7et=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"RELLENO, Chile Relleno that is!  Been testing out Chile Relleno's for years all over the country and seriously, this might be the best one yet.  This dish is so incredible labor intensive, many restaurants make a dozen each day then tell yo they are sold out when you go to order.  It is like a loss leader to get you to come in.  It was 7:30 pm when I ordered this and it was no problem.  This dish had the perfect taste and texture and great flavors.  You can also judge a Mexican restaurant by their tortilla chips and sales and these were excellent, all hand-made in house.  The chips were a little thicker and the salsa chunky with fresh tomatoes and onions.  We also had the flautas and the El  Ranchero Special Cheese Crisp - a House Specialty.  Everything was fresh and delicious.  Make sure to have a Margarita as well.  BTW, we walked in without a reservation at 8pm on a Saturday night - pretty awesome.  Cannot wait to return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbuc_3kQE\u0026fid=0x0:0xc71df262e7d114ca"],"When":"2024-7-29"},{"Name":"kym s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5YJhDj2xiO1Dstx_H_2HbYhf3j-ztVxxRyXtYcgO-e5QC_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I was excited I found a place close to work that had abondigas since I have a cold. Unfortunately this place was a huge let down. The abondigas tastes very very bland. The meatballs lack flavor and the broth just taste like beef water. Even the cabbage was wrong. Authentic Mexican restaurants would never use red cabbage as a topping.. fortunately the chips and guac were good and a coworker shared some quesadilla with me. - I still recommend trying the place out. I would just stay away from the abondigas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfKGBbYwn48GAQaMd62d1zNiQPvmSdApGxFAB5WcVMUBP3Bg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very pleasant Mexican restaurant and bar that in La Jolla with a nice mix of patrons. [{"Name":"Ubaya Medawela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3johBFloExy9j3HQ7-4dfLP_r6qiN52WUONViXeU1iVE3Ntjk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A clean and pleasant place with good food and fresh juice. The staff are courteous and attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELiU6LXrhKeyzAE&fid=0x0:0x1c5cc401a0f4867c"],"When":"2025-5-9"},{"Name":"Nathanael Mena Mijangos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPL3d0OaoJ5AyM1cFTyyW59MwbYovZJ5lugy6165p_GaktYXmZzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On a recent trip to San Diego, as often happens when traveling, I found myself eating out quite a bit. Craving something fresh and less processed, I was lucky to discover a delicious liquid meal that hit the spot—fresh-squeezed juice!

All ingredients were naturally juiced on the spot, creating a refreshing and satisfying drink. The staff at Rela.Fruot were incredibly helpful, recommending the perfect combination for me. The juice was not only nutritious but absolutely delicious.

If you're in San Diego and looking for something healthy and energizing, definitely stop by Rela.Fruot! Great options, friendly service, and a truly fresh experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDjU7U9NpHExViiol4nd0b&fid=0x0:0x1c5cc401a0f4867c"],"When":"2025-8-5"},{"Name":"Galina Chzhen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdrFdXcZPXC_T_EMjEzfn56YMo8wEy4qjm80DdqTZ2wnhw0JhWUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had some time to kill before my reformer Pilates class so decided to get myself a green goddess smoothie with protein powder. You can add protein powder to any smoothie, they also have chocolate flavor.

Great place, with many vegan and health items but a bit expansive, my smoothie was $18.70 before tips. They do have Creatine shots, Gluthatione, Vitamin C, Magnesium L-Threonate and coconut /chlorophyll water to supplement your body which is great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCItvDK-QE&fid=0x0:0x1c5cc401a0f4867c"],"When":"2025-4-1"},{"Name":"Michelle Goldwasser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFbJFG2u6VtpewHUm1tyNs2C5nBMJe4XbTRhdmOiGLu7R2Bw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Parakeet Juicery is my new favorite spot!
